Name: FMC Corporation
Description:
At FMC, our employees are guided by our purpose: Innovation for agriculture, Solutions for the planet. We are passionate about the power of science to solve agriculture's biggest challenges and committed to supporting farmers around the world with sustainable technologies that protect their crops and help feed the world’s growing population.
 
For more than a century, FMC has successfully delivered some of the industry’s most advanced, innovative solutions that protect farmers’ crops from destructive pests and disease, while also protecting the environment. We are committed to fulfilling our mission of discovering new herbicide, insecticide and fungicide active ingredients, product formulations and pioneering technologies that are consistently better for the planet.

All trademarks, service marks and logos are the property of their respective owners in the U.S. and/or other countries.

Always read and follow all label directions, precautions, restrictions for use.

Name: Nutrien
Description:
We are a leading global provider of crop inputs and services, operating a world-class network of production, distribution and ag retail facilities that positions us to efficiently serve the needs of farmers. We focus on creating long-term value by prioritizing investments that strengthen the advantages of our business across the ag value chain and by maintaining access to the resources and relationships with stakeholders needed to achieve our goals.
 
We produce and distribute about 27 million tonnes of upstream potash, nitrogen, and phosphate products for global agricultural, industrial, and feed customers. Our downstream agriculture retail network services over 600,000 customer accounts worldwide.
 
Our strong and trusted relationship with farmers is at the heart of our business. In spending our days with farmers, we plan with them, walk their fields and explore ways to help them succeed. We have a comprehensive portfolio of crop inputs and services, spanning the ag value chain, and we are working together with our customers to improve on-farm productivity to meet the needs of a growing global population.

Learn more at www.nutrien.com

View our Social Media Disclaimer: https://www.nutrien.com/legal-notice#social

Name: EuroChem
Description: We are EuroChem. We have supplied the world’s farmers with nutrients for over two decades, and today, EuroChem helps more than 250+ million people, including in developing communities, achieve food abundance. Our range of mineral-based products provide greater yields, helping growers to put more food on the table around the world, in a more sustainable way.

Name: UPL Corp | Agri Solutions
Description: UPL Corporation Ltd. (UPL Corp) is a leading global crop protection and biological solutions company defining the future through sustainable agriculture and a grower-first mindset. With a robust portfolio of holistic solutions, UPL Corp aims to create shared growth and prosperity for farming communities, agriculture, and our planet. As the largest of UPL Group’s pureplay platforms, UPL Corp contributes to more than $5bn in annual revenue and is a leader in fostering collaboration through OpenAg to develop advanced technologies for crop health and productivity.

Name: JU Agri Sciences Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At the turn of 21st century, JU Agri Sciences was conceived as a key enabler in Indian farmers pursuit of enhancing farm productivity and to produce more with limited resources sustainably. 

In a journey of mere two decades, as part of The Jhaver Group, JU Agri Sciences has emerged as one of the leading player & fastest growing organizations in the Indian agricultural services sector. Presently, with a footprint spanning across all major states of India, JU Agri Sciences serves a vast network comprising over 7000 trade partners and 30000 retailers nationwide. With an extensive portfolio of 130+ products, ranging from Biological Fertilizers, Biological Pesticides, Insecticides, Fungicides, Herbicides and Bio-stimulants, JU Agri Sciences prioritizes extensive research and development efforts, tailored to meet the diverse needs of crops cultivated across the country. Notably, the company has been instrumental in pioneering the biological fertilizers industry in India. With a team of more than 1000+ trained people on ground offering regular technical and advisory services, the company has deep experience in brand building and many of its brands are amongst the most trusted names in the Indian farming community today. 

At JU Agri Sciences, the phrase ‘Mitti Muskurayegi’ is not merely our tagline but also the philosophy we live by every single day. As the Indian Agriculture stands on the cusp of imminent transformation, JU Agri Sciences stands together with the farmers of the country in ensuring food security of the nation.
Location: Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh

Name: Jubaili Agrotec
Description:
Jubaili Agrotec was established in 2002 in Nigeria, which acquired since then a leading position in the market. Our dedication to providing high-quality agricultural products and sustainable solutions has helped the company to grow its roots and cover now 6 countries (Nigeria, Ghana, Uganda, Tanzania, Kenya and Ivory Coast ) and more than 16 markets. 

Our vision is To increase our value as well as our portfolio of diversified brands in order to always be recognized as the FARMER’S FIRST CHOICE. 

Driven by our commitment to providing African farmers with both the necessary products and knowledge to grow, Jubaili Agrotec is on a mission to achieve a sustainable future for all. Forward-thinking, exceptional services, and advanced solutions are the core elements of our work. Over the years, Jubaili Agrotec has built an innovative, entrepreneurial environment that generates original ideas for agriculture, for it is the key to sustainable global growth. Our mission statement is “Let’s grow together”, growing hand in hand with our stakeholders.

Name: Parijat Industries (India) Ltd.
Description: Parijat Industries (India) Limited [formerly Parijat Industries (India) Private Limited] is a fully integrated, technical to final formulations manufacturing, agrochemical company with advanced R&D Infrastructure. Starting out primarily as an export house from India, Parijat Industries today has its own standing both in the domestic and international markets. This achievement is the fruit of the hard work and labour of more than 1000 professionals working closely together across 70 countries worldwide. With its Head office in India and subsidiaries in Russia, Togo, Tanzania, United Kingdom, UAE, Canada, Hong Kong, and Mali, Parijat is available to its worldwide customers across all time zones.

Name: Best Agrolife Limited
Description: We are committed to brace agriculture with its extremely productive and progressive vision and mission to make every farmer prosperous. We envision becoming a global player in agrochemicals and emerge as an icon for growth, technology, and innovation.

Name: Wilbur-Ellis
Description:
Family owned since 1921, Wilbur-Ellis is a leading international marketer and distributor of agricultural products, specialty chemicals, and ingredients. 

Since the beginning, Wilbur-Ellis has prided itself on looking forward. This relentless vision helped us grow into a multibillion-dollar business with employees and partners all over the world. It’s this tradition of always staying ahead that will carry us into the future.

Our 2,400 employees across North America are united by our shared values and driven by our passion for innovation. We know Wilbur-Ellis thrives when our employees do, which is why many have been with us for decades and others join to build their careers with us.

At Wilbur-Ellis, our purpose is to provide the essentials for the world to thrive. To achieve this, we believe diversity and inclusion are an integral part of who we are as a company, now and into the future. We know that a diverse workforce leads to better insights, better decisions, and better products and services. 

Our Portfolio:
- Agribusiness: Our approach to crop protection, nutrition and seed development combines years of expertise and service with the latest technology wherever you are, whatever your needs.
- Nachurs: Built on quality, integrity and innovation, NAS is a 70-year-old specialty chemical business that pioneered the low salt liquid starter fertilizer industry by introducing the first true solution liquid NPK fertilizer.
- Cavallo Ventures: We fund and champion progressive technology and daring entrepreneurs that support our three business divisions and beyond.

Learn more and explore a world of opportunity.

Name: Parijat Industries India Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Parijat Industries (India) Private Limited is a fully integrated, technical to final formulations manufacturing, agrochemical company with advanced R&D Infrastructure. Starting out primarily as an export house from India, Parijat Industries today has its own standing both in the domestic and international markets. This achievement is the fruit of the hard work and labour of more than 1000 professionals working closely together across 70 countries worldwide. With its Head office in India and subsidiaries in Russia, Togo, Tanzania, United Kingdom, UAE, Canada, Hong Kong, and Mali, Parijat is available to its worldwide customers across all time zones.

Name: OCP Nutricrops
Description:
OCP Nutricrops, a subsidiary of OCP Group, aims to accelerate the global shift to sustainable agriculture. 

At OCP Nutricrops, we produce and distribute customized phosphate-based fertilizers that increase crop yields, combat climate change, and protect natural environment.

Our mission is to ensure that farmers around the world have access to the customized fertilizer they need – sustainably, reliably, cost-effectively, and with the right support.

Name: Biostadt India Limited
Description:
Biostadt India is a diversified organization empowering the Indian agricultural sector in India and across more than 22 countries globally. Today, Biostadt India has grown into a large corporate house on the foundation of its strategic business, providing sustainable solutions and improving farm output through high-quality seeds, novel crop care products and aquaculture inputs.

Biostadt India Limited is firmly positioned to address the emerging local and global challenges by providing the farmers not just customized products, but customized solutions, developing and evaluating products and processes for improving their satisfaction. Biostadt has 5 manufacturing facilities in Waluj, Bhavnagar, Jammu, Aurangabad and Baroda.

Name: Field Science
Description:
Cultivating Innovation, Rooted in India.

At FIELD SCIENCE, we believe the future of farming lies at the intersection of deep scientific understanding and on-the-ground experience. We are an Agri-Tech leader committed to creating advanced, effective, and sustainable solutions that truly matter to the Indian farmer. 

 Our Heritage: Proudly Made in India, we leverage indigenous research and local agricultural knowledge to ensure our products are perfectly suited to the diverse climatic and soil conditions of the sub-continent.

 Our Expertise: We specialize in Organic Products for farmers, e.g., advanced crop nutrition, soil health diagnostics, or precision farming tools] that optimize resources, enhance resilience, and significantly boost farm profitability.

 Our Promise: We are Trusted by the Field. This isn't just a tagline—it's a commitment. Every product is validated through extensive field trials, ensuring reliability and demonstrable value for the farmers who rely on us.

FIELD SCIENCE: Empowering the hands that feed the nation.

Name: Katyayani Organics
Description: Katyayani Is A Fast-Growing, Tech-Driven Agrochemical Company. With A Diverse Portfolio Of Over 250+ Lab-Tested Products Ensuring Latest Formulations, Katyayani Provides End-To-End Farming Solutions Including Insecticides, Fungicides, Fertilisers, Herbicide And Pest-Control With Just One Click. Katyayani Ensures That Every Product Delivers Strong, Reliable Results While Understanding The Importance Of Affordability, We Work To Provide The Best In The Market.

Name: Mankind Agritech
Description: Mankind Agritech has business line of products in the Herbicide, Insecticide, Fungicide, Plant Growth Regulator (PGR), Plant Nutrition and Bio Pesticides segments. The Company has various products that meet the health and protection demands of growers throughout their crop lifecycle for a safe, productive and sustainable production. Mankind Agritech focuses on enhancing the productivity of Indian farmers through innovative products and services that sustainably increase crop productivity. The Company continually seeks ways to innovate and improve agricultural productivity at its Research and Development Centre, and is in collaboration with many multinational companies to bring world class eco-friendly crop protection solutions to Indian farmlands.

Name: EASTCHEM CO., LTD.
Description: Eastchem is a leading provider of agrochemicals, technologies and solutions. We are deeply engaged in the field of crop protection, primarily working on the R&D, production, registration and sales services of agrochemicals, pharmaceuticals and intermediates, and other fine chemicals

Name: MOPCO
Description:
Misr Fertilizers Production Company "MOPCO" is the largest nitrogen fertilizer plant in the Arab Republic of Egypt. It was established in 1998 within the Damietta Public Free Zone, with a capital exceeding two and a half billion Egyptian pounds.MOPCO specializes in the production of urea as a basic product and ammonia as an intermediate product using advanced technology that achieves the highest levels of product quality, safety, and environmental protection.

Our vision is to play a leading role in the industrial, agricultural advancement and global food solution while building long-term value for all stakeholders.

At MOPCO, we provide provide premium quality fertilizer products in a safe, reliable, efficient and environmentally manner and to produce predictable earnings for our stakeholders, and provide a dynamic and challenging environment for our employees, and to create continuous value for our customers and consumers, inspiring confidence and respect through the highest levels of product quality and service.

Name: Verdesian Life Sciences
Description:
The Nutrient Use Efficiency People.

Our Mission
At Verdesian Life Sciences, we enable a sustainable future for farmers through nutrient use efficiency.

Our Story
We firmly believe that sustainability and profitability are not mutually exclusive. Built from the ground up in 2012, Verdesian Life Sciences offers farmers and growers the biological, nutritional, seed treatment and inoculant technologies that maximize performance on high-value row crops and specialty crops, as well as turf and ornamental plants. 

At Verdesian Life Sciences, we live and breathe by one goal: to enable a sustainable future for farmers through nutrient use efficiency. We do this by developing products and technologies that help farmers grow more with less. Our solutions help plants reach their full potential. Sustainably. 

With its headquarters in Cary, North Carolina, Verdesian has production and manufacturing facilities strategically located in Pasco, Washington; Cape Girardeau, Missouri; South Salt Lake, Utah; and North Lima, Ohio that produce and custom blend large-scale or small volume runs of liquid and dry formulations. As a 4R Nutrient Stewardship Partner, Verdesian is committed to researching and developing environmentally and financially sustainable products. 

Verdesian is committed to researching and developing environmentally and financially sustainable products.

Visit www.vlsci.com for more information.

Name: VSM · WE KNOW ABRASIVES
Description: VSM has been setting standards in the production of quality coated abrasives for over 160 years. Our abrasives give every surface the perfect finish and we also analyse our customers' individual grinding applications to ensure that we can always find an optimum, long-term solution.

Name: Balrampur Chini Mills Limited
Description: Balrampur Chini Mills Limited ( BCML) is one of India's leading sugar manufacturing companies engaged in the primary businesses of Sugar, Bio-Ethanol & Renewable Energy. BCML is respected for its business sustainability, operational efficiency and responsible corporate citizenship with  a strong commitment towards becoming a rural prosperity driver. BCML's business model is delivering deeper sustainability with a growing proportion of revenues derived from products directed towards decarbonization.

Name: AMVAC U.S.
Description: AMVAC is a U.S.-based, global technology solutions provider for agriculture and related industries, dedicated to helping growers increase yields, protect crops, and meet today’s evolving challenges with confidence and sustainability. For over five decades, we’ve been at the forefront of agricultural innovation, offering a diverse portfolio of trusted crop protection products, nutrient management tools, and advanced delivery systems. As a wholly owned subsidiary of American Vanguard Corporation (NYSE: AVD), AMVAC serves growers across a wide range of crops—including corn, soybeans, cotton, vegetables, tree fruit, and specialty crops—delivering proven solutions backed by science and real-world results. Our commitment to stewardship is core to everything we do. From closed handling systems to educational outreach and precision application, we take responsibility for protecting the environment, supporting farm productivity, and contributing to the long-term sustainability of the agriculture industry. With a focus on continuous innovation, collaborative partnerships, and customer-first service, AMVAC continues to grow its global footprint while remaining rooted in its mission to empower growers and advance agriculture.

Name: Omnia Nutriology
Description: Since 1953, with purposeful planning and actions, Omnia has been positioned to make a positive and significant impact in South Africa’s agricultural sector. Our advice and assistance to clients are supported by a holistic approach based on our Nutriology model. Nutriology is an approach that focuses on the growth of agricultural crops by developing and then applying specialised products, innovative solutions, technology, services, and client relationships that strives to promote sustainability. Nutriology refers to a total crop management process and is applied throughout a crop’s lifecycle to increase yield, reduce the risk associated with crop production and increase the farmer’s return on investment.

Name: CropLife Europe
Description:
CropLife Europe represents sustainable, innovative, science-based solutions to protect crops: #biopesticides #pesticides #digitalag #plantbiotech

www.twitter.com/CropLifeEU

Name: Innovak Global
Description: With a presence of more than 60 years in modernized agriculture, in Innovak we conceive, develop and commercialize root biostimulants that solve critical crop problems. It is at the root where we focus on objectives, technology, and the philosophy shared with the farmer, to produce healthy crops with excellence

Name: KLK INDONESIA
Description:
Perkebunan Kuala Lumpur Kepong (KLK) adalah perusahaan kelapa sawit multinasional Malaysia yang telah berdiri lebih dari 100 tahun. KLK memiliki perkebunan yang mencakup 300.000 hektar yang tersebar di Malaysia, Indonesia, dan Liberia. KLK merupakan salah satu perusahaan perkebunan terbesar di Malaysia.

KLK mendiversifikasi kegiatan usahanya ke arah industri berbasis sumber daya dan memperluas operasi manufakturnya sehingga menghasilkan operasi oleokimia internasional di Malaysia, Indonesia, China, Swiss, Jerman, Belanda, Belgia, dan Italia.

Dari segi sebaran geografis, sekitar 56% lahan perkebunannya berlokasi di Indonesia, 42% di Malaysia, dan 2% di Liberia. Grup KLK di Indonesia memiliki 26 anak usaha yang tersebar di Sumatera Utara, Riau, Sumatera Selatan, Lampung, Belitung, Kalimantan Tengah, Kalimantan Timur, dan Kalimantan Utara.

Name: American Vanguard
Description: American Vanguard Corporation is a global specialty and agricultural products company offering solutions for crop protection, turf and ornamental care, and public and animal health. Operating in 21 countries with over 1,000 product registrations across 56 nations, the company focuses on three key growth areas: Core Business innovation, Green Solutions (with 120+ biorational products), and Precision Agriculture technologies. American Vanguard is listed on the Russell 2000 and 3000 Indexes. Learn more at www.american-vanguard.com.

Name: Vitalforce
Description:
For over two decades, Vitalforce has been dedicated to developing agricultural bioinputs, foliar fertilizers, and innovative solutions for soil nutrition and microbiology.

With scientific expertise and deep respect for the intelligence of the land, the company delivers sustainable technology that strengthens crop productivity and promotes balanced plant growth.

Headquartered in Barretos (Brazil) and present throughout the country, as well as in Paraguay, Uruguay, and Argentina, Vitalforce drives sustainable agriculture through innovation, research, and a genuine commitment to those who cultivate the land.

Part of the Lwart Group — a global reference in environmental solutions and Brazil’s leader in used oil rerefining — Vitalforce shares the same purpose: to innovate responsibly and create sustainable value.

Vitalforce — The living power of nature.

Name: TOYOBO DO BRASIL PRODUTOS BIOLÓGICOS LTDA
Description:
Nossa história começa na cidade de São Paulo em 1955, quando foi inaugurada a primeira unidade Têxtil da Toyobo no Brasil.

A Toyobo sempre teve uma relação forte com os produtores de algodão, sempre em busca das melhores matérias-primas provenientes do Cerrado Brasileiro.

Em 2004 foi criada a divisão de produtos biológicos para a agricultura focado na cotonicultura, para colaborar com os produtores com soluções sustentáveis e eficazes. Esta divisão deu origem à Toyobo do Brasil Produtos Biológicos Ltda. fundada em 2018.

Atualmente, estamos situados nas cidades de Salto, Americana/ Araçoiaba da Serra no Estado de São Paulo.

Name: Notore Plc
Description:
Notore is a vertically integrated agro-allied, chemicals, power and infrastructure company engaged primarily in the production and sale of premium fertilizer products.  

The Notore plant is strategically located at Onne sea port in the Niger Delta region of Nigeria, making our products well positioned for effective shipment and distribution across the Atlantic coast. 

We are committed to helping Nigeria and the African continent become self-reliant in food production and economic wealth. Our operations in recent years have begun to impact positively on agricultural yields while ensuring improved standards of living for the estimated 14 million farming households in Nigeria. 

At Notore our employees are driven by our mission to enhance the quality of life and are committed to delivering excellence to our stakeholders.

Name: Gujrat Pesticides Company - GPC
Description: Super Quality Super Farm, our commitment to superior quality shines through in every aspect of what we do. From our carefully grown crops to our sustainably raised livestock, We take pride in delivery nothing short of perfection. Join us on a journey where quality reigns supreme, and every visit promises an unforgettable experience. Come discover the difference at Super Quality Super Farm today!

Name: Agrivetor
Description:
AGRIVETOR PROVIDES HIGHLY EFFICIENT ANIMAL NUTRITION AND CROP & SOIL HEALTH INPUTS TO REVIVE ANIMAL AND SOIL HEALTH TO IMPROVE QUALITY & PRODUCTION. AGRIVETOR IS THE INDIGENOUS PRODUCER OF GENUINE QUALITY PRODUCTS AT REASONABLE AND AFFORDABLE COST.

OUR MISSION

WE are committed to improving profitability for farmers & Agri Input Business owners through genuine product supply at genuine rates. Farming needs to be more profitable and more sustainable. We are providing genuine quality Agri-Vet Inputs at reasonable rates to help business owners and farmers. Our goal is to improve soil health, plant health, animal health and human health. The "Humus" laden holy topsoil that grows our food is fast diminishing. At our current rate of loss, there is just 30 years worth of topsoil remaining. There is an urgent need for soil restoration initiatives. Under the leadership of a person who was deceived by many, this silent revolution to revert Indian Agriculture to "Organic Farming" is in progress.


ORGANIC FARMING

“ORGANIC FARMING” IS NEITHER MERELY REPLACING THE CHEMICALS WITH ORGANIC MATTER IN IT, NOR IT IS GOING BACK TO TRADITIONAL AGRICULTURE. IT IS THE CONVERSION OF SOIL FROM ‘NON-LIVING’ TO ‘LIVING’." Organic Farming involves an emphasis on achieving maximum health and resilience for soil, plants, livestock, people and the planet. It is a truly holistic strategy with a hard science-based, pragmatic focus, where the endgame involves increasing profitability for growers and nutrition, health and well being for consumers and sustainably for agriculture and our generations to come. Organic Farming is all about what we can do to produce highly nutritious, medicinal food. Organic Farming is a holistic approach for the improvement of our health and well being. It is the sustainable way of nutrient-dense farm food production for the protection and sustenance of all who consume it. Organic Farming is the right option to maximize the profit for all food producers.

Name: COMPO EXPERT Spain SLU
Description:
Un buen socio para una buena cosecha

COMPO EXPERT es una multinacional alemana especializada en la nutrición vegetal en el ámbito de la agricultura profesional, desde donde se proporcionan las soluciones de mayor calidad a nivel mundial. Mediante la combinación de un excelente servicio, gran conocimiento de las necesidades del sector y una completa cartera de productos altamente especializados, ofrecen un valor único para sus clientes.

MARCA LÍDER A NIVEL MUNDIAL
Desde que esta empresa fuera fundada como COMPO GmbH & Co. KG en Münster en el año 1956 y fuera la primera en usar bolsas de plástico respetuosas con el medio ambiente, ha ido evolucionando adaptándose de forma exitosa a las necesidades y requerimientos que tiene un mercado tan exigente como el agrícola. Actualmente nuestras primeras marcas internacionales son: Blaukorn, NovaTec, Floranid Twin, Hakaphos, NovaTec Solub y Basfoliar. COMPO EXPERT opera internacionalmente y es reconocida su posición de líder en fertilizantes especiales para uso profesional. COMPO EXPERT forma parte de Grupa Azoty , líder indiscutible de fertilizantes y del mercado químico en Polonia y uno de sus principales actores en Europa. Se trata del segundo mayor fabricante de fertilizantes nitrogenados y compuestos con sede en la Unión Europea

DESARROLLO COMERCIAL SÓLIDO
Actualmente, COMPO EXPERT vende sus productos en más de 100 países y tiene 20 oficinas repartidas en todo el mundo. La sede central del grupo está en Alemania (COMPO EXPERT GmbH), disponiendo el grupo de 4 centros productivos en Alemania, España, Grecia y Bélgica. Desde la sede localizada en Barcelona, se gestionan el mercado de España, Portugal y África.

Name: IFFCO-MC Crop Science Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Incorporated on August 28, 2015, IFFCO-MC Crop Science Pvt. Ltd. (IFFCO-MC) is a Joint Venture between Indian Farmers Fertilizer Cooperative Limited (IFFCO) and Mitsubishi Corporation, Japan with equity holding in the ratio of 51:49 respectively. The company envisages to enhance farmer income by providing good quality crop protection products at reasonable prices. 

The company operations have expanded to 18 states, covering major agro-climatic zones with more than 7500 channel partners and a comprehensive product basket of 85+ products. IFFCO-MC operates on a Single-Tier Distribution Model with no middle-tier involved, ensuring greater Transparency, Efficiency, and a Farmer-Friendly system offering products at Reasonable Price. The Company also provides free Accidental Insurance cover to farmers through the novel insurance scheme named "Kisan Suraksha Bima Yojana". Farmers purchasing products of a minimum of ₹150 and a maximum of ₹15000 will be eligible under the insurance scheme and the sum insured will vary between a minimum of ₹1,000 and a maximum of ₹1,00,000 depending upon the amount of agrochemical products purchased by the farmer.

Name: Timac AGRO Argentina
Description:
Timac AGRO es una empresa francesa dedicada al desarrollo, elaboración y comercialización de fertilizantes, bioestimulantes y productos para la nutrición animal.

Presente en Argentina desde 1997, Timac AGRO brinda soluciones innovadoras y sostenibles través de sus Asesores Técnicos Comerciales (ATC), presentes en todo el país, que acompañan al productor durante todo el proceso productivo.
Location: Rodríguez de Busto 4086 Piso 2 Oficina 204, Alto Verde, Córdoba

Name: CROP LIFE SCIENCE LIMITED
Description:
CLSL had started as a small scale unit for the Manufacturing of crop protection chemical almost 2 decade ago. By Acquisition, backward and forward integration, CLSL now has become one of the leading manufacturer of wide range of products- Insecticides, Fungicides, Herbicides, Micro Fertilizers, New generation organic Biostimulents & Bio-Fertilizers, Plant Growth Regulators and Soil Plant Health Products.

CLSL believes in the strategy of continuous expansion and development of high value and branded products with thrust on registration and marketing according to customer requirement.

CLSL has manufacturing units located at Ankleshwar in Gujarat. It runs on world class technologies and quality services. Company focused on quality to serve its customers. Each stage of production from raw material to finished product is closely monitored and maintains the standard. Company’s unit certified with International Standard ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2004 for quality assurance.

R & D is Major strength for company and it continues to invest in innovative formulation that are environmental and user friendly. The company is fully committed to maintain and expand its portfolio.

The aim of CLSL is to build strong relationship with customers to understand their needs and deliver real performance in term of usage.

Name: DISAN Agro
Description: En DISAN Agro garantizamos la sostenibilidad social, económica y ambiental.  Somos una compañía que promueve el desarrollo de soluciones innovadoras en el sector Agro en Latinoamérica.

Name: Atlas Agro
Description: Atlas Agro is a global leader in low carbon nitrogen fertilizers, creating a new path to sustainable agriculture. By harnessing green hydrogen and green ammonia, we produce high-quality, cost-effective nitrate fertilizers using only renewable energy, air, and water as our raw materials. Our revolutionary approach is creating a path to the decarbonization of the food and farming industries, decreasing reliance on imports, and creating rural economic development opportunities.

Name: Kwizda Agro
Description:
Kwizda Agro is one of the leading providers of chemical and biological crop protection solutions in Austria and part of the Kwizda corporate group. With 100 years of experience, the company develops innovative active ingredients and produces complex, high-quality formulations at its Leobendorf site. Today, the development of proprietary products is focused on purely biological crop protection – a clear commitment to sustainability that is firmly anchored in the corporate strategy and consistently advanced at the Leobendorf and Tulln sites. Around 460 employees work for Kwizda Agro in Austria, Germany, Italy, Spain, Hungary, Romania, and the USA. Through an international network, the company supports users of crop protection products with digital, data-driven services tailored to local conditions, enabling sustainable plant protection. In this way, Kwizda Agro makes a significant contribution to vital crops in agriculture as well as to healthy gardens as places of recreation.

https://www.kwizda-agro.com

Name: CIAGROPA
Description:
Es una empresa del GRUPO DEKALPAR. Que nace como tal en el año 2009, con su actual nombre, pero la presencia en el mercado comienza en el año 2012. La industria se especializa en formulaciones liquidas: Líquidos Solubles (LS), Emulsiones Concentradas (EC)  y Suspensiones Concentradas o Floables (SC y/o FS).

Esta radicada en el Parque Industrial Avay, de la Ciudad de Villeta a 40 km al sur de Asunción. Cuenta con un staff de mas de 50 personas entre técnicos, operarios y personal superior.

Posee instalaciones y equipos acordes a los requerimientos de una industria de esta categoría.

Name: Grupo Fertica
Description: We are a Central American Group of companies that produce and market synthesized fertilizers, industrial and phytosanitary products with high quality standards, developing solutions and technology to its customers through a technical, personalized service, with integrity and commitment, to ensure sustained success of the group. You can learn more about us and our products / services at www.fertica.com

Name: Cropnosys India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Cropnosys is a crop protection molecule manufacturer that offers a full range of products and custom synthesis to the agrochemical industry. 

Our value-added custom synthesis and efficient processing solutions make us an ideal partner to leading multinational agrochemical companies.

Our head office is located in Bangalore, India; and we have a state-of-the-art multi-purpose plant in Vapi, Gujarat, India, which can undertake multi-step synthesis.

To learn more, visit- www.jtcrop.in

Name: ICL Growing Solutions India
Description:
ICL Growing Solutions is a global leader in plant nutrition. Our experts collaborate with growers, farmers and turf managers around the world to create cutting edge products and solutions that make plants, crops and turfgrass grow better. 

Together, we are paving the way towards a sustainable future. We help you to grow more with less thanks to decades of groundbreaking innovation, research, independent trials, and our expertise in the field.

Name: Four Brothers Group
Description:
Four Brothers Group is a group of industries inspiring modern solutions in agriculture, genetic research & development, telecom, real-estate, and renewable energy. The group is committed to help in growing national economics and changing the overall farming landscape. The pursuit of in-house and international collaborations on research & development entails a wide array of pesticides and seeds of different crops, development, and transformation of genes against pests and diseases. The group believe in the potential of this country and are devoted to leading the market through our innovative product portfolio offerings. 
Four Brothers Group is determined to contribute in Pakistan’s socio-economic landscape through increased agricultural and industrial productivity built on continuous innovation. We are on the course of representing the people of Pakistan as a progressive, innovative, and developed nation. Description:
ABOS is the manufacturer of two revolutionary agricultural products distributed globally: AquaBella and TerraBella. AquaBella is a fast-working bio-enzyme treatment for fresh and salt water that breaks down ammonia and nitrates, as well as regulates nitrogen and phosphates, which results in lower maintenance costs, higher aquaculture yields, and vastly improved water quality. TerraBella is a dynamic blend of naturally occurring microorganisms that increases biological activity and absorption of soil nutrients, which brings about higher yields, accelerates time-to-market, and creates greater soil sustainability. 

We are a green company that cares about the environment and the long-term sustainability of the global food system. Our products are 100% natural and organic. They safely replenish soils and water, promoting healthy ecosystems that lead to extraordinary results.

In addition to working with several vineyards in the Wine Country of Northern California, ABOS has developed markets in medium- and large-scale agriculture on three continents.

AquaBella for Aquariums is our water bio-enzyme treatment packaged and distributed on a small scale for aquariums, which keeps the water in both fresh- and salt-water environments clean for a full year.

Name: ATLANTIC HARVEST
Description:
At Atlantic Harvest, our mission is to provide high-quality natural fertilisers that promote plant and turf growth while being environmentally friendly. We believe in sustainable agriculture and aim to contribute to a healthier planet. Our fertilisers and plant bio-stimulants are organically produced in Ireland. Our products form an intrinsic component of both crop and amenity management programmes and contribute to making plant and turf growth more sustainable. 
They are complementary to the use of other fertiliser products and generate co-action to promote effectiveness since they favour the absorption and transportation of nutrients and strengthen the plant to activate the internal defence systems. 
Atlantic Harvest products can be used from seed germination until the crop is ready to harvest and can be applied in a number of ways depending on the optimal application method based on the development phase. Our bio-stimulants can be applied as a seed treatment, a foliar spray, or in irrigation to allow the plant to activate its metabolism immediately and provide a greater availability of improved nutrients. 
Our Turf Boost Pro product is specifically formulated for application on fine turf  and sports grounds and provides balanced nutrition, promotes healthy turf growth, and enhances the aesthetic appeal of green spaces. With its slow-release formula it ensures consistent nutrient delivery for sustained growth while reducing application frequency. Containing essential nutrients such as nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, magnesium, and calcium, Turf Boost Pro improves turf health, root development, and stress tolerance. It is suitable for year-round use, easy to apply and environmentally sustainable, making it ideal for high-traffic areas and various amenity settings.
As all of our products are chemical free they are safe for use around children and animals.

Name: Diammonium phosphate (DAP) NP 18:46
Description:
Most concentrated phosphate-based fertilizer. It is perfect for any agriculture crop to provide full phosphorus nutrition throughout crop growth and development, as well as a starter dose of nitrogen and low sulphur.
It can be applied in autumn for tilling and in spring during sowing, as well as for pre-sowing cultivation. Dissolving in soil, it provides temporary alkalization of pH of the soil solution around the fertilizer granule, thus stimulating better uptake of phosphorus from the fertilizers on acid soils. Fertilizer’s sulphur also contributes to the better intake of nitrogen and phosphorus by plants.

Description:
Değerli paydaşlarımız;

En iyi bildiğimiz iş olan Tarım, Gıda ve Kimya Sanayi alanlarında faaliyet gösteren şirketimiz Gennotech Tarım Gıda Kimya Sanayi Tic. Ltd. Şti. kendine has tarzı ile fark oluşturmayı hedeflemektedir. 

Hem tüm ülke çapında, hem de yurt dışında da faaliyet gösterecek olan Gennotech, işinin ehli personellerimiz ve partnerlerimizle, kalite ve hizmeti en iyi ve etkili bir şekilde sizlerin hizmetine sunacaktır.

Sahada yaşıyoruz, problemleri biliyoruz, çözümlere odaklanıyoruz. 

İşimizin hakimiyiz, genciz, tecrübeliyiz. Verim ve kalite parametrelerini nasıl yükseltebileceğimiz biliyoruz. 

Bu doğrultuda Gennotech bünyesinde kendi bitki besleme ürünlerimiz başta olmak üzere; biyolojik gruplar, yeni nesil tarım teknolojileri ve daha fazlası bulunacaktır. 

Birim alandaki verimliliği ve kalite parametrelerini arttıracak hedefe yönelik yeni nesil biostümülant ve biyolojik içerikli ürünlerle birlikte, vereceğimiz danışmanlık hizmetlerimizi harmanlayarak ülke tarımına hizmet ve yön vermeye gayret edeceğiz.

Sizlerin de tanıdığı ve bildiği, alanında uzman mesai arkadaşlarımız ile piyasada kimsenin aklında soru işareti kalmayacak şekilde sizlere hizmet sunulmaktadır. 

Özellikle bitki besleme ve bitki gelişim düzenleyici grubu ürünlerimiz; yalnızca bize has reçeteler ile tecrübesi ve uzmanlığı şüphe götürmeyen bir ekibinin mutfağından çıkmaktadır. 

Üretim kapasitesi olarak yıllık 30 milyon litre sıvı ürün üretim kapasitesi ile sadece Türkiye’nin değil bölgenin de en büyük tesislerinde birisi konumunda olacak olan tesisimiz, en son üretim teknolojileri ile tasarlanmıştır.

Yeni nesil üretim modellerinin kullanılacağı üretim proseslerimiz, ithal kalitesini daha uygun maliyetlerde sizlerle buluşturmaktadır.

Yerinde analizler ve işletmelere has özel üretim prosesleriyle vereceğimiz hizmetler, ekim dikim öncesinden, hasada kadarki periyotta ve hatta bazı ürün gruplarında hasat sonrasını da kapsamaktadır. 

Daha iyisi için, Standartları yükselteceğiz.

Name: Maikal Agrosurge India Pvt. Ltd.

Description:
Act Agro Chemicals Pvt. Ltd. is registered company based in Vadodara, Gujarat India since 1995. Our Company is AN ISO 9001: 2015 Certified for Quality Assurance. Description:
Triveni Fertilizers & Chemicals, established in 2006, is one of the leading agriculture groups in India manufacturing Plant Fertilizers and Nutrients, Insecticides, Pesticides and Seeds. We run on a farmer-centric approach.
We see R&D as our core area. Innovation through a vibrant R&D has marked the rise of Triveni Group from a small unit in 2006 to one of the most successful and reputed companies in the Agrochemical Industry today, holding ownership of three different manufacturing units for Fertilizer, Pesticides and Seeds. We have achieved a higher growth in comparatively less amount of time. A strong and vibrant R&D program and expertise in process development has enabled the company to capitalize on superior technology. This has led to the production of cost-effective agrochemicals on a large scale and consequently to a strong, competitive national presence.

With the motto of promoting “progress of the country by the progress of the farmers” through technology and bringing sustainability, the company has stood steadfast by its mission of bringing growth in the lives of all associated with it. Company has a strong belief that bringing growth & prosperity to lives of the farmers will lead in wealth creation for the company as well. We are continuously thriving towards our aim of “higher profit margin at lesser investment with Triveni” by producing cost effective products. We strive to improve the yield and productivity of the crops and hence help the farmer get better price for their produce.

Name: OLIMPUM
Description:
At Olimpum, we aim to shoulder the burden carried by farmers by developing innovative fertilizers that meet the ever-rising standards of both organic and conventional agriculture. Our mission is to help growers achieve higher yields while minimizing costs and reducing environmental impact.

Whether you’re a large-scale producer or a smallholder farmer, we offer tailored crop nutrition programs, cost-effective fertilization formulas, and soil-enhancing solutions designed to maximize productivity and sustainability.

Our formulations are created with a focus on efficiency, ecological sensitivity, and long-term soil health. By constantly improving ourselves and staying committed to transparency and performance, we strive to earn the lasting trust of our customers — and to become a benchmark company that others in the industry aspire to follow.

Growing better, together.

Name: ToBe
Description:
We are dedicated to promote human nutritional security by securing high-quality pollination services for plantation farmers through the innovation of groundbreaking technology, addressing the alarming depletion of the global honey bee population.

We achieve this by employing groundbreaking technology that addresses the critical issue of the global honeybee population crisis.

ToBe has developed the "HiveMaster": The Holistic Solution.
A unique electro-mechanic device that serves the global beekeeping industry, solving a massive problem usually referred to as “CCD” or “Colony Collapse Disorder”.

Our product consists of proprietary software, hardware, and service model, offering a valid and very efficient end-to-end solution to this problem, assisting not only the global beekeeping industry but the entire agriculture sector, all over the globe!

Name: FISSION BIOTECH
Description:
Fission Biotech is a Agri-Input company where every concept has a scientific base. FB is into manufacturing, importing, wholesale and bulk supply of Fertilizers mainly focusing on NPK Fertilizers, Cereal Protein Hydrolysate aka Amino Acids and Gluconic Acid 50%. 
The company also has its own Brand "SAINIK" and is currently available in 4 states in India.

Name: GivLyfe LATAM
Description:
GivLyfe has developed a revolutionary product - a microbial consortium of soil microbes - that can help to improve soil health and increase crop yields. Our unique blend of soil microbes is specially formulated to enhance the soil microbiome, promoting plant growth and resilience. By using our product, farmers can expect to see an increase in nutrient uptake, better water retention, and reduced dependence on chemical fertilizers. Additionally, our microbial consortium can help improve soil structure and reduce erosion, leading to a more sustainable and profitable farm operation.

The microbes in our consortium are carefully selected for their ability to fix atmospheric nitrogen, make essential nutrients such as phosphorus and potassium more available to plants, improve soil structure, and increase the soil's ability to hold water. These beneficial microbes work together to create a symbiotic relationship with the plants, leading to increased nutrient uptake, better water retention, and reduced dependence on chemical fertilizers.

We understand that every farm is unique and has different needs, that's why we offer customized solutions for farmers based on the analysis of their soil. This will help farmers to achieve their goals of increased crop yields, reduced dependence on chemical fertilizers, improved soil structure, and reduced erosion.

In addition to the benefits for the soil and crops, our microbial consortium also has positive impacts on the overall farm ecosystem. By improving soil health, we also improve the habitat for beneficial insects and microorganisms that play important roles in pest management and pollination. This leads to a reduction in the need for chemical pesticides and improved crop yields.

Our product is a game-changer for farmers looking to improve their soil health and crop yields. It will help to increase the efficiency of the farming process and reduce the cost of production, which will ultimately increase profits.

Name: Elpitiya Plantations PLC
Description: Elpitiya Plantations PLC (EPP) is one of Sri Lanka’s most profitable Regional Plantation Companies (RPC) cultivating tea, rubber, oil palm and other crops in 8,800 hectares across 13 estates. With its ambitious management interventions with privatisation in 1997 has enabled EPP to transform from a commodity based business model to a more strategic venture in non-traditional crops, renewable energy, speciality tea and others. After being listed on the Colombo Stock Exchange in 1997, the debt-ridden EPP’s performance and financial position was vulnerable, with accumulated losses amounting to Rs. 305 Mn and the EPP ranked 22nd amongst the 23 plantation companies. Thus with a bold business move Aitken Spence Plantation Managements Limited (ASPM) made the acquisition as the only bidder . After the acquisition the , ASPM made significant investments in stabilising EPP and ensuring its business and social sustainability for the future. This strategic focus included crop and business diversification, factory development, digitalisation, and sustainability thus exceeding financial aspirations and leading to sustainably enabled venture.

Name: AMUFERT SA
Description:
TRANSFORMING AGRICULTURE WITH EXCELLENCE

Name: Rainbow Crops
Description:
Rainbow Crops leverages multiplex genome editing, precision breeding, and AI to engineer crops with the genetic superpower to adapt to climate challenges, reduce chemical inputs, and enhance nutritional value. 

By targeting complex traits and improving multiple characteristics simultaneously, our technology tackles plant traits that have historically been difficult to enhance. 

We partner with seed companies and nonprofits to develop and make these advanced plant genetics accessible, benefiting farmers, consumers, and the environment, while driving sustainability and global food security.

Name: Psaltry International Company Ltd
Description:
Psaltry International Company Limited is the leading agro-allied cassava processing company in Africa. 

We are the first cassava processing company in Africa to produce cassava-based sorbitol and the second in the world. The company was established in 2005 to excel in the cassava value chain by defining a new approach to cassava processing. That enables a consistent supply of high-quality industrial cassava derivatives, including high-quality cassava flour (HQCF), food-grade cassava starch, cassava glucose syrup, and sorbitol, to our clients in the pharmaceutical, personal care, food, and beverages sectors.

Our recently commissioned cassava-based sorbitol factory with a production capacity of 25 tons per day will serve as a raw material in food and beverages production, the production of toothpaste, and confectionery products. The Psaltry cassava-based sorbitol factory is the first cassava-based sorbitol factory in Nigeria, Africa, and the second in the world. • We produce premium quality Garri fortified with vitamin A from yellow cassava. FAO reported that 14.4 million people in Nigeria are facing a food crisis, and indications show it will worsen. Our Garri production is a big step in alleviating food insecurity and making quality and healthy Garri accessible to every household in the country.  • We run an out-grower scheme of 3,500 farmers and 500 youth Agripreneurs.

Name: ECCA - The European Crop Care Association
Description: The European Crop Care Association (ECCA) is the leading advocate for the European post-patent plant protection industry. Primarily comprised of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), ECCA safeguards the interests of the independent European post-patent crop protection sector, actively involved in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of active substances and formulations. ECCA actively engages in consultations on new legislation, guidelines, and policies across Europe, liaising with key stakeholders, governments, and authorities. ECCA is a founding member of AgroCare, the global association for the post patent agrochemical industry

Name: Shri Ram Solvent Extractions

SRSE is a family business based in Kashipur, Uttarakhand that was founded in 1986. Our core business is in Neem-based bio-pesticides and other agricultural inputs. We are the largest manufacturer of Neem-based extracts in India.

Other business verticals include Organic Farming and Frozen Foods. We manufacture frozen vegetables, snacks, breads and curries in our BRCGS, Halal, HACCP and USFDA certified facilities in Kashipur, Uttarakhand.

Name: Glaia
Description:
Glaia develops innovative solutions for sustainable agriculture.
Our mission is to enhance agricultural productivity and reduce the pressure on natural resources by optimising the performance of plants. With an innovative approach to the development of more efficient and sustainable agrochemicals, Glaia’s disruptive technology improves photosynthesis in plants, which is the current bottleneck in food production.

Name: AGRILOGY BIOSCIENCE PVT LTD
Description:
AGRILOGY BIOSCIENCE PVT. LTD. is a science-driven organization established by young, qualified, and dedicated scientists with 18+ years of expertise in organic agriculture and biofertilizer technologies.

We take pride in delivering high-quality products and professional services with an unwavering commitment to purity, Performance, and Trust. Our eco-friendly, biodegradable, non-hazardous, and completely organic solutions empower farmers, gardeners, agri-professionals, freelancers, and nature lovers to practice sustainable and responsible agriculture.

Our Vision: "If you think of farming only happens in spacious fields, think again."

We believe that Agriculture is the backbone of a strong nation in an ever-growing world. Strengthening the agri-sector through chemical-free and sustainable practices is essential for food security, environmental protection, and future prosperity.

With rising awareness about health hazards caused by agrochemicals and increasing demand for safe food, organic agriculture is becoming a global necessity. The sector is growing at an annual rate of 20–25%, reflecting its importance in the modern agri-economy.

Our Mission: To promote natural, safe, and environmentally responsible farming by providing innovative bio-organic solutions that work in harmony with nature and contribute to a healthier planet for future generations.

What We Do: AGRILOGY is a renowned name in the biofertilizer industry, known for delivering reliable and result-oriented bio-organic solutions.

Experts in NANOTECHNOLOGY and lyophilized water-soluble biopesticide and biofertilizer manufacturing.

Our Commitment
1) By keeping nature at the center of our innovation, we aim to:
2) Reduce dependency on harmful chemicals
3) Improve soil health and biodiversity
4) Increase farm profitability
5) Protect environmental resources
6) Support future generations.

Why We
 18+ Years of Scientific Expertise 
 Strong Focus on Research & Quality 
 Farmer-Centric Approach

Name: SANIDAD AGRICOLA ECONEX, S.L.
Description:
SANIDAD AGRÍCOLA ECONEX S.L. es innovación y pasión. Nos dedicamos al biocontrol de insectos mediante la fabricación de una amplia gama de feromonas, atrayentes, repelentes y trampas. Elementos que trabajan de forma conjunta para el tratamiento de plagas que afectan a los cultivos agrícolas, forestales, productos almacenados y sanidad ambiental. 

Ayudar a obtener cosechas de forma sostenible, sin causar daño al medio ni a la salud humana forma parte de nuestro compromiso. Por ello, ofrecemos al mercado más de 450 tipos atrayentes y repelentes, además de más 120 modelos de trampas para insectos. Nuestros productos se utilizan en más de 50 países, convirtiéndonos en un referente internacionales. 

Nuestros clientes buscan en ECONEX su especialización y experiencia de más de 36 años. Producimos y damos asesoramiento técnico a nuestros clientes en todo lo referente a dosis, plagas, estrategias y planes de actuación.
Somos una empresa familiar de base tecnológica, verde, socialmente justa y 100% española. Nace en la mente de su fundador Francisco Martínez Campillo en septiembre de 1985 y en enero de 1986 se constituye como empresa individual. En el año 2000 se transforma en la sociedad limitada actual. Poseemos una tecnología avanzada respaldada por un amplio equipo de expertos profesionales generando confianza y seguridad. 

Desde la especialización y el constante estudio, en ECONEX ponemos a la disposición de nuestros clientes el resultado de muchos años de esfuerzo. INVESTIGAMOS, DESARROLLAMOS, FABRICAMOS y COMERCIALIZAMOS nuestras feromonas y trampas siempre comprometidos con la protección del medio ambiente.

Name: Wester
Description: Welcome to Wester Mineralien, the experts for the production, refinement and recycling of mineral grains. Minerals have been our business for 110 years. The processing of bulk goods, powders, dusts and grains is our speciality. We offer intelligent solutions for abrasion-resistant, scratch-resistant and slip-resistant surface coatings as well as blasting agents, abrasives, and polishing agents.

Name: BioFtech
Description: BioFtech UK Ltd is driving innovation in the fertilizers industry, delivering sustainable solutions to meet global agricultural needs. Known for products like coated Urea, we focus on enhancing nitrogen efficiency, reducing environmental impact, and advancing eco-friendly technologies. Through strategic partnerships and cutting-edge R&D, we aim to transform fertilizer production while supporting sustainable farming practices worldwide. Headquartered in London, we collaborate with industry leaders to shape a greener future for agriculture.

Name: JK for Agricultural Investment
Description: JK Agricultural Investment Company was established in Egypt in 2014. This is to reclaim and cultivate desert lands to be agriculturally productive, in addition to animal production, poultry and fish.JK Company produces various agricultural products whether to local markets or to export to Europe and the Arab countries.

Name: ROL Agri
Description:
ROL was incorporated in the year 1995 with a goal of achieving revolution in the area of agriculture by increasing quantity and improvement in quality of products by manufacturing the agrochemical products in the country. Apart from the fields of Agrochemicals, we do also have our presence in pharmaceuticals, Iron & Steel, surfactants, detergents, and fine chemicals. 

ROL is a leading pesticide manufacturer in India with 500+ employees with our strong footprints in B2B. We’re aiming disrupt the market through our great quality and patented product range and also expand our product mix to seeds and fertilizers.

Name: SeaCarbon
Description:
SeaCarbon is a Brazilian company dedicated to producing seaweed extracts, focusing on the species Kappaphycus alvarezii, known for its biostimulant effects on plants.

Our cultivation takes place in Penha-SC, where we have two mariculture areas legalized by the Ministry of Agriculture (Mapa).

The seaweed extract we produce can be used as a raw material for fertilizers, as well as directly by farmers.

Seaweed contains various nutritional factors and plant metabolism stimulants, in addition to a powerful anti-stress effect. It is a potent tool for mitigating environmental impact. Additionally, seaweed absorbs large amounts of carbon and recycles the organic and mineral matter that humans release into the oceans.

The commercial use of seaweed helps preserve the environment, reduces ocean acidification, and creates protected microenvironments for native marine species.

Name: QualiBasic Seed Company (QBS)
Description:
QualiBasic Seed Company (QBS) produces and supplies quality Foundation Seed to seed companies in East and Southern Africa.

The company is headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya with subsidiaries in Zambia and South Africa.

Achieving high-quality standards such as genetic purity and good germination, over several production cycles, is both a painstaking and expensive process.

QBS achieves this by leveraging economies of scale to support significant investment in production and quality management thereby ensuring timely supply of Foundation Seed to customers.

The company endeavors to supply foundation seed of the highest quality, priced according to the value addition to the client’s business but representing a level of affordability that enhances the availability of certified seed to farmers.

We solve problems and mitigate risk for our clients helping them manage the inherent risk of producing foundation seed that significantly improves the output of their certified seed.

We ensure that our clients will not only reliably meet their certified seed requirement, but also guarantee improved quality and productivity by supplying foundation seed of the highest quality possible.

Name: Tru-brands
Description:
Tru Brands is 100% black owned, consulting company in Agriculture and agro-processing sector. The company would chiefly give special focus in Agriculture as part of redressing the imbalances of the past in the South African economy. The management team is highly qualified and experienced, such as a complete showcase of immeasurable expertise.

We are professional problem solvers. We offer support and solutions to our clients to ensure their business or enterprise is running as efficiently and effectively as possible. Our clients are:
• Farmers.
• Fresh produce processers.
• Growers.
• Landowners.
• Public bodies.
• Agricultural businesses in manufacturing and services.

Name: ADVANTA SEEDS VIETNAM
Description: The future is in our hands and is in our seeds

Name: Deerpoint Group
Description:
Since 1993, Deerpoint Group has been a recognized leader in water treatment solutions for agricultural irrigation. Founded in Fresno, CA, the company's unique approach to providing full-service programs, including on-ranch work and patented delivery systems, set it apart from the start.

Deerpoint Group's innovative solution to preventing plugged drip irrigation systems in California's Central Coast vineyards earned it a reputation as a problem-solver. The company expanded rapidly, serving strawberry fields, leafy greens growers, and eventually all farming areas in California and Arizona.

In 2009, Deerpoint Group expanded its chemical technologies to include innovative fertilizers, micronutrients, and foliar products, leading to explosive growth in precision-fed fertilizers. To accommodate its growing needs, the company relocated to a larger facility in northwest Fresno and later acquired a 12-acre site in Madera, CA, for its main headquarters.
The new facility features 50,000 sq. ft. of office and warehouse space, a chemical blending facility, and a laboratory equipped with specialized analytical equipment. Deerpoint Group has continued to expand its operations, adding a fleet of delivery trucks, a weigh scale, and additional chemical blending and storage facilities.

The company remains committed to sustainability, recycling all materials, and having zero discharge from its facilities. Deerpoint Group's dedication to research and development has led it to the forefront of the industry as a leading manufacturer of high-quality, effectively priced grower-friendly fertilizer solutions. Join them as they continue to innovate and provide top-notch water treatment solutions and fertilizer products to the agricultural industry.

Name: The Fertilisers And Chemicals Travancore Limited
Description:
The Fertilisers And Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT) was incorporated in the year 1943 as the first large-scale fertilizer plant in India at Udyogamandal, Kochi, Kerala. FACT started production in 1947. From a modest beginning, FACT has expanded and diversified into a multi-divisional organisation with varied activities. 
The parent division at Udyogamandal underwent four stages of expansion until the year 1972, upgrading technology and increasing capacity. In the 1960’s, recognising the need for developing indigenous capabilities for design and construction of Chemical and Fertiliser Plants, FACT established an Engineering & Consultancy wing FEDO (FACT Engineering & Design Organisation).  A Fabrication Division FEW (FACT Engineering Works) was also established in 1966.

Another fertilizer unit, Cochin Division was established in two phases at Ambalamedu near the BPCL-Kochi Refineries. Phase-I, with the Ammonia-Urea Complex commissioned in 1973 and Phase-II consisting of Sulphuric Acid, Phosphoric Acid and Complex Fertiliser Plant commissioned during 1976-78.

FACT expanded further with the commissioning of the Petrochemical Division at Udyogamandal for production of Caprolactam during 1990-91 and saw FACT diversify into the then sunrise Petrochemical industry. The new Ammonia Plant was set-up at Udyogamandal at a cost of Rs.638 crore and commissioned during March 1998.

The Authorised Share capital of the Company is ₹ 100 crore equity shares of face value of ₹10/- each (₹.1000 crore). The issued and subscribed Share Capital is ₹.647.07 Crore.

Name: Sipcam Agro Solutions
Description:
Sipcam Agro USA, Inc., the US affiliate of Milan, Italy-based Sipcam Oxon S.p.A., acquired the assets of Waynesboro, Mississippi-based Odom Industries in December 2023,  including plants with formulation, packaging and warehousing.  The company includes an operating facility, in Waynesboro, Mississippi and a large storage warehouse in Shubuta, Mississippi. The combined facilities have over 320,000 square feet of production and warehousing capability, located on 40 acres.  This new business will be operated by Sipcam Agro Solutions, LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of Sipcam Agro USA, Inc.  

Sipcam Agro is back integrated with group partners in numerous active Ingredients (AI’s) globally, with synthesis and formulation plants in a number of countries.  With the USA and Canada targeted as the next growth countries, Sipcam is investing heavily in new solutions for Crop Protection and Turf and Ornamental (T&O) markets to deliver new products to the market and now will have domestic formulation and packaging capabilities.

This acquisition enables Sipcam Agro to be fully integrated from the synthesis through formulation and packaging to make the end use product.  Sipcam will focus on being a high-quality, competitively priced, and reliable supplier of crop protection and Turf and Ornamental products and the acquisition will allow closer partnerships with key customers.

Name: Agreen Biosolutions Srl SB
Description:
Agreen Biosolutions Srl SB is an Italian ag-biotech startup developing fully organic active ingredients for biostimulation and crop protection, helping the transition to more sustainable agriculture.

Our active ingredients are ozonized oils, which are natural vegetable oils where the double bonds of fatty acids are saturated with ozone through our proprietary and specific chemical reaction and reactors. Ozone is the usable natural element with the highest sterilizing and sanitizing capacity (Redox index), through this characteristic we can obtain active ingredients combining the biostimulantion, helping the natural plant defenses, and the biocontrol effect by acting directly against pathogens.

Name: HarvestR
Description:
Our mission is to improve global food security and sustainability by inhibition of fungal pathogens with tailor-made, environmentally friendly, cost-effective bio-fungicides. We do this by treating crops, fruit & vegetables externally with non-GMO, RNAi inducing mechanisms.

Crop loss is between 30-45% from farm to fork, a large part of that is due to fungal pathogens. Chemical use is detrimental to the environment and causes induced resistance. New regulations are reducing maximum residue levels, stricter and removing chemicals from approved lists, leading to lack of tools for farmers to cope with ever growing demand. There is a clear need for effective non-toxic fungicides.

Name: GFA Texas
Description: Grower Freedom Alliance, or GFA Texas, is a member-buying group company for generic ag chemicals. Our members are farmers who purchase generic chemicals for their farms. We have a production site in the Lubbock, Texas, area and will produce ag chemicals for the surrounding area and the panhandle of Texas. GFA Texas is the distribution arm of a partnership between GFA Texas and Vulpes Corp., a chemical manufacturing group. Vulpes' leadership has over 30 years of experience in the lean manufacturing of chemicals and pharmaceuticals. Vulpes has a facility in the Reese Technology Center business and research park west of Lubbock, Texas. This location is the former Reese Air Force Base, and Vulpes is converting the former flight simulator facility of almost 100,000 sq. feet into a chemical manufacturing plant. The partnership’s dual goal is to bring lower prices of 20% to 45% on our chemicals and higher purity to generic chemicals. The vision is to lower farmers’ costs and increase the efficacy of the chemicals farmers purchase. Vulpes plans to produce active ingredients on U.S.A. soil anytime they can bring resiliency to the chemical supply, which is always vulnerable to pandemics, global conflicts, or trade wars. Vulpes will formulate quality-verified active ingredients from others when the situation warrants it and aggressively bring a robust lineup to farmers as soon as possible. It is an exciting time to have an option as a farmer for a currently broken supply chain of ag chemicals.

Name: Global Commodity Distribution GCD
Description:
Suppliers of a superior high-performance deicing product that unleashes brine's melting power while curbing its environmental impact.
Global Commodity Distribution Inc. (GCD) is a vertically integrated company that manufactures and distributes liquid deicing materials and products for anti-icing, deicing, and product treatment. Founded in 2014 and headquartered in Chicago, GCD has a team of experienced professionals with more than 60 years of combined experience in snow and ice management and over 25 years of experience using liquid deicing products for commercial clients. 

Global Commodity Distribution (GCD) manufactures and supplies ECO-SHIELD, a sustainable, eco-friendly, and economical deicing product designed to provide longer-lasting protection from freeze-bond to pavement surfaces and significantly reduce the corrosion rate of traditional sodium chloride (NaCl) brine. Developed with professional snow and ice managers in mind, ECO-SHIELD uses a proprietary blend of carbohydrates and corrosion inhibitors to maximize brine performance.

ECO-SHIELD is a high-performance, odorless, and translucent enhancer that improves the melting capacity of traditional chloride deicers by slowing the ice recrystallization rate as the brine dilutes during and after a snow and ice event. Using industry-proven ingredients, ECO-SHIELD provides snow and ice professionals with a powerful, consistent, reliable, and environmentally responsible deicing product.

Nuestra historia
Creemos firmemente que la sustentabilidad y la rentabilidad no son mutualmente excluyentes. Creada con esto concepto en 2012, Verdesian Life Sciences ofrece a los agricultores soluciones biológicas, nutricionales, tratamiento de semillas y inoculantes que maximizan la performance de cultivos extensivos y de especialidades, además de los céspedes y plantas ornamentales. 
Nuestras tecnologías NUE están diseñadas para proteger el medio ambiente y ayudar a los agricultores a superar lo que siembre han hecho. Nuestros productos aportan nutrientes a las plantas, mejoran su absorción, bioestimulan los metabolismos de las plantas y reducen perdidas al medio ambiente, aumentando así sus rendimientos y maximizando la inversión de los agricultores.

Con sede en Cary, Carolina del Norte, EEUU. Verdesian cuenta con plantas de producción de productos sólidos y líquidos en diferentes partes de los Estados Unidos y hoy sus productos están siendo comercializados en más de 35 países en los 5 continentes.

Para mas informaciones, visite nuestro sitio web en www.vlsci.com

Name: Green Legacy GmbH
Description:
Let's make the world a little bit greener every day!  More green per drop with our super-absorbent cellulose-based agricultural hydrogels.

Heavy rainfall is the enemy of soils and plants. Excess water seeps away and is lost to the roots. As a result, the increasingly long dry phases become a struggle for survival for all crops. Our granules store excess water in the soil and release it when the plants need it. 

Reduce the risk of drought stress for your plants and make your crop production more water efficient with our solutions. 

-----------------

Wir möchten die Welt mit unseren superabsorbierenden Hydrogelen jeden Tag ein bisschen grüner machen!  

Extreme Wetterereignisse wie starke Regenfälle, Hitzewellen und Trockenheit gefährden Böden und Pflanzen. 
Unsere wasserspeichernden Granulate bieten die Lösung: Sie haben die Fähigkeit ein Vielfaches ihres eigenen Gewichts an Wasser und den darin gelösten Nährstoffen aufzunehmen und zu speichern. Wenn das Granulat mit Flüssigkeit in Kontakt kommt, quillt es auf und bildet ein Wasserreservoir, auf das die Pflanze in trockenen Zeiten zugreifen kann und so optimal versorgt ist.

Unsere Granulate sind für die Lebensmittelproduktion zugelassen, umweltfreundlich und komplett abbaubar.

Name: INDORAMA KOKAND FERTILIZERS & CHEMICALS JSC
Description:
Email: <ikf@uz.indorama.com>
Indorama Kokand Fertilizers and Chemicals JSC is one of the oldest fertilizer facility in Uzbekistan & CIS Countries which was established in 1935. The plant was started initially as a bulk blending plant with Technical support from GLAVAZOTA People's Commissariat of Heavy Industry. The initial range of products were organic-fertilizer blends. Thereafter this became a basis for production of mineral fertilizers (superphosphate ammoniated in dried and granulated form) from rock phosphate deposit of "Tashkura" Kyzylkum phosphorite plant in Uzbekistan.

Superphosphate plant was constructed in 1941 to enhance the availability of mineral fertilizers for domestic farming requirements in Uzbekistan. Production capacity of plant was 250,000 MT per annum of ammoniated Single Super Phosphate. In wartime, factory worked to produce defense related products. In January 1942, the plant began to produce explosive dinamon "F". The release of this matter lasted until 1945. The site went through commissioning and de-commissioning of a number of production facilities during its life and currently has active production of ammoniated super single phosphate, medical grade oxygen, paint plant and a fire extinguisher powder plant.

The site currently occupies about 30 ha and is nestled in the centre of the historical city of Kokand, which was the seat of rule for the Kokand Khanate an Uzbek state in Fergana Valley of Central Asia, that existed from 1709-1876 within the territory of eastern Uzbekistan, modern Kyrgyzstan, eastern Tajikistan and south eastern Kazakhstan. 
In the year 2019, the government of Uzbekistan initiated a privatization program under which Indorama Corp. acquired 95.54% of government stake and launched a complete modernization and turnaround program. The plant restarted in the Q1 2021 with a capacity of 350,000 tons of Ammoniated Single Super Phosphate. Additionally, WSF, NPK, SOP & Ammonium Chloride is also being produced.

Name: Organization for the Safety of Abrasives (oSa)
Description:
oSa key facts: 
- Founded in 2000
- Worldwide organization
- Currently (as of August 2025) 51 member companies

Our mission is to establish the highest possible safety level for abrasives with our worldwide member companies. When buying and using abrasives in your company or at home, look out for our oSa logo!

Aim of the oSa is the establishment of a high safety level of abrasives on the basis of the relevant EN Safety Standards worldwide (EN 12413, 13236 and 13743). Highest possible EN safety requirements are in the fundamental interests of the oSa. The oSa itself is not active in the development of these standards.

The oSa is based on the compliance with the EN Safety Standards and a corresponding self-commitment of the oSa members.

The oSa licenses its members to use its trademark. The oSa trademark is almost globally protected. The oSa is no accredited certification institute.

oSa applicants must operate a formal quality management system (ISO 9000 or equivalent) at each of its manufacturing locations, possess all of the necessary test equipment to verify conformance with the standards, possess sufficient design test records, submit samples of products selected by oSa for independent destructive testing, be prepared to undergo a factory inspection conducted by an independent inspector appointed by oSa.

The technical requirements placed on oSa products do not exceed those of the EN-Standards. Additional requirements that oSa imposes on members are related to the availability of test machines and a system of process control.

Besides the Safety Standards, environmental requirements in line with European standards as well as ethical minimum requirements also belong to the required profile of members. The auditors verify the compliance with these requirements on the basis of their observations.

Name: NextGenBioPest
Description:
-Any related posts reflect only the views of the project.-

NextGenBioPest is a Horizon EU project that meets the challenge of increasing crop yields, while reducing the use of chemical pesticides by delivering novel and improved products, methods, and practices for the rational control of the most difficult-to-manage arthropod pests and pathogens, with substantially reduced pesticide use. The project will provide a new toolkit for plant protection in key vegetable and fruit crops including diagnostics for pest and pathogen identification and incrimination, novel Biological Control Agents and methods to augment their performance in the field, RNA-based pesticides, Low Risk/Green chemicals, plant resistance inducers and innovative agronomic and ecological practices. These innovations will be integrated with existing approaches, to achieve effective, environment friendly and sustainable crop protection.

Bitki koruma ürünleri imalatı, satışı ve pazarlaması konusunda faaliyet gösteren bir firmadır. Yakın bir gelecekte de halk sağlığı ve ilaçları imalatı, satışı ve pazarlaması planlanmaktadır.

Kapalı alanlarda üretim tesisleri, herbisit, insektisit, fungisit, Bitki gelişim düzenleyicisi ve sıvı ilaçlar ünitesi, toz ilaçlar ünitesi, depolar, idari ve sosyal binalar ile birlikte kalite ve arge laboratuvarımız bulunmaktadır. Üretim tesislerimizde günümüzün kalite normlarına uygun, dünyada FAO ve  WP, SC, DS , DP, EC, DP, GR, EO, SL, TB, WGD, DF vb. formülasyonlarda İnsektisitler, Herbisitler, Fungisitler, Akarasitler, Bitki Gelişim Düzenleyicileri, Nematositler, Mollussisitler, Defoliantlar, Rodentisitler ve Fumigant gruplarında bitki koruma ürünleri üretimi yapılmaktadır. İşletmenin üretim kapasitesi 12.080 ton/yıl’dır.
TARKİM, Türkiye’nin ekolojik yapısı ve bitkisel üretim çeşitliliğine uygun 176 adet zirai ilacı portföyünde barındırmakta olup, bu konudaki çalışmalarına yoğun bir şekilde devam etmekte ve kısa bir süre içerisinde ürün portföyünü arttırarak tarım sektörüne girdi sağlayan en önemli firmalardan biri olmayı amaçlamaktadır.
Yaygın bir satış ve dağıtım ağına sahip olan Tarkim Bitki Koruma, 7 bölgede bulunan profesyonel personeli ile başta 1625 Tarım Kredi Kooperatifi olmak üzere diğer tarımsal birliklere ve zirai ilaç bayilerine hizmet vermektedir. Türkiye pazarı yanında Mısır, Kıbrıs, İran, Irak, Afganistan, Libya, Azerbeycan, Gürcistan’a ihracat yapmakta ve bir çok ülkede ruhsatlama çalışmalarına devam ederek ihracatta önder firmalardan biri olmayı hedeflemektedir.
