Name: Sector Agriculture
Description:
Tarımsal üretimin maksimum verimlilik seviyesine ulaşmasını sağlamak için çalışıyoruz. Ürün çeşitliliğimizi bölgelere, ürüne ve doğanın tepkilerine göre belirleyerek, çiftçilerin her şartta yüksek verimli sonuçlara ulaşmasını sağlıyoruz.

Bitki besleme ‘’gübre’’ olarak nitelendirdiğimiz ürün ağımız, Dünya standartlarına tam uyumlu. Dünya’da ilk Sector Tarım A.Ş. olarak geliştirdiğimiz ve üretim teknolojimiz olan Biomotiva teknolojisi, motivasyonu yüksek bitkilerin yetiştirilmesi için tüm ürün çeşitliliğimizin gelişim ve üretim alt yapısını oluşturuyor.

Türkiye’de ilk Sector olarak gerçekleştirdiğimiz ‘’Yerinde Analiz’’ programımız sayesinde, çiftçiye özel gübre üretim dönemini başlattık. Tarımsal üretimin ve teknolojilerinin gelişmesi için Dr. Sector Bilim Merkezi’miz 2016 yılında kuruldu ve ülkemizin tüm tarım alanlarında aktif veri analizine başladı.

Dr. Sector Bilim Merkezi’miz, Dünya standartlarında veri analizi, kuluçka ve ürün çeşitliliğini yapılandırma aksiyonlarını tamamlıyor. Tüm ürünlerimizin analiz, keşif, uygulama, üretim, kalite, fiziksel denetimleri bilim merkezimiz tarafından hassasiyetle yürütülüyor. Dr. Sector Bilim Merkezi, profesyonel akademi ekibimiz tarafından yönetilerek, sahada aktif olan ziraat mühendislerimiz ile bilgi bankasını sürekli geliştiriyor.

Üretim ve lojistik kapasitesi yüksek düzeye sahip olan üretim tesisimiz, 20.000 m2 operasyon alanına sahip. Türkiye’nin ilk akıllı tarımsal üretim entegre tesisi olarak, sürekli üretim teknolojilerini güncelliyor ve üretim çözümleri üzerine yatırımları sürdürüyoruz. Üretim parkımız, toz ve sıvı gübreler olmak üzere iki ana kategoride üretim gerçekleştiriyor. Her ürünün periyodik içerik kontrol sistemi ve lisans sistemi ile sıfır risk kalite yönetim politikamız işletiliyor. Ziraat mühendislerimiz ile ülke genelinde veri toplama, analiz, tarımsal risk yönetimi ve sürdürülebilir verim üzerine her yıl projeler gerçekleştiriyor ve uyguluyoruz.

Name: Fomet Spa
Description:
FOMET SpA has manufactured and merchandized special and natural fertilizers for professional agriculture since 1973; it must be remembered, however, that the first experimental tests were started in 1969. The philosophy of processing and developing its own products has always been the application of natural methods and systems in an industrial context.
Methods which today still foresee the controlled withdrawal of organic matrixes from manure, the processing of same with a multi-month monitored desiccation-concentration-humification treatment in environments completely covered and stanched, with the consequential formulation of multiple fertilizing products suitable to satisfy the most varied and difficult needs of the land.
Above approach, which is continually pursued, has offered the possibility of considering the proposal of its own fertilizers as a pure and simple contribution of nutritional units (on the other hand a fundamental aspect for a regular growth and production of crops), without neglecting a more extensive and equally fundamental point with respect to ground fertility. Over the years, therefore, the concept has been amplified and extended in the use of new organic matrixes and manure, maintaining, however, the same guarantee of authenticity.
Indeed, FOMET SpA intends to realize products which give a biological activity to the soil, together with humic components, thereby contrasting the ever-increasing productive decline of soils, their progressive destructuration, together with their growing difficulty in production. 
Over the years, FOMET SpA has acquired a consolidated technical experience of support with respect to the use of its fertilizers; it organizes meetings for both diffusion and demonstration purposes, together with guided visits c/o its plants. It collaborates with various research institutes for the development of its own products. Training is carried out through schools and groups of technicians.

Results show that there has been a significant increase in plant growth and thus benefits farmers by reducing the agri input cost which helps in doubling farmer’s income.

Name: Tej Agrotech India Pvt. Ltd
Description: Tej Agrotech, a subsidiary of the diversified Tej Group, has been at the forefront of the agricultural industry for the past 7 years. We offer result-oriented products that tackle the diverse challenges faced by farmers. Our commitment extends beyond products, with free online consultancy and a dedicated field team to ensure every farmer receives the support they need. At Tej Agrotech, we are dedicated to empowering farmers and helping them succeed in every aspect of their agricultural journey.

Description:
ECOMAN BIOTECH is a Beijing based Agritech company with 15+ years of experience in the field of fruit fly control and over a decade of experience in developing automated monitoring and reporting systems for pests. 

Our bestseller Great Fruit Fly Bait (GFFB) product developed based on the attract and kill technology for fruit fly control attracts both male and female fruit flies. It has been applied in more than 260,000 hectares globally over a decade, saving growers 20 million USD in losses, by lowering the fruit damage rate to <2%. 

Ecoman Biotech is a reliable B2B agriculture input supplier offering effective high quality products at the most competitive rate to companies worldwide.

Name: Turkuvaz Organik Gübre San.ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
Ülkemizde Yarasa Gübresi nin geçmişi çok yeni. Turkuvaz, sektör kurucu rol üstlenerek yarasa gübresi işleme tesisi kurmak amacıyla ruhsatlı ham yarasa gübresi rezervlerini sözleşmeler yaparak bünyesine katmaktadır.

Şirket olarak amacımız yarasa gübresi gibi değerli bir gübrenin faydalarını ülkemiz üreticisine anlatmak ve  bilinçlendirmektir.

Turkuvaz Gübre olarak Sosyal sorumluluklarımız ve duyarlılıklarımız var..

Turkuvaz Yarasa Gübresi Ltd. Şti. olarak biz, kazancımızı sadece şirket yatırımı ve hissedarlarımıza kâr dağıtımı bakış açısıyla üretim ve ticaret yapmıyoruz. Ülkemizin birçok sorununa duyarlılıkla destek vermek üzere, sosyal sorumluluk alanına giren her samimi ihtiyaca ve her yeni projeye destekçiyiz.

Yarasa Gübresi başta olmak üzere, tüm organik gübreler konusunda Türkiye'nin ihtiyacını karşılamak, dünyaya da ihraç etmek üzere tesisler kurmak üzere projelerimizi planlamakta, hayata geçirmek üzere çalışmalar yapmaktayız.

Türkiye'de çok ciddi bir Yarasa Gübresi potansiyeli var. Bu potansiyeli doğru ve etkin değerlendirmek gerekiyor. Bu potansiyel etkin kullanılmazsa, ülkemizin bu değerli kaynağı yanlış ve kötü yönetilerek ziyan edilmiş olur. Bizim projelerimiz, mevcut yarasa gübrelerinin doğru ve yasal şekilde toplanması ve değerlendirilmesi ile bu kaynağın başta Türk çiftçisi olmak üzere organik gübre kullanmak isteyen ve buna ihtiyaç duyan herkesin uygun fiyatla ürünü temin etmesi yönünde zincirin halkalarını oluşturmak üzere planlanmaktadır.

Bu bağlamda tüketiciye en uygun fiyatla ürünü sunabilmek üzere hammadde temini, üretim ve pazarlama süreçlerini iyileştirmek için sektörde uzman akademisyenlerle konuyu sürekli istişare ederek projelerimizi planlamaktayız.

Projelerimizle ilgili bilgi edinmek isteyen ziyaretçilerimiz, bizimle iletişim linkimiz üzerinden temasa geçebilirler.

Name: Huma
Description:
Inspired by one of earth’s most precious resources, humus, we harness the power of ancient sunlight to vitalize life in the soil, crops and water. Formerly known as Bio Huma Netics, we have united our company name and all our brands under Huma: a name that reflects both the power and nurture of Mother Nature.

Through company-owned humate mining rights, we source raw materials to create our extensive range of liquid, dry and water soluble humic-based products that stimulate beneficial microbial activity to empower you with premium crops, healthy soil, and clean water. We also process those raw materials to create our proprietary Micro Carbon Technology—a unique blend of extremely small carbon-and oxygen-rich organic molecules. This breakthrough technology is the core ingredient that powers all our liquid nutrients and sets us apart.

Name: Nano-Yield
Description:
Aqua-Yield is a nanoliquid technology company for agriculture production. Our nanoliquid delivery system and inputs help growers sustainably grow their profits by solving their plant uptake problems. Growers can add NanoShield, our nanoliquid encapsulation and delivery system, to their tanks and yield better-quality, faster-growing crops and healthier soils with less cost and inputs. They can also apply our pre-mixed nano-liquid fertilizers to give plants instant access to the nutrition and protection they need to thrive. Specialty and commodity growers nationwide have proven that both options work on their own fields. Whatever you grow, your program will perform better with our products.  For more information, visit aquayield.com.

Advance Agrolife Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of technical and formulation-grade agrochemicals, committed to empowering farmers with innovative crop protection solutions. Established in 2002 by the visionary Late Mr. Hanuman Sahai Ji, the company was founded with a passion to revolutionize the agri-input industry and support hardworking farmers. Since its inception, Advance Agrolife has evolved into a globally respected name known for delivering high-quality agrochemical products.

Ne mândrim cu o abordare bazată pe știință și expertiză agronomică, dar și cu un angajament real față de agricultura sustenabilă. Soluțiile noastre nu doar cresc productivitatea, ci ajută fermierii să gestioneze mai bine stresul abiotic, să protejeze solul și să reducă risipa de nutrienți. Pentru Aectra, fiecare produs înseamnă o promisiune: recolte sănătoase, câmpuri fertile și fermieri încrezători în alegerile lor. Name: Norton Abrasives D-A-CH
Description: For more than 130 years, Norton has been a synonym for high-quality, innovative grinding solutions. We offer professional users solutions that improve the safety of their workforce, protect the environment and deliver impressive quality, process stability and cost-efficiency. We are constantly working on new products to improve operating conditions and to make it easier and better to carry out tasks. From reducing processing times, dust or noise and overall costs by increasing the output of parts ground to ergonomic improvements for user-friendly grinding. And because we analyse each customer's application in detail, you can be sure that we will find an individual solution for your specific application. As a Saint-Gobain brand, Norton offers the widest range of grinding, cutting, finishing and polishing solutions for all markets, materials, and applications with the most advanced and cost-effective technologies. Our grinding solutions are used in almost all areas of daily life. Depending on how your needs evolve, Saint-Gobain's global expertise enables us to develop and deliver the products that make a difference to your grinding requirements. We ensure that our solutions are particularly sustainable in production and application. We have the necessary expertise on site: 61 production sites, 8 competence centres, 4 sanding technology centres and 3 research & development / innovation centres are spread around the globe. We are proud to be so strongly represented. With almost 11,000 employees across 79 countries, we are a globally active company - which is why we are also close to you. We look forward to meeting you and working with you to find the optimum solution for your requirements and processes. That is what "Making the world a better home" means to us.

Name: Cultiva
Description:
Cultiva is the leading provider of plant cuticle care, helping growers protect high-value crops like cherries, grapes, apples and blueberries. We introduced cuticle care as a new concept in plant health and continue to advance our proprietary SureSeal technology to develop innovative solutions that provide agronomic value to growers worldwide. 

Built on SureSeal technology, our portfolio of plant health solutions helps crops thrive under environmental stress. Parka  is a proven cuticle supplement that enhances the fruit and leaf cuticle, providing season-long protection against environmental stressors to enhance fruit quality and marketable yields. Kallur , our advanced harvest aid, improves harvest productivity and fruit color to help growers achieve optimal fruit coloring without sacrificing quality.

Name: Cebo International
Description:
Cebo International is the Holding Company of our three operating subsidiaries: Cebo Holland, Cebo UK and Cebo Marine. For more than 40 years, Cebo International has operated in a number of industries including: Energy, Performance Minerals, Construction and Agriculture, offering various services and supplies. Each of our strategically-located sites in Ijmuiden and across the UK specialise in job-specific operations and projects. 

In IJmuiden, Cebo Holland operates our: main production facility, mineral processing plant, supply base with mud plant, silo storage plant and distribution facility. As a leading supplier of minerals, Cebo Holland imports large quantities of raw material such as Bentonite and Barite from mines across the world. The raw material is milled or sieved in our facilities, boasting a production capacity of more than 250,000 metric tons per year. We are globally renowned for our minerals supply, having created partnerships with industry leaders in over 50 countries worldwide.

Cebo UK supplies products and services from different bases (Great Yarmouth, Aberdeen & Peterhead) primarily to the Oil and Gas industry in the North Sea. We manufacture and stock a range of products, specialising in the supply of cements and drilling fluids to the Energy sector. Additionally, we are a leading distributor of Baroid IDP and FANN laboratory equipment; fundamental to the testing of drilling fluids, completion fluids, fracturing fluids, oilfield cements, and industrial slurries. Our expertise extends to fluid power projects involving FPSO export hose change out servicing and supply. We offer bulk-storage solutions across the country in our impressive silo plants – available for rent. 

Cebo Marine specifically operates dry-bulk vessels, which supply different minerals to our customers in the North Sea region.

Description:
FertigHy, a pan European company founded by EIT InnoEnergy, RIC Energy, MAIRE, Siemens Financial Services, InVivo and HEINEKEN, will pioneer the low-carbon transition of the European fertiliser industry. FertigHy aims to produce affordable and low-carbon fertilisers for European farmers, answering directly to the recent challenges of the EU and global food security due to supply chain disruption and global uncertainties in natural gas supply.

FertigHy, which plans to build and operate several large-scale low-carbon fertiliser projects, will build, own and operate the first plants in France and Spain, and replicate it in other European countries. The plants will produce 500.000 metric tonnes per year of low-carbon nitrogen-based fertilisers with construction planned to start in 2027.

Name: Eden Research plc
Description:
Eden Research plc

Like humans and animals, plants have developed defences against disease, pests and various other threats. Essential oils are one component of these defence systems and these oils contain active molecules that help fight against disease, oxidative stress and insect predators. Eden has developed a technology which encapsulates these active molecules in microplastic-free particles that slow their release over a period of days ensuring better levels of control and improving the efficacy of products for the plant protection, consumer products and animal health markets.

Eden Research plc is an AIM-listed public company with intellectual property and expertise in microencapsulation and sustainable chemistry.

Based near Oxford in the UK, we are developing natural solutions to agricultural, animal, human health and industrial problems, with our primary focus being the use of sustainable chemistry to create an exciting array of low-risk but effective agricultural chemicals.

Eden's products take advantage of the biocidal efficacy of naturally occurring chemicals produced by plant defence mechanisms and, in particular, the antimicrobial properties of terpenes. Terpenes are naturally occurring, low-toxicity botanical substances produced by most plants as part of their defence mechanisms.

The initial Eden approach has involved the use of GRAS substances, that is, compounds 'Generally Recognised As Safe' for human consumption or application to food crops.

Name: Fertilizer Academy
Description:
Fertilizer Academy is the premier online training platform for the fertilizer industry.

We provide a comprehensive end-to-end training solution for operators at ammonia and urea plants, ranging from new hires to supervisory levels. Our mission is to leverage industry experience to prevent operational errors and avoid process incidents.

Our courses are developed by an independent group of senior specialists who possess deep expertise in the operation and maintenance of ammonia, urea, nitric acid, and ammonium nitrate plants. The curriculum spans key topics such as Ammonia and Urea Plant Operation, Process Safety, Incident Analysis and Case Studies, Corrosion and Material Selection, High-Pressure Equipment, among others.

Customized training courses are available for fertilizer companies upon request. Additionally, we offer our programs in multiple languages to ensure global accessibility for all operators and engineers.

Name: PRECOFERT EU
Description:
With over 30 years of scientific research, supported by approvals and trials in Europe and the Middle East, PRECOFERT implements a unique and innovative method to extract humic acids and humates without the use of chemicals, solvents, or recycled components. The process maintains the original properties and quality of low-moor peat and sapropel, resulting in the production of effective liquid concentrates - PRECOGROW and PRECOCARE - which provide an optimal balance of humic and fulvic acids, as well as other essential nutrients.

The components are sourced from clean and natural locations, such as mountain lakes and pristine deposits, far from any industrial or urban pollution, with careful consideration of the environment. Technologies for each product are developed with a focus on maximizing raw material utilization and zero-waste production. The Need
Fungus and Bacteria that contaminate the cannabis buds are harmful to the human body.
Bud Rot is the Most devastating problem to Cannabis growers and leads to vast crop Disposal due to non-compliance with regulation. 

Current Solutions for Fighting Bud Rot : 
•	Crop Disposal
•	Disinfection by Gamma/E-beam.
•	Biological pest control
Gamma and E-beam are currently in use by only a handful of growers around the world, because they are not in-house, they are logistically complicated and are expensive; Gamma is also subject to a lot of criticism on side-effects and damage to the flower properties-cannabinoids and terpens.
Biological pest control as well, is not very effective.


Our Products: The NovaGreen 
The device is placed in the grower site and is operated by the site staff. 
It is safe and easy to operate by trained grower.
The device footprint is similar to a laundry machine and is capable of processing 3 kg in a cycle.

By focusing on enhancing crop efficiency, resilience, and sustainability, we empower farmers to achieve higher yields and improve their agricultural practices, while reducing environmental impact.

Our portfolio of cutting-edge products includes:

- **ComCat**: A patented natural plant activator that boosts crop resilience and productivity. ComCat works to stimulate plant growth by enhancing the plant’s natural defense mechanisms, resulting in better resistance to stress factors such as drought, pests, and diseases.
  
- **Anngro**: A patented nano-transport vesicle designed to optimize nutrient uptake, ensuring plants get the maximum benefit from fertilizers. Anngro enhances the efficacy of plant protection chemicals and promotes healthier, more robust plant growth.
  
- **Cibusil**: A silicon-based solution that strengthens plant cell walls, making them more resistant to environmental stresses. Cibusil supports the long-term health of crops by improving their structural integrity.

At **Agraforum A.Ş.**, we are committed to empowering agricultural businesses with innovative products that improve efficiency, productivity, and sustainability. Our focus is not only on providing high-quality agricultural inputs but also on supporting farmers in adopting sustainable practices that will benefit both their yields and the environment.

Name: EcoFertiS
Description:
The EcoFertiS project addresses the urgent need for sustainable agriculture by focusing on waste management and soil fertilization. Its objective is to transform agricultural and animal waste into ecological fertilizers, thus improving the quality and productivity of soil while being more respectful of the environment.

Modern agriculture often relies on chemical fertilizers, which can harm soil health and reduce crop quality. in addition, agricultural waste and manure are often poorly managed. 

EcoFertiS uses a circular economy approach to convert waste into valuable biocompost and natural fertilizer. By employing advanced processing methods, these materials become organic matter that enriches soil health. The project also produces biogas, offering renewable energy to power farms, leading to a self-sustaining and environmentally friendly agricultural model.

The EcoFertiS project brings numerous benefits: better soil structure, better water retention and increased fertility. Over time, this will increase agricultural yields while reducing reliance on chemical fertilizers. Additionally, using waste to create renewable energy helps farms become more resilient and self-sufficient.

With the support of partners from around the Mediterranean, EcoFertiS aims to transform agricultural waste management and soil fertilization practices. The project combines innovation, ecology and sustainability to meet the agricultural challenges of the 21st century.

Name: Citadel Environmental Solutions (UK)
Description:
CITADEL ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS UK LTD is the owner of a unique technology called Biocat+.  Biocat+ is a stimulant technology which promotes the natural biological control and enhancement mechanism inherent in all microbial biosystems.  Producing Biocat+ involves a new concept of using naturally produced "Phages" which target and selectively kill harmful bacteria within the soil.  The phages lay dormant once applied to the soil and only act if there is an imbalance in the existing bacteria to correct the imbalance and provide the optimum growing conditions.  Trials have indicated the ability of Biocat+ to increase nutrient use efficiency and disease resistance resulting in improved yield and shelf life. 
Biocat+ provides a sustainable, environmentally friendly and organic product, commercially available to all sectors, that will enhance productivity and profitability.
The application of Biocat+ increases yield and quality in crops and offers health benefits to livestock.  Biocat+ reduces the need of pesticides, avoids antimicrobials, and offers increased efficiency in bioenergy.

Biocat+ technology captures and cultivates phages from different ecological backgrounds.  This unique combination of bacteriophages, archaeaphages and mycophages creates a diverse and overlapping cocktail of organisms capable of a multi directional approach to overcome problematic pathogens.

Name: Food Miles Lab
Description:
Our Mission:
Our core mission is to establish a Circular Economy in agriculture, turning waste into wealth. We recycle oyster shell waste to create high-quality, organic fertilizers and an advanced sunburn prevention solution for crops. We aim to deliver value to specialty crops, fruit trees, and organic producers while significantly reducing environmental impact.

Innovations:
Sustainable Source: We transform discarded oyster shells, a significant food waste item, into a calcium carbonate-based liquid sunburn prevention agent.
Advanced Technology: Our unique formulation integrates seaweed alginate, triggering a sunlight-activated cross-linking reaction that reduces the need for multiple applications.
Zero Residue: We prioritize aesthetics, ensuring our product leaves no residue, unlike conventional solutions.

Research & Development:
Collaborations with leading agriculture experts in Long Island, NY, and Napa Valley, CA.
Continuous engagement with Cornell's agricultural and life sciences field for technological validation.
A strong focus on data interpretation, experimental design, and application of scientific evidence to product development.

Sustainability:
Actively reducing carbon footprint through upcycling waste material.
Committed to creating environmentally responsible products with a long-term focus on sustainability.

Let's Connect:
We invite farmers, investors, sustainability advocates, and industry experts to join us on this journey. Let's work together to create a more sustainable and efficient agricultural landscape.

In 2018 we set out to introduce our powerful humate formulas to the agriculture industry, as a compliment to existing commercial fertilizing programs as a means to increase performance, reduce costs and environmental waste, and to improve the quality and quantity of yield outputs by harnessing what nature provides in the way of humates.

The two most active components in healthy soil are humic and fulvic acids, and these humate derived organic acids have been shown to provide remarkable benefit to all living organisms. Studies have published results ranging from stabilizing beneficial bacteria, increasing nutrient absorption to plants, and restoring organic matter to the soil.

 BOOST ROOTS

Whether you grow in soil, soilless, hydroponic, or aeroponic systems, QUAD.AG products adapt easily into your existing program allowing for a smooth transition to reap an immediate boost on your first crop with Quad.

Our quality

At the core of products’ choices there is a careful selection that starts with the evaluation of their quality and the results from fields’ tests. Thanks to a collaboration with research centers for innovation in Europe and in the Usa.

We deeply believe that in order to supply solid answers to our clients, it’s necessary to always be updated with the latest news in the field. For this reason, we work together with the most important research centers in Europe and in the USA.
Unmaco technicians wish not only to develop new efficient solutions, but also wants these to be more and more environmentally friendly without forgetting about high quality. Quality and sustainability are therefore essential elements in our work.

Name: Merkato

INSUMOS QUÍMICOS INDUSTRIAIS

A Merkato Brasil dispões de uma ampla linha de produtos químicos, para as mais diversas áreas do segmento industrial, como alimentícia, petróleo e petroquímica, fundição, siderurgia, papel e celulose, mineração, álcool e açúcar e outras.

Os produtos comercializados pela Merkato Brasil são imprescindíveis para essas indústrias, visando a base, otimização e qualidade de seus processos, melhorando assim a competitividade de forma qualitativa e quantitativa.

NUTRIÇÃO VEGETAL

Atuando no mercado de nutrição vegetal, os produtos comercializados pela Merkato Brasil são da mais alta tecnologia, desenvolvidos através de muitas pesquisas, testes em laboratório e campo. A avaliação final constata um ganho na qualidade e quantidade da produção, indicando que a nutrição vegetal é eficiente e necessária para acompanhar um mercado extremamente competitivo.

Nessa área de nutrição vegetal, a Merkato Brasil fornece nutrientes para aplicação no solo, folhas, irrigação e tratamento de sementes, auxiliando nas plantações das mais variedades espécies, sejam jardins, plantações para consumo ou florestas, ampliando comprovadamente os resultados.

NUTRIÇÃO ANIMAL

Num mercado sempre crescente e concorrido da criação animal, a alimentação é a base de todo processo da bovinocultura de corte e leite, avicultura, suinocultura e outras, influenciando desde a reprodução até na qualidade final dos produtos envolvidos, como a carne, leite e seus derivados.

TRATAMENTO DE ÁGUA E ESGOTO

Sendo a água e esgoto um dos maiores problemas do século, a tecnologia empregada nessas áreas deve ser de ponta, da mais alta qualidade, utilizando muita pesquisa e testes. A Merkato Brasil comercializa os melhores produtos para esse segmento, fazendo com que todos os processos tenham o melhor resultado possível.

A Merkato Brasil oferece uma diversificada linha de produtos para todas as etapas do tratamento de água e esgoto, garantindo a melhor qualidade e confiabilidade.

Name: Karbosan France
Description:
Premier fabricant de produits abrasifs en Türkiye, Karbosan a débuté ses activités de production en 1967 avec 40 employés dans son usine établie sur une surface de 9 000 m² à Halkalı, Istanbul.

Aujourd’hui, avec plus de 700 employés et plus de 95 000 m² de surface couverte dans ses usines de Halkalı (Istanbul) et de Çerkezköy (Tekirdağ), Karbosan propose ses produits de haute qualité, fiables et performants dans plus de 90 pays répartis sur 6 continents.

Grâce à ses investissements continus dans l’innovation et la R&D, Karbosan connaît une croissance rapide et offre une large gamme de produits conçus pour obtenir des surfaces parfaites.

Avec près de 60 ans d’expérience dans la production d’abrasifs de haute qualité, Karbosan a bâti l’ensemble de ses processus – de l’approvisionnement en matières premières aux services après-vente – sur la satisfaction des besoins et des attentes de ses clients avec une performance supérieure.

Karbosan est la première entreprise du secteur des abrasifs en Türkiye à avoir mis en œuvre le Système de Management de la Qualité ISO 9001. Grâce à ses standards de production élevés, elle est devenue membre de la Fédération Européenne des Producteurs d’Abrasifs (FEPA) ainsi que de l’Organisation pour la Sécurité des Abrasifs (oSa).

La qualité des produits Karbosan est certifiée par l’Institut Turc de Normalisation avec les normes TS EN 12413 pour les meules abrasives et TS EN 13743 pour les abrasifs appliqués.

Karbosan réalise ses processus de production conformément aux normes ISO 14001 Système de management environnemental et ISO 50001 Système de management de l’énergie, en tenant compte des impacts environnementaux et de l’efficacité énergétique à chaque étape, depuis les matières premières jusqu’à la livraison au client, dans un esprit de responsabilité envers la nature.

Name: PhytoAR Biotechnologie GmbH
Description:
PhytoAR patented its first plant growth technology, by using Phytoinitiators. This compounds include Phytoinitiator-mRNAs selected from a new born chloroplast in a germinating seed and initiate, stimulate and control specific physiological responses or processes within the plants themselves. They play various roles in plant growth, development, defence mechanisms and responses to environmental stimuli. Therefor Phytoinitiators induce plant hormones like auxins, cytokinins, gibberellins, abscisic acid and ethylene, as well as important enzymes and signalling molecules or secondary metabolites produced by plant seedlings. The focus of this new technology is on Primary Stress Reduction (PSR) processes to create stability, enhancing plant growth in harmony with traditional elements, thereby reinforcing the overall effectiveness of growth factors in agriculture. 
Understanding this new compound, the Phytoinitiators, is crucial for agricultural practices, plant biology research and developing strategies for crop improvement and protection.

Email: lori@mill-marketing.com

-----
About the GINSENG BOARD OF WISCONSIN
 The Ginseng Board of Wisconsin (GBW) was established in 1986 as a nonprofit organization representing all Wisconsin Ginseng growers. There are more than 150 ginseng growers in the central region of the state.
 The GBW functions under a marketing order managed by the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade & Consumer Protection. The board’s purpose is research, national and international marketing, new product development, and education.

-----
WHAT IS WISCONSIN AMERICAN GINSENG?  
 The American Ginseng root, which is cultivated (and also grows wild) in Wisconsin, is known to have many health benefits and has been an important herb in both Native American and ancient Chinese medicine.
 The taste of American Ginseng depends on where it is grown. Wisconsin-grown American Ginseng is famous all over the world for its boldly bitter and aromatic qualities.
 If you like black coffee, dark chocolate, arugula, or grapefruit, odds are you’ll be a fan. American Ginseng grown in other regions is often more affordable, but lacks the flavor and nutrients found only in authentic Wisconsin Ginseng.

Name: Guangdong Academy of Agricultural Sciences
Description:
The Guangdong Academy of Agricultural Sciences (GDAAS) is a prominent research institution in China that focuses on agricultural science and technology. Located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, it plays a crucial role in advancing agricultural innovation and promoting sustainable practices in the region. Here are some key aspects of GDAAS:

Overview
Founded: 1958
Location: Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, China
Focus Areas: Research, development, and application of agricultural science and technology.

Core Functions
Scientific Research: Conducts studies in crop science, animal husbandry, soil and water conservation, plant protection, agricultural biotechnology, and food safety.
Technological Innovation: Develops advanced agricultural technologies, including modern farming techniques, pest control methods, and genetic improvement of crops and livestock.
Extension Services: Provides technical guidance and services to farmers, agricultural enterprises, and policymakers in Guangdong and beyond.
International Collaboration: Engages in cooperative research and exchange programs with international institutions to address global agricultural challenges.

Contributions
GDAAS has significantly contributed to enhancing agricultural productivity in China, particularly in the subtropical and tropical regions of Guangdong Province.
It supports rural development and promotes sustainable agricultural practices, aligning with China's national strategies for food security and environmental protection.

Global Recognition
GDAAS collaborates with leading agricultural institutions worldwide, fostering advancements in agricultural research and technology transfer.

تنتج الشركة الأسمدة المتخصصة عالية الجودة والمنشطات الحيوية في مصنعي الأسمدة الخاصين بها في كريفيلد (ألمانيا) و في لا فال دي شو (إسبانيا) ، مما يوفر للمستخدمين المحترفين حلولاً ذكية لتغذية أشجار الفاكهة والخضروات والمحاصيل الحقلية والمسطحات الخضراء الرياضية والحدائق العامة وكذلك المشاتل ونباتات الزينة.

تشمل مجموعة منتجاتنا المبتكرة الأسمدة المعدنية والمثبطة المتخصصة والأسمدة بطيئة التحرر والأسمدة السائلة والقابلة للذوبان في الماء بالإضافة إلى المحفزات الحيوية والعناصر الصغرى ومحسنات التربة. مع مجموعة المنتجات هذه ، تحتل COMPO EXPERT مكانة رائدة في السوق العالمية.

كومبو إكسبرت هي احدى الشركات التابعه ل Grupa Azoty S.A. حيث يعمل بها مع ما يقرب من 15000 موظف. إنها أكبر شركة كيماويات في بولندا وثاني أكبر منتج للنيتروجين والأسمدة المعقدة في الاتحاد الأوروبي. www.grupaazoty.com.


في مركز COMPO EXPERT للبحوث والتطوير ، تتم متابعة تحسين الجودة وتطوير المنتجات المبتكرة باستمرار بالتعاون مع معاهد الابحاث والجامعات الرائدة حول العالم. منذ عام 2009 ، يقوم مركز البحث والتطوير الخاص بـ COMPO EXPERT في مونستر - المانيا بتنسيق أنشطة البحث والتطوير في جميع أنحاء العالم في أكثر من 25 دولة.

Name: Primary Ocean
Description:
Primary Ocean develops macro-algae (kelp/seaweed) cultivation and processing systems to help heal our oceans, soils, and atmosphere.

Seaweed is one of the oldest, most renewable, and regenerative biomass resources on Earth. When cultivated, it can draw down Carbon up to 14% faster than tropical rainforests, mitigate ocean acidification, and anchor ecosystems through primary production and habitat creation. When processed, seaweed products can offset major petrochemical pollutants including fossil fuels, plastics, and agrochemicals. 

Primary Ocean’s first commercial product is an incredibly effective crop input called a liquid seaweed extract. Primary's agricultural products allow the farmer to reduce water, fertilizer and pesticide requirements, regenerate eroded soils and greatly improve farmers' crop yields, quality, and profits in both conventional and organic farming systems.

Conheça um pouco mais das nossas soluções:

- Microencapsulamento de microrganismos e seus metabólitos aplicados ao controle biológico e tratamento de sementes.

- Microencapsulamento de aditivos para nutrição animal (feed).

Desenvolvemos soluções microencapsuladas personalizadas para sua necessidade.
Entre em contato!

Name: Zenith Crop Sciences Indonesia
Description:
Zenith Cropsciences Indonesia adalah bagian dari Agria-Group, produsen dan distributor terkemuka dalam industri perlindungan tanaman yang telah beroperasi sejak 1932. Sebagai perusahaan yang berdiri di Bulgaria, Agria dikenal luas sebagai pionir dalam industri ini, melayani pasar global dengan reputasi yang solid di kalangan produsen dan pengguna.

Grup kami mencakup perusahaan-perusahaan terkemuka di Bulgaria seperti Zenith Crop Sciences, Unipest Control, dan Campo 2007, serta sejumlah anak perusahaan di seluruh dunia. Produk-produk unggulan kami, termasuk Zineb, Manncozeb, Maneb, Zyram, Propamocarb, Cymoxanil, dan Diflubenzuron, diproduksi secara langsung di pabrik kami di Bulgaria dengan kapasitas tahunan sekitar 10.000 ton.

Dengan pengalaman lebih dari 50 tahun dalam produksi Dithiocarbamates, kami memproduksi berbagai formulasi mulai dari serbuk, granul, suspensi, hingga konsentrat emulsi. Teknologi kami yang modern dan otomatis memastikan kualitas konsisten dari sintesis hingga pengemasan akhir, dengan mesin-mesin buatan produsen Eropa terkemuka.

Kualitas adalah prioritas utama kami. Setiap tahap produksi, mulai dari bahan baku hingga produk akhir, diperiksa secara ketat di laboratorium modern kami. Agria terakreditasi dengan standar ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 18001, dan ISO 17025, serta mengelola fungsi perusahaan melalui sistem ERP SAP.

Agria berkomitmen terhadap isu-isu ekologi, dengan dana dari EC digunakan untuk pengelolaan air limbah dan pengurangan emisi berbahaya, sesuai dengan standar Eropa yang ketat. Kami memiliki lebih dari 450 pendaftaran produk dan 200 merek dagang di seluruh dunia, dengan ekspansi terus-menerus di pasar utama seperti Uni Eropa, Rusia, Amerika Serikat, Brasil, China, serta negara-negara lainnya.

Zenith Crop Sciences Indonesia adalah bagian dari perjalanan panjang Agria-Grup dalam menyediakan produk perlindungan tanaman berkualitas tinggi ke petani di Indonesia, dengan 90 tahun pengalaman di industri ini.

Name: Karbosan Türkiye
Description:
Türkiye’nin ilk aşındırıcı ürünler üreticisi olan Karbosan, üretim faaliyetlerine 1967 yılında 40 çalışanı ile İstanbul Halkalı’da 9.000 m² bir alana kurulan fabrikasında başlamıştır.

Bugün ise toplamda 700'den fazla çalışanı ve 95.000 m²'den fazla kapalı alana sahip İstanbul Halkalı ve Tekirdağ Çerkezköy fabrikalarında kaliteli, güvenilir ve yüksek performanslı ürünlerini 6 kıtada 90’dan fazla ülkeye sunmaktadır.

İnovasyon ve Ar-Ge çalışmalarına yapılan yatırımlar sayesinde hızla büyüyen Karbosan, mükemmel yüzeyler için çok geniş bir ürün yelpazesine sahiptir.

Yüksek kaliteli aşındırıcı ürünler üretiminde 60 yıla yakın tecrübesi ile Karbosan, hammadde tedariğinden satış sonrası hizmetlerine kadar tüm süreçlerini, müşterilerinin ihtiyaç ve beklentilerini yüksek performansla karşılamak üzerine kurmuştur.

Karbosan, Türkiye’de aşındırıcı üretiminde ISO 9001 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi'ni uygulayan, yüksek kaliteli üretimiyle Avrupa Aşındırıcı Üreticileri Federasyonu (FEPA) üyesi ve Aşındırıcı Güvenliği Organizasyonu (OSA) üyesi olan ilk şirket konumundadır.

Karbosan ürünlerinin kalitesi, Türk Standartları Enstitüsü tarafından zımpara taşları için TS EN 12413, zımpara ürünler için TS EN 13743 sertifikaları ile belgelendirilmiştir.

Karbosan, ham maddeden ürünün müşterilere sunulmasına kadar devam eden her adımda çevresel etkileri de dikkate alarak üretimini ISO 14001 Çevre Yönetim Sistemi’ne uygun olarak doğaya karşı duyarlı bir şekilde gerçekleştirir.

Name: Huntin Organics
Description:
Huntin Organics aims to bring solutions for farmers based on their never ending problems in farming. 

Based on Huntin’s own fundamental research, extensive field trials, and knowledge of traditional farming systems, we have created solutions to address three major problems related to plant nutrition, controlling pests and diseases, and their resistance management.    

Within a span of more than a decade, Huntin has created an impact on over 100,000 acres of farms across the country.  The five-decade business legacy of its Founder, Mr Nitin Singhal, led to establishing Huntin in 2008, for providing nutritionally rich safe food, continues to grow across sectors with his everlasting passion.    

The company has manufacturing facilities at Faridabad and Indore, a current built-up of  55,000 sq ft  and expandable upto 300,000 sq ft, for catering to the ever growing demand of natural origin products for sustainable agriculture. A multi-disciplinary team of over 30 techno-commercial persons ensure the solutions are made available for farmers on time.

This supplements our end goal of not just supporting the farmers, including smallholders, but also consumers with safe and nutritious food on their plates. 

Huntin stands for delivering natural organic sustainable solutions to the farming sector while nurturing the environment and biodiversity at large. 

Visit our website www.huntinorganics.com to know more.

Name: OneGarnet Group
Description:
OneGarnet Group specializes in mining, processing, and sales of industrial garnet abrasives. As a leading abrasive producer in waterjet cutting and surface preparation industry, OneGarnet possess premium hard rock almandine garnet mines with determined reserves of over 140 million tonnes.

OneGarnet owns three super-large garnet mines in China, with proven reserves exceeding 50% of the total proven global reserves. In China, OneGarnet operates two modern processing plants. 

OneGarnet is an Almandine Garnet with superior hardness and toughness, after the processing of 4 times crushing, featuring sharp angular edges with excellent cutting ability. 

OneGarnet Blasting abrasive featuring with faster cutting speed, lower abrasive consumption, more cost-efficient and lower salt contamination compared to alluvial beach garnet. Sa3.0 White Metal effortlessly achieved.

OneGarnet Waterjet Cutting abrasive featuring with consistent sizing, faster & more cost-efficient, higher cut quality, no oversized grains & no dust.

OneGarnet also produces JadeCut blasting abrasive. JadeCut is a dark green and red ‘Garnet Blend’ of hard rock minerals with superior hardness, toughness and sharp angular edges. It can be achieved with Sa3.0 White Metal. JadeCut is free of heavy metals and no free silica, the price is about 65% of Garnet, JadeCut is a cost-effective alternative to copper slag because of its low consumption and high productivity.

OneGarnet are equipped with two fully automated production lines and strict quality control system to secure supply and consistent excellent quality. With an initial production capacity of 700,000 tpa of OneGarnet and 300,000 tpa of JadeCut, we will gradually increase to 2.8 million tpa of OneGarnet and 1.2 million tpa of JadeCut to meet market demand. 

OneGarnet Group is establishing a global sales & service network as well as garnet recycling. 

OneGarnet Group, A New Benchmark in Garnet Abrasives.

Name: Biochar Innovations Limited
Description:
We are dedicated to harnessing the unique properties of biochar to develop high-value products with a neutral or negative carbon footprint. Rather than treating biochar as an end in itself, we integrate it as a key ingredient in innovative solutions that deliver additional benefits.  

Developed with support from Innovate UK and the Apollo Angel Investment Syndicate, our breakthrough product is a carbon-negative fertiliser granule, ReCharge, designed for arable crops. Compatible with any cultivation system, easily applied using existing farm machinery, and validated in field scale trials, we expect a patent to be granted in June 2025.

ReCharge significantly reduces the carbon footprint of cultivation and contributes to lowering Scope 3 emissions in the food supply chain.

Building on our success, we have co-founded Blue Earth Biochar to address diffuse nutrient pollution in agriculture. Once again, we have secured Innovate UK grant funding and, as of January 2025, have begun a two-year feasibility study to develop innovative new solutions in this space.

We are now collaborating with strategic business partners to license our ReCharge IP and deliver the benefits to the market.

Name: Salveo Agro
Description:
After a successful 25-month banana field trial on Sigatoka Negra, as well as trials on pathogens on cacao, tomatoes, and grapes in Ecuador, urged by investors, Salveo Agro’s Founder teamed up with Texas A&M University (TAMU), one of the top 20 agricultural universities globally to conduct further trials. At TAMU, the team successfully tested the dosing and efficacy of Tectus Matrix against FOC TR4 with In Vitro and In Vivo greenhouse bioassays on 84 live Cavendish banana plants. Tectus Matrix is now proven as a curative and preventative against Panama Disease FOC TR4.

“We are excited that our 3rd party bioassays with TAMU’s Plant Pathology Department proved that we have preventative and curative treatments for TR4,” says Tectus Matrix inventor, Jack Bracewell, Founder of Salveo Agro. “Here we have a sustainable treatment that can stop the TR4 pandemic and save the bananas”.

Let the field trials begin!
 
Research and development continues to further explore and expand the benefits and possible applications of the Tectus Matrix technology and formulations. We are driven by the promising results so far and the possible positive and sustainable human and environmental impact our work can have.

2022. Trials are ongoing globally on some of the most important high value crops, where Tectus Matrix is not only being proven as a biocide but also as a bio-stimulant for healthy growth and increased yields.
 
Targeting over 70 pathogens, Tectus Matrix formulas are proving to be valuable broad spectrum natural products.

Tectus Matrix
Changing the world, One Farm at a Time

#tectusmatrix  #bananawilt #Salveoagro #sustainableagriculture

Name: Nebula Ecosystem — Cafelium
Description:
Nebula Ecosystem es la primera startup latinoamericana que integra Fermentación de Precisión, sensores IoT y Trazabilidad Blockchain para empoderar a los caficultores con ciencia, datos y confianza digital.

Creemos que el gran café comienza en los procesos invisibles:
curvas de pH, dinámicas de ORP, presión de CO₂, actividad microbiana, densidad celular y toda una historia de fermentación que nunca se había registrado… hasta ahora.

Por eso creamos:

 Nebula Fermentation

Un biorreactor inteligente de fermentación anaeróbica equipado con sensores IoT que miden:
Temperatura • pH • ORP • CO₂ • Oxígeno Disuelto • Densidad Celular • GPS • Altitud • Series de Tiempo
Diseñado para caficultores que buscan mejorar la calidad, la consistencia y obtener mejores puntajes SCA en sus microlotes.

 Nebula OriginBlok

Un módulo de trazabilidad digital basado en blockchain que protege la huella digital de cada microlote:
origen, altitud, curvas de fermentación, datos de postcosecha y métricas de secado.
Transparencia real de la finca a la taza — no marketing.

 Juntos conforman Nebula Ecosystem:

Una forma científica, transparente y sostenible de procesar café, que honra el trabajo de los caficultores y abre nuevas oportunidades de mercado.

Nuestra Misión

Elevar el café latinoamericano mediante tecnología, sostenibilidad y narrativa basada en datos.

Nuestra Visión

Un mundo donde cada microlote sea medible, trazable y confiable digitalmente.

 Únete si crees que el café merece ciencia, no adivinanzas.

Name: MaxSil Pty Ltd
Description:
MaxSil is an emerging producer of a patented silicon fertiliser, which boosts food production as well as plant health, whilst reducing fertiliser and pesticide needs. MaxSil is derived from recycled glass and hence is part of the Circular Economy.

MaxSil Pty Ltd has initiated production of its patented silicon fertiliser, MaxSil, at its Brendale, Qld plant in April. The product is composed of amorphous silica from recycled glass, offering plant nutrition benefits without the health risks linked to crystalline silicas. Since its discovery in 2014, MaxSil has been refined to become a top silicon-based plant nutrient globally, with patents in seven countries across three continents.

Silicon fertilisers like MaxSil address the depletion of silicon in commercial soils by providing plant available silicon (PAS), enhancing crop yield and resilience against various environmental and biological stresses. MaxSil delivers 10 to 20 times more PAS than comparable products, reducing transport and spreading costs while enhancing farm efficiencies and minimizing carbon footprint.

The product's effectiveness has been confirmed in field trials on various crops and has been shown to restore condemned saline soils, providing a potential solution for salt-affected regions. MaxSil is dedicated to further research through a partnership with the University of Western Australia and various farm trials.

Given the current robust agribusiness market, increasing interest in silicon fertilisers among growers, and scientific evidence endorsing silicon as vital for plant growth, MaxSil is well-positioned. The product not only boosts crop production and plant health, but also reduces dependency on NPK fertilisers, pesticides, and insecticides.

Name: BioFertilizante Conforto
Description:
Fundada com a missão de produzir alimentos para o mundo de maneira inovadora, segura e sustentável, a Fazenda Conforto se destaca como uma referência na gestão do agronegócio brasileiro.

A Fazenda Conforto iniciou suas atividades há 28 anos, com a recria e engorda de bois. Desde então, trabalhamos incansavelmente para integrar tecnologias avançadas ao nosso dia a dia, buscando sempre alcançar os mais altos padrões de desenvolvimento e sustentabilidade.
Dez anos mais tarde, com o crescimento da demanda, demos início ao sistema de confinamento, assegurando sempre o bem-estar animal. Em 2023, esse esforço foi coroado com o reconhecimento da Fazenda Conforto como a fazenda de pecuária de grande porte mais sustentável do Brasil pelo prestigiado prêmio Planeta Campo. Este prêmio é uma prova do nosso compromisso conjunto em promover a sustentabilidade e preservar o meio ambiente, estabelecendo um padrão de excelência no setor agrícola e de pecuária nacional.

Em 2008, iniciamos um projeto inovador, em parceria com o IFB Fertilizantes: a criação de um biofertilizante que iria mudar a produtividade no campo. 

O BioFertilizante Conforto nasceu para resolver um passivo problema ambiental, de forma a reutilizar os resíduos fisiológicos dos animais confinados em nossa propriedade em Goiás. Trata-se de um produto puro, rico em matéria orgânica e biotecnologia de ponta, que promove a liberação gradual de nutrientes e garante a melhora na nutrição vegetal e na fertilidade do solo. Algo único no Brasil! 

Nosso objetivo com o BioFertilizante Conforto é fomentar o crescimento da utilização da adubação orgânica que, além de todos os benefícios para o solo, planta, meio ambiente e saúde financeira do parceiro, fomenta a produção nacional do segmento, reduzindo a dependência de fontes externas e fomentando o crescimento regional e nacional desse setor.

Name: Agriculture Business Careers (ABC)
Description:
Agriculture Business Careers (ABC) is a dynamic field encompassing a wide range of professional opportunities within the agricultural sector. Professionals in ABC play integral roles in various aspects of the agricultural industry, from production and management to marketing and distribution.
In ABC, individuals may find themselves working in roles such as agricultural management, where they oversee the day-to-day operations of farms, ranches, or agricultural businesses. They may be responsible for crop planning, livestock management, equipment maintenance, and workforce management to ensure efficient and profitable operations.

Others may pursue careers in agricultural sales and marketing, where they promote and sell agricultural products such as crops, livestock, equipment, and supplies to farmers, businesses, and consumers.
This role involves developing marketing strategies, building relationships with clients, and staying informed about market trends and regulations.

Supply chain management is another vital area within ABC, involving the coordination of the production, transportation, and distribution of agricultural products from farm to market. Professionals in this field work to optimize logistics, minimize costs, and ensure the timely delivery of products while maintaining quality and safety standards.

Research and development (R&D) also play a crucial role in ABC, with professionals working to improve agricultural techniques, develop new technologies, and enhance crop yields and livestock productivity. This may involve conducting experiments, analyzing data, and collaborating with scientists, engineers, and agricultural specialists.

Additionally, careers in agricultural finance, policy, consulting, and education offer diverse opportunities for individuals interested in contributing to the sustainable growth and development of the agricultural industry.
Overall, ABC offers a rewarding and diverse range of opportunities for every individual.

Name: IKR Agrár Kft.
Description:
Az IKR Agrár Kft., az AGROFERT cégcsoport erős tagjaként, a 2012. évi akvizíciót követően látja el mezőgazdasági termelőket inputanyagokkal és szolgáltatásokkal. Ebben a folyamatban a csoport tagjaként működő AGROTEC Magyarország Kft. és az NT Élelmiszertermelő Kft. által nyújtott üzleti lehetőségek is segítik tevékenységünket. A magyarországi termelőknek számos előnye származhat abból, hogy az AGROFERT cégek stabil pénzügyi hátterű szakvállalatokként vannak jelen a magyar piacon.

Az IKR Agrár Kft. a stabil és kiszámítható likviditási helyzetére alapozva, mostanra elérte a kezdeti célkitűzést, hiszen Magyarország meghatározó mezőgazdasági kereskedelmi cégévé nőtte ki magát, jelentős műtrágya, vetőmag, növényvédőszer értékesítésével és terménykereskedelmével.

Az IKR Agrár Kft. elkötelezett abban, hogy partnerkörét folyamatosan növelje, a szolgáltatások színvonalának emelésével. Feladatunknak tekintjük, hogy kifogástalan szolgáltatás nyújtásával elégítsük ki a vevői igényeket. Cégünk elkötelezett abban, hogy partnerei gyarapodjanak az üzleti folyamatok végén mind anyagiakban, mind szakmai ismeretben.

Az IKR Agrár Kft. a világszínvonalú agronómia eredményeinek bemutatásával, valamint az új technológiák, korszerű termelési eszközök és eljárások ismertetésével segítjük partnereink versenyképes és eredményes gazdálkodását. Name: Nutricrop
Description:
A Nutricrop é uma empresa líder na indústria agrícola, especializada na produção de produtos inovadores para a nutrição foliar. Com um compromisso sólido com a excelência e a sustentabilidade, a Nutricrop tem desbravado novos caminhos ao desafiar a fisiologia das plantas, buscando constantemente maneiras de otimizar o desempenho das culturas.

Nossa empresa acredita que a chave para uma agricultura bem-sucedida reside na compreensão profunda dos processos fisiológicos das plantas. Ao combinar pesquisa de ponta com práticas agrícolas, a Nutricrop desenvolveu uma linha de produtos que atendem às necessidades específicas das plantas em diferentes estágios de crescimento.

O slogan da Nutricrop, "Desafiando a fisiologia das plantas", reflete nosso compromisso em ir além dos limites convencionais para impulsionar a produtividade agrícola. Trabalhamos para oferecer soluções que não apenas maximizam os rendimentos das colheitas, mas também promovem a saúde das plantas e a eficiência no uso de recursos.

Nossos produtos para a nutrição foliar são desenvolvidos com base em pesquisas científicas avançadas, garantindo a entrega de nutrientes essenciais de maneira eficaz e sustentável. Além disso, a Nutricrop está comprometida com práticas ambientalmente responsáveis, buscando constantemente maneiras de minimizar o impacto ambiental de nossas operações e produtos.

Ao escolher a Nutricrop, os agricultores podem contar com parceiros dedicados a impulsionar o crescimento saudável das plantas, aumentar a produtividade e contribuir para um futuro agrícola mais sustentável.

Soomaa brings together science and nature to empower European agriculture with sustainable innovation. This process unlocks the natural power of humic and fulvic acids.

Our mission is simple: help farmers and agri-businesses grow healthier, more resilient crops while restoring the soil’s natural balance. Soomaa products increase yields by 10–30%, boost root development, improve nutrient uptake, and reduce dependence on synthetic fertilizers by up to 50%.

Every formula is EU-compliant, waste-free, and environmentally safe, suitable for organic and conventional farming alike. With flexible application methods—from foliar sprays to fertigation and seed treatment—Soomaa fits seamlessly into any farm routine.

We work with:
• Organic and large-scale growers
• Greenhouse and hydroponic operators
• Agricultural distributors and cooperatives
• Food producers seeking certified eco-inputs

By combining innovation, transparency, and environmental responsibility, Soomaa offers a cleaner, more efficient way to grow—naturally. Together, we cultivate soils that thrive, crops that perform, and a future that sustains us all.

Phoenix Biosolutions is redefining the future of agriculture by making biological innovation accessible. Born from decades of leadership in microalgae biotechnology and biostimulant development, we’ve seen both the transformative potential of these technologies—and the barriers that keep them out of reach for many.
We are not a product company. We are a service partner, empowering distributors, cooperatives, and large-scale farmers to produce their own microalgae-based biostimulants locally. Through our turnkey production model, we transfer deep technical know-how and operational expertise, enabling our partners to unlock new value, margins, and market strategies.
Our approach is disruptive by design:

It democratizes innovation by shortening supply chains.
It scales sustainability by making advanced inputs more affordable.
It puts control and impact directly in the hands of those who grow our food.

Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. By decentralizing production and promoting local manufacturing of biostimulants, we reduce carbon footprints, minimize resource waste, and foster regenerative agricultural practices. Our model not only supports environmental stewardship but also strengthens local economies—creating a ripple effect of positive impact across communities and ecosystems.
At Phoenix Biosolutions, we’re proud to pioneer a new way forward—where innovation is not just created, but shared.

Name: Agrarius
Description:
Agrarius is the world’s first technology that communicates directly with plants to increase growth and resilience.  Scientists have known for decades the plants use the mycelial network to communicate with each other. During times of hardship, distressed plants will emit chemical signals through their roots. These signals are dispersed through the mycelial network, triggering an adaptive response in nearby plants. 

Agrarius mimics these signals. The technology is tested and proven. Humanity can access the internet of the earth for the first time.  

We can now speak to plants. We can tell them how to grow. The implications are historic.

Description: AgriGel is an innovative agricultural product designed to get more production with less water. It has the ability to improve soil water retention and nutrient availability. It is a hydrogel, capable of absorbing and retaining 500 times of water relative to their size which it releases gradually to plant roots. This technology helps conserve water, reduce irrigation frequency, and enhance crop yield about 25% to 30% in various soil types and climates. AgriGel also aids in the efficient uptake of nutrients, promoting healthier plant growth and resilience to drought conditions. AgriGel is commonly used in agriculture, horticulture, landscaping, and even in indoor plants and gardens. Its application can be particularly beneficial in areas with limited water availability or where water conservation is a priority and promoting sustainability.

Name: Nitronic
Description:
Nitronic's vision empowers farmers to cultivate zero-carbon fertilizers, mitigating price volatility. In Australia, where the bulk of fertilizers is imported—crafted from fossil fuels and prone to pricing fluctuations tied to commodities, transportation, and currency shifts—Nitronic's impending technology promises on-site fertilizer creation, negating these risks. Nitronic's nitrogen fixation technology harnesses renewable energy, yielding a carbon-neutral end product. Its utility extends beyond urea, encompassing ammonium sulphate and ammonium phosphate. Contrary to rivals, Nitronic's approach excludes hydrogen generation, extreme processing conditions (high temperatures and pressures), or intricate processes. Employing non-thermal plasma, the technology is straightforward and budget-friendly.

Distinguished by its unique emphasis on sustainable solid fertilizers, Nitronic stands apart. This divergence enables widespread adoption in broadacre farming, transcending mere fertigation supplementation. Nitronic revolutionizes nitrogen fixation, fostering sustainable agricultural production, and supporting farmers on this transformative journey.

Essas matérias-primas são micropulverizadas em sua forma naturalmente seca, misturadas com precisão em fórmulas alcalinas ou ácidas, e submetidas à tecnologia exclusiva *micro-quad*, garantindo a remoção completa de materiais insolúveis.

Name: Agri Tech Insights
Description:
About Agri Tech Insights — Your Agriculture Market-Research Partner

Welcome to Agri Tech Insights — where agriculture meets informed decision-making.
In a world where agriculture is transforming rapidly — via technology, shifting consumer preferences, and evolving global demands — Agri Tech Insights is committed to equipping agribusinesses, startups, policy-makers, and stakeholders with data-driven clarity and actionable intelligence.

 Our Mission

Our mission is to empower all players in the agriculture ecosystem — from smallholders and agritech startups to agribusiness corporations and supply-chain players — with clear, reliable, and forward-looking market research that supports growth, innovation, and sustainable agriculture.

What We Do

In-depth Agri-Market Research: We map agricultural markets across regions and segments, covering areas such as crop production, agri-inputs, supply chains, agri-tech adoption, demand trends, and regulatory landscapes.

Technology & Innovation Tracking: From precision farming and IoT-enabled farming solutions to sustainable agri-tech innovations and digital agriculture trends — we keep track of what’s shaping the future of farming.

Consumer & Demand Analysis: We analyze changing consumer preferences, demand patterns, and consumption trends — both domestic and global — to help you align products and strategies.

Customized Reports & Forecasts: Every project is tailored: whether you need a broad overview, a deep dive into a niche segment, or future-casted demand and supply forecasts — we design reports suited to your goals.

Strategic Insights & Advisory: Beyond raw data, we provide actionable insights, potential scenarios, strategic recommendations, and risk analysis to help you make informed decisions.

Support for All Stakeholders: Whether you are a small agritech startup exploring opportunities, a farmer-organization assessing markets.

Description:
At Globe International Crop Science (GICS), we are committed to transforming agriculture by providing high-quality crop protection solutions that empower farmers and enhance productivity. Established in 2018, we are an ISO-certified company specializing in the manufacturing and supply of pesticides, herbicides, fungicides, and plant growth regulators (PGRs) that meet both national and international quality standards.

Our Vision
We envision a future where farmers have access to cutting-edge agricultural solutions that protect crops, improve soil health, and maximize yields while ensuring sustainability. By embracing innovation, research, and eco-friendly technologies, we strive to contribute to global food security and sustainable farming practices.

Our Products & Expertise
GICS provides a wide range of agrochemicals designed to support farmers in tackling challenges such as pest infestations, weed management, fungal diseases, and growth enhancement. Our products are formulated using high-grade raw materials and advanced research methodologies to ensure maximum efficiency, safety, and environmental sustainability.

Pesticides – Protect crops from harmful insects and pests.
Herbicides – Eliminate unwanted weeds and enhance crop growth.
Fungicides – Prevent and control fungal infections in plants.
Plant Growth Regulators (PGRs) – Promote healthier and stronger plant growth.
Why Choose GICS?
 Quality Assurance – ISO-certified, high-grade formulations.
 Innovative Solutions – Advanced research-driven products.
 Farmer-Centric Approach – Helping farmers maximize yield and profitability.

At GICS, we believe in growing together. Whether you're a distributor, retailer, or farmer, we invite you to connect with us to explore partnerships and growth opportunities in the agriculture industry.

Our mission is to provide beginners and gardeners with sustainable and eco-friendly potting mix for indoor & outdoor plants, including houseplants, hanging baskets, window boxes, ornamental herbs and edibles. 

 Our Mission 
We believe in a greener future, not only for adults but also for the next generation. Our mission is to revolutionize the gardening industry by offering premium potting mixes that promote healthy plant growth and contribute to preserving our precious ecosystem. With every bag of ShaRogan's Miracle Bloom Premium Potting Mix, we include fun and engaging gardening toys for children, encouraging them to explore the wonders of nature firsthand. 

 What Sets Us Apart 
 Sustainable Sourcing: Our potting mixes are carefully crafted using responsibly sourced, organic, and renewable materials, reducing environmental impact.

 Eco-friendly Formulations: We have perfected a blend that optimizes plant nutrition while conserving water and reducing waste, fostering a greener, more efficient gardening experience.

 Bio-Degradable Packaging: In our commitment to sustainability, we use eco-friendly packaging that breaks down naturally and reduces waste.

 Why Choose Miracle Bloom? 
 Superior Plant Health: Our potting mixes are enriched with essential nutrients, beneficial microorganisms, and pH-balanced components, ensuring your plants thrive and flourish.

 Easy-to-Use: Designed for gardeners of all skill levels, our potting mixes are easy to handle and provide the ideal environment for your plants to grow their best.

 Sustainable Gardening Partners: By choosing us, you align yourself with a like-minded community that values the planet and seeks to impact the environment positively.

We are looking forward to you joining us on this green journey!

Name: Farmmitra
Description:
Farm Mitra is a clean-tech agri startup based in Maharashtra, India, focused on transforming agricultural biomass into high-quality biochar — a sustainable solution that reduces crop-residue burning, captures CO₂, improves soil health, and enables carbon credit generation for farmers.

We work towards solving one of India’s biggest agricultural and environmental challenges — biomass burning — by converting waste into value. Our biochar technology not only prevents harmful emissions but also enriches soil fertility and promotes regenerative farming practices.

Through innovation in biomass-to-biochar processing, carbon sequestration, and climate-smart agriculture, Farm Mitra aims to build a circular rural economy that benefits farmers, the environment, and the planet.

We are recognized under MSME (Udyam Registration No. UDYAM-MH-21-0108928) and are in the process of Startup India DPIIT Recognition under the Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India.

Our Focus Areas:
 Sustainable agriculture
 Biomass management & biochar production
 CO₂ capture and carbon credit generation
 Climate action & clean technology
 Farmer empowerment and rural innovation

Mission:
To empower farmers by turning agricultural waste into wealth — creating cleaner air, healthier soil, and a carbon-neutral future.

Vision:
A future where every village in India uses biomass responsibly to regenerate soil and store carbon, contributing to global climate goals.

Name: Verdant Agriculture
Description:
Safe & sustainable pest management practices is a huge challenge of contemporary times because the population is increasing at exponential pace but the food resources are not. Agricultural & Natural resources are destroyed by wars, famine, and most of the times by pests. The conventional pesticide industry focuses on chemical based products that are harmful for humans working in the field and also make the agri-produce poisonous. This is where we come in the picture of SPM and IPM. Verdant Agriculture empowers Farmers through Sustainable Pest Management and Integrated Pest Management to increase soil quality and reduce pest resistance.
Our founder always had her vision of calibrating the supply-demand equation of organic produce and hence decided to improve the world for all by developing effective & eco-friendly pest control solutions that safeguard crops and consumers. To that end, developing biopesticides by utilizing advance biotechnology has been the optimal strategy due to which we provide organic neem pesticides that cater to the health and safety of farmers, the consumers and non-target species. Our turn-key solution for the organic pesticides industry are agronomically and economically sound, eliminate disparities, and engage all stakeholders, agricultural and non-agricultural.

Our Flagship pesticide, "Faiz-e-Bahar”, has is the result of years of extensive R&D. It has been developed through the aqueous extraction of Neem leave Glycoproteins, combining in curcumin which proves to increase the repellency rate up to 40% without harming the environment that ends up bringing harsh climatic changes. This is just 1 of our products for sustainable pest management practices in production agriculture. We are the best company for eco-friendly alternatives to traditional farming because of the vast range of Neem-based pesticidal formulas we have curated. Our focus is on SME in the organic produce market because it allows us to innovate newer & better 
agri inventions.

Name: NEXA Speciality Fertilizers LLP
Description:
At Nexa Division, we have taken the initiative for a transformative approach to agricultural nutrition by developing a ground breaking range of 100% micronised water-soluble fertilizers enriched with trace elements and chelated micronutrients also . Our flagship Nexa Series is meticulously designed to support the natural, healthy growth of plants, addressing the core needs of modern agriculture with precision and efficiency.

In today’s agricultural industry, optimizing crop yields while ensuring long-term economic viability is a challenging yet essential goal. A key factor in this pursuit is the efficient uptake of nutrients from the soil, which can significantly influence crop performance. To address this challenge, we’ve developed innovative solutions designed to improve nutrient delivery and absorption. A standout feature of our water-soluble fertilizers (WSF) is their complete solubility in water, allowing for the rapid and consistent release of vital nutrients directly into the plant root zone. This ensures that plants receive the nutrients they need at the optimal time for growth. By utilizing this advanced sodium and chloride free formulation, the Nexa Series enhances nutrient use efficiency (NUE), enabling farmers to boost yields while minimising environmental impact.
Our commitment to revolutionising agricultural practices stems from our understanding that efficient nutrient management is vital for sustainable farming. With the Nexa Division’s innovative products, we are setting a new benchmark in plant nutrition, fostering healthier crops, higher yields, and a brighter future for agriculture.
At the heart of our mission lies a deep commitment to transforming agriculture for the better. We recognise that efficient nutrient management is the cornerstone of sustainable farming—key to not just feeding the world, but nurturing the land for generations to come.

Name: MARDI Corporation - (Malaysian Agriculture Research and Development Institute Corporation)
Description:
About MARDI Corporation Sdn. Bhd.

MARDI Corporation Sdn. Bhd. (MARDICorp) is the commercial arm and a wholly owned subsidiary of the Malaysian Agriculture Research and Development Institute (MARDI), operating under the aegis of Malaysia’s Ministry of Agriculture and Food Security. MARDI is at the forefront of generating cutting-edge inventions and technological innovations tailored to meet the evolving demands of the agriculture industry. Beyond innovation, MARDI is a knowledge powerhouse, driven by a robust research and development (R&D) ecosystem supported by over 500 scientists across a spectrum of disciplines.

MARDICorp plays a pivotal role in translating MARDI's groundbreaking research into practical, scalable solutions. Our mandate is to extract and package these innovations, tailoring them to the unique needs of our stakeholders and clients. This comprehensive approach ensures that the solutions we deliver are not only innovative but also highly effective and relevant to the industry’s demands.

Our Evolution

MARDICorp has undergone significant transformation since its inception. Established in 1992 as Marditech Corporation Sdn. Bhd., the organization evolved into MARDI Holdings Sdn. Bhd. in 2015. To better reflect our expanded mandate and strategic focus, we rebranded as MARDI Corporation Sdn. Bhd. in 2017. This evolution marks our commitment to driving agricultural advancements through strategic commercialization and industry collaboration.

Name: Yara Sverige
Description:
Yara Sverige är en del av Yara International som är börsnoterat i Oslo, Norge. Yara är en av världens ledande aktörer inom växtnäring och kvävebaserade industriella produkter. Yaras övergripande uppdrag är att förse världens befolkning med mat på ett ansvarsfullt sätt samtidigt som planeten skyddas. 

Yara Sverige har flera olika affärsområden:
- Växtnäring, som arbetar för ett hållbart lantbruk och en grön omställning av värdekedjan för matproduktion.
- Produkter för industriellt bruk: foderfosfater, AdBlue, teknisk ammoniumnitrat, luftrening, vattenrening och mycket mer.

Historia
I Sverige har vi varit verksamma inom produktion och utveckling av produkter inom växtnäring sedan 1882. 
År 1981 köptes den dåvarande svenska verksamheten av Norsk Hydro som sedan år 2004 splittrades i två olika företag: Hydro, för tillverkning av lättmetaller, och Yara för produktion och utveckling av mineralgödsel och kvävebaserade produkter för industriellt bruk.

Name: HydroPhos Solutions
Description: HydroPhos Solutions is a circular economy social venture that simultaneously addresses eutrophication and phosphorus depletion as a function of its core business model. HydroPhos utilizes phosphorus filtration technology to extract phosphorus from wastewater, subsequently reselling this phosphorus as a slow release fertilizer. This reduces eutrophication, recycles the nutrients, and extends the lifespan of our global food supply by combating phosphorus depletion, all while creating a profit that is reinvested into the business's growth to scale the positive impact of operations.

Product Categories
Our product portfolio can be categorized into five major avenues viz.
1. NPK Water Soluble Fertilizers

4. Biostimulants

We have a diverse customer ecosystem with international importers, dealers, and distributors.
Our Wholesale Line focuses on B2B resellers and B2CH business models. Our customer base is composed of 65% of international exports and 35% of domestic sales.
Our Values
Helping farmers harvest ‘Healthier Crops Faster’ in a sustainable way has been our propulsion force. After all, our brand ‘Harbest’ is the short form of ‘Harvest at its Best’. We not only help them improve the yield but also the quality of their produce. While we do that, we also help in retaining the soil health with our top quality fertilizers. This way, we ensure that we meticulously
take care of every aspect of your cultivation. Overall, Harbest is about nurturing your farm farm for the better.

Name: Makosh Deutschland
Description:
Makosh ist ein Händler und Vertreiber von Düngemitteln. 
Makosh ist nach der trypillischen Göttin der Fruchtbarkeit benannt, und das Bildzeichen der Göttin ist das Zeichen eines besäten Feldes, das wir in unserer Öffentlichkeitsarbeit verwenden. 
Wir beschäftigen uns ausschließlich mit Pflanzenernährung, das ist unser Mantra, unsere Religion, und es ist wichtig für uns, eine Symbol für Kundenservice zu sein. 
Unser Slogan "Investitionsnahrung" für Pflanzen bedeutet, dass alle unsere Kunden Investoren sind, denn Düngemittel werden gekauft, um eine bessere Ernte und einen höheren Gewinn zu erzielen.
Es ist einfach, mit uns zu arbeiten, wir bieten einfache Lösungen. Alles, was Sie tun müssen, ist, sich für eine Zusammenarbeit mit uns zu entscheiden! 
Makosh ist eine Brücke zwischen dem Hersteller und dem landwirtschaftlichen Betrieb. Das Unternehmen arbeitet mit den berühmtesten Produzenten der Welt zusammen, um den deutschen Landwirten hochqualitative Düngemittel zu den besten Bedingungen und zu erschwinglichen Preisen anzubieten.
Wir handeln auf den europäischen Märkten: Polen, Rumänien, Frankreich, Deutschland, Tschechische Republik, Ukraine und Moldawien.
