Name: VSM Abrasives Kft.
Description:
Kik vagyunk? VSM – Több, mint három betű. Nem csak több, mint 160 éve gyártunk és forgalmazunk csiszolóanyagokat, hanem mindenkinél jobban értjük a csiszolási folyamatokat.

Belegondoltál már, hogy milyen lenne a világ sima, csiszolt felületek nélkül?

Naponta használsz tárgyakat, amelyek simák, kellemes tapintásúak és tetszetősek. És ez természetes. Csupán jó ránézni, jó megérinteni, jó használni. 

Ez a mi igazi feladatunk és küldetésünk: hogy egy simább, kellemesebb és szebb világot teremtsünk. Éppen ezért elemezzük és mélyen megértjük az ügyfeleink alkalmazásait, hogy tartósan kínáljunk számukra és az ő végfelhasználóik számára optimális megoldást és az eredményt: szép és sima felületeket. A VSM-et különösen a részletes, alkalmazás-specifikus megértés és szakmai tudás jellemzi, amelyet a Partnereink az iparban és a kereskedelemben világszerte nagyra értékelnek.

Kompetencia. Minőség. Ügyfélközpontúság. Ezt jelenti a VSM. Ez vezeti a mindennapi gondolatainkat és cselekedeteinket.

Kövess minket itt a VSM magyarországi és romániai oldalán és legyél részese Te is!

Name: Black Dot Neem Seed Oil Products
Description:
Neem seed oil has gained a lot of popularity in recent years due to its various health benefits and its effectiveness as an organic insecticide. As a result, many companies have started to supply neem seed oil products to meet the growing demand. One such company is Black Dot which specializes in supplying high-quality neem seed oil products.

Black Dot was established in 2020 with a mission to provide the best quality neem seed oil products to customers. The company sources its neem seeds from trusted suppliers in India, where neem trees grow abundantly. The seeds are then cold-pressed to extract the oil, ensuring that all the natural properties of the oil are preserved.

The company's product line includes pure neem seed oil, and neem seed oil-based insecticides such as our ULTRA-SHIELD for horses and dogs. All of these products are 100% natural and organic, free from harmful chemicals and synthetic additives. They are also cruelty-free and vegan-friendly.

One of the company's most popular products is its neem oil-based insecticide. Yenilikçilik, kalite ve güvenilirlik prensiplerini benimseyerek, tarım sektöründe uzun vadeli büyümeyi desteklemek ve daha sağlıklı, bereketli bir dünya yaratmaya katkıda bulunmak en temel görevlerimiz arasında yer almaktadır.

Over twenty-five years later, we remain just as committed to delivering optimal animal health solutions direct to you now as we did then.

In 2001 Chemvet added a marketing division to assist in the marketing of the products that it had developed.

Chemvet’s mission via its R&D activity is to provide the end user, whether they are a veterinarian, livestock manager or pet owner, with effective and innovative formulations that are cost effective, as well as easy and practical to administer.

Chemvet in its product development combines the knowledge and experience of practicing veterinarians with the technical capabilities of some of Australia’s top consulting research and chemistry laboratories.

We also have close formal associations with several multinational animal health companies and these associations, combined with our own expertise, are being harnessed to provide practical and effective solutions for a number of animal health situations and problems, be it in the pet or livestock population.

These solutions, when applicable to farm animals, are sold by Chemvet DIRECT to the farmer.

Chemvet now supplies high quality mainstream veterinary chemical products DIRECT to the Australian farmer at very economical prices.

We believe customer service should be second to none and our professional advice on animal health and production matters is always available.

Very simple payment facilities are in place and the animal health products on our list, to date, can be delivered to the Australian producer FREIGHT FREE and delivery is overnight in most cases.

-Identify where biochar delivers real productivity gains across crops and pastures

-Sourcing biochar from the market

-Integrate biochar into existing agricultural and pasture operations
-Design and implement MRV systems (Measurement, Reporting, and Verification) that convert carbon storage into eligible, paid carbon credits

Biochar is the tool. Productivity and carbon revenue are the outcomes.

Why this matters
-Without system design and MRV, productivity gains are inconsistent
-Without MRV, carbon credits are not issued
-Without proof, regulatory and buyer value is lost TehaGreen reduces complexity and shortens the path between the decision to use biochar, measurable productivity results, and the generation of additional carbon income.

Our mission:
Help agribusiness increase productivity, strengthen resilience, and generate additional income through carbon — using biochar as the main lever.

Name: Klingspor Magyarország
Description:
Profiktól profiknak.
A Klingspor családi vállalkozásként indult Németországból, 1893-ban.
A vállalat azóta a világ számos országában megtalálható, Magyarországon 2002-től van közvetlen értékesítéssel jelen.
A Klingspor a világ 5 legnagyobb csiszolóanyag-gyártója közé tartozik, több mint 50.000 magas minőségű termékkel a kínálatában.
Magyarországi leányvállalatunk többek között nagy teljesítményű csiszolóanyagok, csiszoló- és vágókorongok, gyémánt szerszámok nagykereskedelmi értékesítésével foglalkozik. Termékeink széles körben lefedik a csiszolás folyamatait a durva megmunkálástól a finomig, valamint megoldást biztosítunk a legtöbb anyag megmunkálásához pl.: fára, fémre, műanyagra, kőre. Termékeinket németországi és lengyelországi raktárunkból közvetlenül szállítjuk partnereinknek.

Name: BGP Products, LLC
Description: BGP Products is a custom formulator and manufacturer of soil and plant nutrition products. Based on carbon, our products are formulated to influence plant growth. Growers have found that plant growth and productivity are enhanced by establishing a feeding cycle where the rhizosphere is under the strong influence of root exudates and the secreted products of bacterial metabolism and degradation.

Nach der Wiedervereinigung folgten noch die Firmen Schmirgelwerk Chemnitz GmbH in Chemnitz und Capillar Schleifkörperwerk GmbH in Crosta bei Bautzen.
Nach umfangreichen Investitionen in Gebäude und Technik übersiedelte der Marktredwitzer Betrieb 1994 nach Schwarzenbach an der Saale.
STELLA produziert an drei Standorten mit rd.
110 Mitarbeitern. Der Exportanteil liegt bei ca. 40 %. Bei STELLA stehen die Stärken eines mittelständischen Unternehmens wie Flexibilität, Kundennähe und kurze Lieferzeiten im Vordergrund.

Name: Starcke VSM Vitex
Description:
Starcke VSM, kaplanmış zımpara ve yüzey işleme teknolojilerinde iki dünya markası olan STARCKE ve VSM’nin teknik uzmanlığını Türkiye sanayisine entegre eden güçlü bir yapılanmadır. Bu iki köklü Alman üreticinin kalite odaklı yaklaşımını, mühendislik gücünü ve üretim deneyimini yerel ihtiyaçlarla buluşturarak sektöre yüksek performanslı çözümler sunmaktayız.

STARCKE, 1829 yılından bu yana Almanya'nın Melle kentinde faaliyet gösteren, küresel ölçekte tanınan bir üreticidir. Özellikle otomotiv, metal işleme, elektronik, savunma, havacılık ve ahşap sektörlerine yönelik sunduğu modern üretim teknolojileri ve yatırımlarıyla, dayanıklı ve verimli ürünleri sayesinde sektörde fark yaratmaktadır.

VSM (Vereinigte Schmirgel- und Maschinen-Fabriken), kaplanmış zımpara alanında 160 yılı aşkın süredir faaliyet gösteren, yenilikçi çözümler geliştiren öncü bir markadır. Müşteri ihtiyaçlarını analiz ederek her yüzey işlemine özel, uzun ömürlü ve yüksek performanslı ürünler sunmayı ilke edinir. Üretim ve Ar-Ge anlayışı, kaliteyi yalnızca standart değil, aynı zamanda müşteri odaklı bir değer olarak tanımlar.

Starcke VSM olarak Türkiye'deki teknik danışmanlarımız ve saha ekibimizle; doğru ürün seçimi, uygulama analizi ve süreç optimizasyonu konularında destek sağlıyoruz. Amacımız sadece ürün satmak değil, üretim kalitesini artırmak, maliyetleri düşürmek ve uzun vadeli iş birlikleri kurmaktır.
STARCKE ve VSM’nin 84 ülkedeki deneyimini, Türkiye yapılanmamızla hızlı ve esnek biçimde sunuyoruz. Yüzey işlem teknolojilerinde çözüm ortağınız olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Name: OR57 System
Description:
Global agriculture, based on chemical agents, has overexploited soils since ancient times. It first offered unlimited results, replacing organic technologies in farming. Today, most soils have deteriorated to the point of considerably affecting yields due to the excessive application of chemical agents in their predominant variables: fungicides, insecticides, herbicides, and even fertilizers. This has the agricultural world in a state of uncertainty with reasonably alarming characteristics, regionally, nationally and globally.
Most bacteria, viruses, fungi and insects have developed mutations of increased resistance. The latter has led the chemical industry the need to apply higher and higher concentrations of chemical agents that lead to a strong impact on the ecological balance. As a result, sectors that had been very productive are now inactive with infertile soils.  Even diseases in the different crops are spreading with greater ferocity and environmental impact.
The "Organismos Recicladores O.R." (Recycling Organisms) have been developed with the intention of providing an effective and sustainable alternative for the agricultural and livestock sector, besides being a highly profitable enterprise. 

It consists in a system of beneficial and friendly microorganisms that substantially improve the efficiency in the treatment of soils and plants, and considerably increases yields of the agricultural sector.

Trusted by growers who value performance, precision, and long-term soil vitality, Wilson provides organic inputs designed to scale, perform, and deliver results where it matters most: the field.

At Wilson Organic Solutions, our mission is to revolutionize sustainable agriculture by providing high-quality, OMRI-certified and CDFA-approved organic fertilizer solutions. Using an innovative, low-energy production process, we create an environmentally friendly fertilizer with a minimal carbon footprint. Our product is derived from carefully selected swine manure that undergoes a precise, controlled process to ensure nutrient consistency, balance, and quality. The result is a clean, effective, and eco-conscious fertilizer that supports both agricultural performance and environmental stewardship.

Logística e Distribuição: Nossa rede logística eficiente assegura que os fertilizantes foliares sejam entregues de forma rápida e segura aos nossos clientes. Trabalhamos com parceiros logísticos confiáveis para garantir a pontualidade e a integridade dos produtos durante o transporte e armazenamento.
Suporte ao Cliente e Consultoria:  Nossa equipe de especialistas está disponível para fornecer orientações sobre a aplicação dos produtos foliares, otimização de resultados e resolução de quaisquer dúvidas ou problemas.
Sustentabilidade e Responsabilidade Ambiental: Comprometemo-nos com práticas sustentáveis e responsáveis, na utilização dos nossos produtos.

Name: Carbón Vivo

Somos productores y comercializadores de soluciones en base a biochar para mejorar la fertilidad y calidad de todo tipo de suelos, incluidos los agrícolas, de jardinería y verde urbano.
Comercializamos nuestros productos bajo la marca LivingChar. El uso de los productos LivingChar en las tierras de cultivo se traduce en:

1. Un incremento del agua disponible para los cultivos
2. Un aumento de la eficiencia en el uso de nutrientes
3. Una mejora de la estructura y una reducción de la compactación de los suelos
4. Una mayor biodiversidad y actividad de los microorganismos bioestimulantes, y
5. Un incremento del contenido de materia orgánica estable de los suelos (humus)

Gracias a la mejora en las propiedades fisicoquímicas y biológicas de los suelos que generan nuestros productos, se mejora la nutrición y sanidad de todo tipo de cultivo, así como su producción. Además, el uso de los productos LivingChar reduce las pérdidas de producción como consecuencia de episodios de elevadas temperaturas y/o de escasez de agua.

Name: Forefront Innovations Ltd.
Description:
About Us

Forefront Innovations Ltd. is a pioneering agribusiness dedicated to developing sustainable solutions for the agricultural sector. We address critical post-harvest management challenges, ensure food security, and empower farmers with innovative products. Our mission is to reduce post-harvest losses and enhance the profitability of staple crop farming through practical, affordable solutions.

At Forefront Innovations, we leverage science, technology, and collaboration to create value for farmers, communities, and the environment. Our research-driven approach combines stakeholder engagement, farmer-centric design, and eco-friendly practices to deliver impactful results.

Products and Services

1. FreshGuard: Our flagship product, FreshGuard, is an organic solution designed to reduce post-harvest losses by preventing spoilage in staple crops, particularly yams. It extends shelf life, ensuring better market access and reduced waste.

2. Agribusiness Training and Support: We offer specialized training programs for aspiring and experienced farmers, equipping them with knowledge and tools to maximize productivity and scale operations sustainably.

3. Sustainable Farming Operations: Our company engages in eco-friendly farming practices, cultivating yams, maize, cassava, and other staple crops to ensure quality and support innovation efforts.

4. Research and Development: We continuously innovate through research in organic farming techniques, post-harvest solutions, and waste-to-product conversion methods to support agricultural sustainability.

we are committed to advancing the agricultural sector through innovative and scientifically engineered solutions that address both the immediate demands of crop productivity and the long-term health of the soil. Our focus lies in the development of fertilizers and chemical products that not only optimize nutrient delivery to plants but also promote sustainable agricultural practices, ensuring a balance between high yields and environmental preservation.

In today’s agriculture, where sustainability is becoming an integral part of productivity, we pride ourselves on formulating fertilizers that offer a superior blend of essential macro and micronutrients. These nutrients enhance soil structure, improve the biological functions within the soil, and foster resilience in crops against pests, diseases, and environmental stresses. Our solutions are designed with precision, allowing farmers to boost their crop yields while maintaining the ecological integrity of their farmland.

Beyond fertilizers, we also provide a comprehensive range of agricultural chemicals crafted to address specific challenges such as pest control, weed management, and disease prevention. These solutions are created with a deep understanding of modern agronomy, ensuring that they work in harmony with the environment and minimize potential ecological disruption. 

At Dehal Chemical & Fertiliser, we recognize that the future of agriculture depends on the integration of innovative technology with traditional farming methods. That’s why we are constantly pushing the boundaries of research and development, striving to deliver products that not only meet current agricultural needs but also anticipate future demands.
Our vision is to be a leader in the agricultural chemical industry by empowering farmers with solutions that are both effective and environmentally responsible.

Description:

Researchers, educators, extension service providers, administrators, marketing agents, research technicians, consultants, students, and enthusiasts are among the membership. 
The Society's primary goal is to support and foster the communication of entomological knowledge. It sets up meetings between entomologists at the main office and other locations where the Society's branches are being established. Through these contacts, members and other interested parties can stay up to date on entomological activity in Pakistan and around the world.

Our flagship products create real impact:

Fertolamic – A biofertilizer that not only degrades organic and hazardous waste but also enhances soil health and crop quality. Farmers using Fertolamic report higher yields with more nutritious, environmentally friendly produce.
Bio-NAK – A probiotic feed additive that transforms local organic waste into high-nutrition livestock feed in just two days. It helps farmers significantly lower feed costs while improving livestock appetite, weight, and overall quality.
TAG also offers waste management solutions that convert household and industrial waste into biogas, biofertilizers, bio-pesticides, bioethanol, and more, supporting a circular economy.

Our clients include Chevron Indonesia (oil waste management in Riau) and Superindo (fruit and vegetable waste processing). These collaborations showcase our commitment to innovation and sustainability.

With a vision to be the leading choice for organic agribusiness products and a pioneer in zero-waste management, we’re driving sustainable growth for a greener future.

Interested in transforming your agricultural or industrial processes sustainably? Let’s connect and explore how TAG can help!

Name: Entomological Society Of Pakistan
Description:
The largest organization in the world addressing the scientific and professional requirements of entomologists and others in allied fields is the Entomological Society of Pakistan (ESP). Since its founding in 2023, ESP has grown to include around 7,000 members who work in government, business, healthcare, and education. Researchers, educators, extension service providers, administrators, marketing agents, research technicians, consultants, students, and enthusiasts are among the membership. 
The Society's primary goal is to support and foster the communication of entomological knowledge. It sets up meetings between entomologists at the main office and other locations where the Society's branches are being established. Through these contacts, members and other interested parties can stay up to date on entomological activity in Pakistan and around the world.
The membership of the Society is open to all persons, above 18 years of age, who are interested in Entomology. Ordinary members have to pay an admission fee of Rs. 1000/- and an annual subscription (pdf only) of Rs. 2500/-. Life membership is restricted to only those who have completed five years as ordinary members. On payment of Rs. 25000/- they can become Life Members. 
Send two copies of your biodata to the Entomological Society of Pakistan, Room No. 1 A, A-145, Main Akbar Road, Phase III Ghauri Town, Islamabad, The planters pvt Ltd. Division of Entomology. if you are a Life Member and would like to be considered for Fellow status in the Society. Prior to the announcement of the Fellows of the Society (F.E.S.I.), the members' biodata will be reviewed by the Society's competent committee. Occasionally, the Society may choose to elect Honorary Members—people who are widely recognized for their contributions to the field of entomology. See the website www.entosocity.pk for further information.

Name: BARYTINE ET MINERAUX
Description:
Située dans l’Indre avec deux sites de production à Chaillac et Celon, BARYTINE & MINERAUX est reconnue comme spécialiste du traitement et de la vente de sulfate de baryum naturel (Barytes) mais également du traitement et recyclage de matières minérales comme les céramiques et leurs dérivées. 

Créée en 1975, la société était un site d’extraction, d’enrichissement et de préparation de barytes. En 2006, le gisement ayant été considéré comme épuisé, la stratégie s’est donc orientée principalement sur la thématique de la préparation de Baryte en conservant son esprit d'innovation. 

En 2016, BARYTINE ET MINERAUX rejoint le Groupe industriel français ETHIC qui est spécialisé dans la fabrication et la commercialisation de produits minéraux pour les industries. 
Tout en bénéficiant de la puissance et de la stabilité de ce partenariat, elle a diversifié ses produits tout en préservant son identité, forgée par une longue histoire d'excellence, de qualité et de fiabilité reconnues par l’ensemble de ses clients. 

BARYTINE & MINERAUX fait aujourd’hui partie des derniers sites de production de baryte et propose également du carbonate de calcium, des argiles et autres matières premières pour tous types d’industries : automobile, verre, BTP, production de céramiques…

Name: Gecos Fertilizzanti
Description:
La Gecos fertilizzanti nasce a Scordia (CT) nel 1991 grazie all’impegno di esperti nel settore, attenti conoscitori delle esigenze e delle problematiche riguardanti l’agricoltura, in grado di soddisfare tutti i fabbisogni nutrizionali delle diverse colture biologiche e convenzionali.
I nostri formulati “organo-minerali ad elevato contenuto di sostanza organica, ferro e zolfo”, sono realizzati con un sistema di pellettatura a freddo che garantisce l’integrità della sostanza organica (conservazione della carica batterica) amplificando l’efficacia di prodotti e preservando tutti quei processi naturali che permettono la formazione di humus, garantendo al terreno una fertilità costante e duratura. Di intensa colorazione rossa dovuta all’aggiunta di ferro e amminoacidi a basso peso molecolare, il prodotto risulta uniforme e meccanicamente spandibile.
Perseguiamo una politica di alta produttività a basso costo e impatto ambientale sostenibile, avvalendoci di una rete di personale altamente qualificato (ricercatori, agronomi e tecnici agrari), garantiamo un valido e costante supporto tecnico ed una vasta gamma di prodotti in grado di risolvere problematiche di natura nutrizionale, produttiva ed ambientale.
Qualità, serietà, competenza, ricerca ed esperienza sono i pilastri del nostro successo. L’assistenza tecnica continua, l’interazione dialogica, sia con la rete dei rivenditori che con l’agricoltore, ci permettono di interagire tempestivamente con esigenze in continuo mutamento e di contribuire validamente a garantire la redditività dell’agricoltura nelle diverse regioni.
La Gecos propone una vasta gamma di prodotti suddivisi per categorie così da agevolare l’utente nella scelta del fertilizzante adatto alle proprie esigenze.

Name: Kwa Mushroom Farm
Description:
Kwa Mushroom Farm is a social enterprise that focuses on the production of white Oyster mushrooms for human consumption. 
It is a sustainable and socially responsible business that seeks to address food security and environmental issues by producing healthy and affordable mushrooms in an eco-friendly manner.

Kwa Mushroom Farm is a for-profit business with a social mission. The enterprise grows and produces white Oyster mushrooms in a controlled indoor environment using waste materials such as sugarcane bagasse, sawdust, and straw as a substrate. We also re-use plastics in a vertical way inside the production house. This method of cultivation is environmentally friendly, as it reduces waste and creates a closed-loop system that is highly sustainable.

Our harvested mushrooms are sold to local restaurants, farmers' markets, and grocery stores, as well as to individual consumers. Kwa Mushroom Farm also offers workshops and training programs to teach people how to grow their own mushrooms at home, promoting self-sufficiency and sustainable living.

In addition to producing healthy and sustainable food, Kwa Mushroom Farm  prioritizes social impact by hiring and training individuals from marginalized communities, women and the youth.

Overall, Kwa Mushroom Farm is looking for partners who can donate and invest in the business towards its expansion as we look into creating positive social impact in the community.

We believe in empowering our customers, not just selling them a product. PT Sumans Mandiri Sejahtera is more than a company; we are a partner in progress. Preservar a las abejas e insectos polinizadores a través de la alimentación saludable y focalizada. 
Parece sencillo, pero considerando su corta vida, las plagas, parásitos, agroquímicos y el cambio climático, consideramos que a estos insectos les vendría bien algo de ayuda; es por eso que trabajamos para la mejora de su nutrición y salud durante todo el año, especialmente en períodos de emergencia climática como sequías, incendios y post polinización, que caracterizan a nuestro país latinoamericano.

○¿Cuál es nuestra VISIÓN? 
Nos caracterizamos por brindar más que un sólo producto, sino a ofrecer soluciones innovadoras para la apicultura y todos los miembros de la comunidad. 
Nos proyectamos a futuro como una plataforma de varios servicios y productos, generando herramientas físicas y digitales que acompañan a las buenas prácticas apícolas. Concientizando a la comunidad del gran impacto de los polinizadores en nuestro estilo de vida, lograremos conservarlos por un periodo más prolongado, y con ello al medio ambiente también.

Name: Magnifolia Tropicals Pvt Ltd
Description:
Magnifolia Tropicals Pvt Ltd is a fresh, young agricultural export company, founded in 2019 with a simple yet ambitious mission: to bring the beauty of Indian ornamental foliage to Europe. We specialize in cultivating and exporting cut decorative leaves—the vibrant, textured greens that transform floral arrangements, event décor, and indoor spaces into living works of art.

Ornamental foliage isn’t just greenery—it’s nature’s design at its finest. These leaves are grown for their colors, patterns, textures, and forms, offering year-round aesthetic appeal. From elegant varieties of Dracaena, Heliconia, Shefflera, Monstera, Xanadu, to select ferns, our plants add a touch of sophistication wherever they go. Whether it’s the fiery reds, oranges, and yellows of Croton, the striking stripes of Song of India, or the soft, feathery touch of Asparagus Fern, every leaf tells a story. Unlike seasonal blooms, foliage provides lasting decorative value, bringing color, life, and freshness to interiors and floral designs all year round.

Magnifolia is proud to be India’s first company of its kind. Our farm, set amidst the scenic Konkan region of Ratnagiri, spans 40,000 square meters and nurtures over 50,000 plants across 8 carefully curated varieties. Every plant is grown using traditional, organic farming methods, with a commitment to sustainability and environmental care. We believe that true beauty should never come at the cost of the planet.

Over the years, we have built a reputation for quality, consistency, and reliability, supplying some of the finest cut greens to European buyers. Now, we are looking for a buyer who can take this legacy forward—a business with proven cultivation processes, established varieties, and a unique niche in the international ornamental foliage market.

For all your requirements of cut ornamental greens, Magnifolia Tropicals is ready to deliver. Our promise: quality, care, and leaves that leave a lasting impression.

Name: Arel Chem
Description:
Advanced Plant Nutrition. Engineered for Maximum Yield.

At AREL CHEM, we don't just mix chemicals; we engineer plant nutrition at the microscopic level. We are redefining the standard of agriculture with high-efficiency fertilizers designed for the modern grower.

Why Distributors Choose AREL CHEM?

The SC Technology Advantage (<10 Microns) Plants feed through stomata pores, which are typically 7–15 microns in size. Traditional fertilizers often have larger particle sizes, leading to waste and low absorption. At AREL CHEM, we utilize advanced Suspension Concentrate (SC) Technology to reduce particle size below 10 microns.

Result: Fast penetration, 100% absorption, and zero energy waste for the plant.

Global Export Partner Headquartered in Türkiye, we are a dedicated partner for agricultural distributors worldwide from Central Asia to Africa and beyond. We understand the logistics, documentation, and technical support needed to succeed in global markets.

Our Core Solutions:  High-Tech SC Fertilizers: Fluidity meets stability for drip irrigation and foliar application.  Stress Management: Amino acid-rich formulations (like Animal Extra) to protect crops against heat, cold, and salinity.  Specialty Plant Nutrition: Custom NPK blends tailored for high-value crops (Cotton, Corn, Wheat, Vegetables).

We exist to make that life more productive, sustainable, and profitable for our partners.

Keunggulan PT. Jara Silica:

Kualitas Terbaik: Kami mengutamakan kualitas tanpa kompromi, menyajikan pasir silica dengan kemurnian tinggi dan karakteristik yang diinginkan pelanggan.

Pengalaman dan Keahlian: Dengan puluhan tahun pengalaman, tim kami terdiri dari ahli yang berkomitmen untuk memberikan pelayanan terbaik dalam industri pemurnian pasir silica.

Inovasi Berkelanjutan: Kami terus menerapkan teknologi terkini dalam proses pemurnian, memastikan produk kami selalu memenuhi standar terbaru dalam industri.

Komitmen Lingkungan: PT. Jara Silica berkomitmen untuk menjalankan operasional secara bertanggung jawab, mengintegrasikan praktik berkelanjutan untuk menjaga keseimbangan lingkungan.

Layanan Kami:

Pemurnian Pasir Silica: Proses pemurnian canggih untuk menghasilkan pasir silica berkualitas tinggi.

Ekspor Internasional: Memenuhi kebutuhan pasir silica berkualitas tinggi di pasar global.

Konsultasi dan Penyesuaian: Kami siap memberikan solusi pasir silica yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan khusus Anda.

#PasirSilica #PemurnianPasir #EksporPasirSilica #InovasiBerkualitas

Name: Flexiliser
Description:
Flexiliser helpt boeren de stikstofcrisis door en te profiteren van de energietransitie. Boeren bevinden zich midden in een grote overgangsfase: vermindering van stikstofuitstoot en andere broeikasgassen, verbetering bodemkwaliteit, stijgende kosten van mestafvoer en kunstmest, constante beleidswijzigingen, de energietransitie. Uitdagingen te over. 

Wij willen boeren helpen in hun verduurzaming. In onze ogen zijn voedsel en energie onlosmakelijk met elkaar verbonden. We gebruiken energie om voedsel te produceren, terwijl alle organismen voedsel omzetten in energie voor alle lichaamsprocessen. 

Vanuit deze kerngedachte zijn we op zoek gegaan naar een oplossing, die het energie- en voedselsysteem met elkaar verbindt en de meest urgente uitdagingen oplost: fossiele inputs in de voedsel- en energieproductie en schadelijke outputs, waaronder broeikasgasemissies, sterk verminderen. 

Het totale Flexiliser-concept bestaat uit drie modules, waarin de tweede module gebruik maakt van de output uit de eerste: 

Module 1) is de decentrale productie van groene waterstof via electrolyser en deelname aan de balansmarkten;
Module 2) is de productie van groene ammoniak en salpeterzuur;
In Module 3) wordt mest aangezuurd om de ammoniak- en stikstofuitstoot te verminderen en als input voor duurzame kunstmest. De Flexi-booster verbetert de bodemkwaliteit, door mycorrhiza en bacteriële verbinding toe te voegen aan de bodem. 

In 2023 rondden wij een RVO-haalbaarheidsstudie af voor het gehele Flexiliser-concept, met positieve resultaten. Door de stikstofcrisis en kostenstijgingen van mestafvoer richten wij ons nu op de mestaanzuring van module 3. In 2024 onderzoeken wij met de hulp van de provincies Zuid- en Noord-Holland de effectiviteit van onze mestaanzuring en Flexi-booster.

In 2025 hoopt Flexiliser met TNO, Adverio Waste Systems en landbouwer Maatschap Zagt de eerste pilot voor mestaanzuring en biochar te doen. 

Volg ons en blijf op de hoogte van de laatste ontwikkelingen!

Name: Eden Micro Solutions
Description:
Spearheaded by the US-based company Eden Micro Solutions and its visionary founder, Steven Lange, this groundbreaking approach is poised to transform the way we grow crops not only on Earth but also in outer space.
Steven Lange, a prominent US scientist with a diverse background spanning NASA, Dapper, and the CDC, has dedicated the last 35 years of his life to developing a remarkable collection of microbes. Drawing inspiration from his work with the International Space Station (ISS), Lange recognized the immense value of harnessing the power of microbes in agricultural practices. These microbes were gathered from various ecosystems worldwide, including the Amazon rainforest, volcanoes, and deserts, making Eden Micro Solutions' collection diverse and comprehensive.
What sets Eden Micro Solutions apart is its unique approach of organizing these microbes into teams, working in synergy to restore and revitalize the soil. By introducing these microbial teams, which mimic the intricate web of interactions found in natural ecosystems, the company aims to bring the soil "Back to Eden," fostering a harmonious and sustainable environment for crop growth. Marco Pearman-Parish is the CEO of Asia Pacific and works in China, Eden Micro Solutions is not limiting its impact to interplanetary endeavors alone. Currently, the company is introducing a groundbreaking product known as "Eden Micro Amazon" to assist China in enhancing its food production capabilities. By harnessing the power of carefully selected microbial teams, this solution aims to optimize soil fertility, increase crop yields, and reduce the need for harmful chemical inputs. The potential benefits are immense, addressing food security concerns and promoting sustainable agricultural practices.
The adoption of microbiology and the use of microbes in agriculture represent a paradigm shift in how we approach food production.

Name: Anvigen
Description:
Anvigen has developed polymer based biodegradable microcapsules that can store a variety of plant/soil beneficial additives such as microorganisms, fertilizers, pesticides etc. inside them and release them slowly over time. When plant/soil beneficial additives are added directly onto plants/soil, majority of them leaches out into environment or become unstable over time, loosing their efficiency. Microencapsulating additives provides application stability, improves shelf-life and importantly prevents their fast leaching into environment, significantly improving their efficiency and performance.
The first product we are developing is microencapsulated plant beneficial bacteria. A variety of plant beneficial bacteria are available commercially that helps plant with nitrogen fixation, phosphorous uptake and fight diseases. However, when these bacteria are applied/sprayed on to plants/soil, more than 90% die due to abiotic stress and other environmental factors. They also have very poor shelf life. To address this problem, we developed biodegradable microcapsules that stores plant beneficial bacteria inside them and release over time. Encapsulating these bacteria provides shelf-life and application stability, improving their efficiency and thereby yield of crops. Importantly, due to the biodegradable nature of microcapsules, they will not have any negative environmental impact.

Herbally enhanced manure is a product of our own Vithuraya

Name: AgriRich International FZ LLC
Description:
AgriRich International FZ-LLC is a specialist provider of vermicompost and liquid organic fertilizers, dedicated to building healthier soils, resilient crops, and sustainable futures across the UAE and GCC.

Backed by the trust and legacy of the LN Bangur Group and Navjyoti Group of Companies, AgriRich combines over a century of credibility with modern agricultural innovation. Our mission is to support farmers, landscapers, hydroponic operators, municipalities, and distributors in adopting certified organic inputs that deliver environmental responsibility and economic resilience.

Our flagship products are premium vermicompost and liquid organic fertilizer for hydroponics. Both are designed to address the unique challenges of arid soils in the Gulf. With high organic carbon content, balanced nutrients, and strong microbial diversity, our vermicompost improves soil structure, buffers salinity, and enhances water retention, which are critical factors in desert farming. Our liquid organic fertilizer is pathogen free and provides precision nutrition for controlled-environment and hydroponic farming, offering a sustainable alternative to chemical fertilizers.

At AgriRich, quality and consistency come first. Every batch is tested for nutrient balance, EC, and microbial profile to ensure that it is pathogen free, weed free, and reliable. This scientific rigor, combined with a strong logistics backbone, positions us as a dependable partner for large farms, urban landscaping projects, greenhouse operators, and government bodies across all Emirates.

AgriRich is aligned with the UAE’s Food Security 2051 strategy and circular economy goals. We are committed to reducing reliance on chemical fertilizers, recycling organic waste into valuable inputs, and enabling long-term soil health.

AgriRich International brings together science, sustainability, and scale to help transform agriculture in the UAE.

Company History The foundation of Pashupati Agr itech is deeply rooted in the vision of Shri Dhan Prakash Kaushik, a visionary entrepreneur from Shamli district, Uttar Pradesh. Mission and Vision Pashupati Agri tech is guided by a clear mission: to empower farmers with cutting-edge agricultural tools that not only enhance productivity but also promote sustainable farming practices. The company envisions a future where modern agricultural technology harmonizes with traditional farming methods, ensuring food security and prosperity for farmers worldwide. Name: Fasal Agro Industries Limited

Taking responsibility is never easy. Our mission, however, is clear -

Fasal Agro Industries Limited, founded in 2010, firmly believes that agriculture is the backbone of the nation. Any decline in agricultural productivity creates ripple effects that extend beyond farmers, impacting the entire economy and society. With nearly 70% of the population and 55% of the workforce directly or indirectly involved in agriculture, the importance of sustainable farming cannot be overstated.

Guided by this understanding, Fasal Agro Industries Limited is committed to supporting farmers through the consistent supply of high-quality crop protection products, fertilizers, and other agricultural inputs. Our goal is to enhance productivity while ensuring long-term agricultural sustainability.

Although our management team and skilled workforce come from diverse professional backgrounds, we operate with a unified objective:
“No compromise on quality because the value of a farmer’s peace of mind is immeasurable.”

Name: KNK TARIM SANAYİ VE TİCARET AŞ.
Description:
Knk Tarım Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.: Geleceğin Tarım Sektöründe Lider Olma Vizyonu
Knk Tarım'ın Vizyonu ve Misyonu
Knk Tarım Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş., tarım sektöründe yenilikçi çözümler sunarak geleceğe damga vuran bir lider olmayı hedeflemektedir. Teknorif ve sürdürülebilir tarım uygulamalarıyla tarımın modern yüzünü yansıtan şirketimiz, teknolojik yatırımlarla güçlü bir altyapı oluşturmuş ve bu sayede üretim süreçlerini optimize etmiştir. Vizyonumuz, tarım alanında sadece üretim yapmakla kalmayıp, aynı zamanda doğal kaynakları en verimli şekilde kullanarak gelecek nesillere daha yaşanabilir bir dünya bırakmaktır.
Misyonumuz ise, tarımsal verimliliği artırmak, çiftçilerimizin gelirini yükseltmek ve sağlıklı gıda üretimini desteklemektir. Knk Tarım, sadece ürünleriyle değil, aynı zamanda sunduğu eğitim ve destek programlarıyla da çiftçilerin yanında yer alarak onların gelişimine katkıda bulunmayı amaçlamaktadır. Böylece, sürdürülebilir tarım uygulamalarını benimseyen bir toplum oluşturmayı hedefliyoruz.
Knk Tarım, doğal dengenin korunmasına büyük önem vererek, ekosistemi korumak için çevre dostu ürünler geliştirmekte ve tarımsal atıkların yönetimi konusunda çözümler sunmaktadır. Ürünlerimiz organik ve çevre dostu standartlara uygun olarak üretilmekte, bu sayede hem insan sağlığına hem de çevreye katkı sağlamaktadır.
Sonuç olarak, Knk Tarım Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. olarak, güçlü bir vizyon ve misyon ile tarım sektöründe yerimizi sağlamlaştırmış bulunmaktayız. Dünyanın artan nüfusu ve gıda ihtiyacı göz önüne alındığında, doğru tarım uygulamalarının önemi daha da büyük bir hale gelmektedir. Bu nedenle, Knk Tarım'ın sunduğu yenilikçi çözümlerle geleceğin tarım sektöründe söz sahibi olmaya ve Türkiye'yi bu alanda uluslararası arenada temsil etmeye kararlıyız.

Notre expérience basée sur une relation étroite avec les grands acteurs du marché, tant au niveau producteurs que distributeurs, nous permet de disposer d'une large gamme de produits dont l'efficacité est validée. En effet, nous mettons en oeuvre chaque année de nombreux protocoles d'essais et ce sur toutes cultures afin de tester in situ nos futures spécialités avant mise sur le marché.

Nous intervenons sur tout type de cultures (Citrus, arbres fruitiers, Vigne, cultures industrielles, maraîchage,...) avec pour objectif constant de mettre en oeuvre une politique de fertilisation raisonnée, basée si nécessaire sur des analyses de sol et foliaires, répondant aux problématiques environnementales et aux attentes de production de plus en plus exigeantes en matière de qualité et rendement des cultures.

Nous avons, depuis notre création, comme politique d'entreprise de proposer une offre produit en parfaite adéquation avec les attentes d'une agriculture moderne, soucieuse de préserver les ressources naturelles, tout en apportant des solutions adaptées aux contraintes de chaque pays, cultures, et climats.

Name: Morash Crop Science
Description:
In the fertile lands of rural India, where agriculture is not just a livelihood but a way of life, Morash emerged as a beacon of innovation and sustainability. Established with a vision to revolutionize crop protection practices and empower farmers with effective solutions, Morash has become synonymous with excellence and reliability in the agricultural industry.

Founded by a team of passionate agronomists and industry veterans, Morash Crop Protection was born out of a deep-rooted commitment to addressing the challenges faced by Indian farmers. Drawing inspiration from the rich agricultural heritage of the country, Morash set out to develop cutting-edge products that would enhance crop yields, improve quality, and safeguard against pests and diseases.

From humble beginnings, Morash quickly gained recognition for its dedication to research and development, investing in state-of-the-art facilities and collaborating with leading scientists and agricultural experts. Through rigorous testing and continuous innovation, Morash introduced a range of crop protection solutions that were tailored to the unique needs of Indian farmers, taking into account factors such as climate, soil conditions, and crop varieties.

Today, Morash stands as a testament to the power of innovation, collaboration, and commitment to excellence. With a comprehensive portfolio of crop protection products, backed by scientific expertise and field-tested results, Morash continues to empower farmers across India to cultivate success and nourish the nation.

As we look to the future, Morash remains steadfast in its mission to drive positive change in the agricultural sector, leveraging technology, research, and partnerships to ensure a bountiful harvest for generations to come. From seed to harvest, Morash is dedicated to supporting farmers every step of the way, cultivating a brighter and more sustainable future for Indian agriculture.

Name: AgriBiO3
Description:
At AgriBiO3, we are revolutionizing post-harvest grain preservation with ozone sanitation technology. Our innovative solution tackles one of agriculture’s biggest challenges: post-harvest losses caused by fungi, pests, and poor storage conditions.

 What we do
We develop and deploy eco-friendly, chemical-free ozone reactors that sanitize grains like maize immediately after harvest. This process reduces contamination, extends shelf life, and ensures safer storage without harmful residues.

 Why it matters
Up to 30% of harvested grains in Africa are lost post-harvest, directly impacting farmer livelihoods and food security. By protecting grains at the source, AgriBiO3 helps farmers increase income, reduce waste, and build resilient food systems.

 Our vision
To make sustainable, accessible, and scalable grain sanitation available to farmers worldwide — starting with smallholder farmers in Africa. Every grain saved strengthens food security and creates a more sustainable future.

 Sustainable
 Scalable
 Safe for farmers and consumers

AgriBiO3: Saving harvests, securing futures.

Name: Agroquímica Industrial RIMAC S.A.
Description:
Agroquímica Industrial RIMAC S.A., es la empresa pionera en formulación de plaguicidas genéricos de Centroamérica, fundada por dos visionarios ingenieros químicos costarricenses, Ernesto Macaya Ortiz y Eduardo Rivera Porras.

En el año 1975 vio nacer la primera Empresa de Capital cien porciento  costarricense, dedicada a la formulación, manufactura, comercialización y distribución de Agroquímicos Genéricos en Centroamérica. 
Esto trajo como beneficio inmediato en la Región la regulación de los precios de estos importantes insumos para la producción agrícola y por tanto una reducción importante en los costos para el productor agrícola. 
Con esta iniciativa, RIMAC rompió el monopolio de muchas empresas transnacionales, lo cual benefició y continúa beneficiando al sector agropecuario.

RIMAC distribuye sus productos en Centroamérica y algunos países del Caribe y en la actualidad se realizan gestiones en la búsqueda de nuevos mercados en Suramérica. 

RIMAC cuenta con equipos de envasado de última generación, con líneas de llenado completamente automatizadas y con estación robotizada de entarimado, esto nos permite importantes avances en aspectos de Impacto Ambiental, Salud Ocupacional y estandarización de procesos. Esta inversión ha puesto a Rimac en el escenario de las industrias tecnología 4.0, la Industria del Internet de las cosas.

En el año 2016, la empresa alcanza la Certificación OEA (Operador Económico Autorizado) convirtiéndonos en la primera Industria Agroquímica Centroamericana con dicha Certificación, primera industria agroquímica costarricense, y la primera industria cartaginesa; que en su momento la gozaban solamente dos empresas. 

Además, RIMAC goza del distintivo que con la primera evaluación alcanzó dicha Certificación debido a su excelencia operativa.

La búsqueda incansable de la calidad es uno de nuestros valores esenciales, este es un compromiso que hemos logrado plasmar en nuestro eslogan: “RIMAC La mejor calidad, Siempre”.

Name: Amazon Biofert
Description:
Our mission is to transform organic waste from economic activities located in the Legal Amazon into fertilizers and soil conditioners based on biochar. AMAZON BIOFERT aims to contribute to the preservation of the planet and promote sustainable food production with a focus on carbon sequestration in the soil.

Biochar is the best soil conditioner ever discovered. Produced from carbonized biomass, it can permanently change the physicochemical characteristics of the soil. This feature significantly reduces the need for fertilizer applications, as biochar increases the retention of chemical elements, acting like a magnet for nutrients.

The idea of transforming açaí seeds into biochar is an excellent way to reduce the volume of waste from açaí processing. Moreover, biochar sequesters carbon in the soil for long periods, preventing its release into the atmosphere and thus mitigating the greenhouse effect.

Name: Moxba Innovations LLC
Description: With nearly two decades of experience, we produce and supply a wide range of micronutrients to farmers and distributors. Our goal is to help your crops grow faster and healthier through a variety of products, including specialized blends. As a full-service partner, we handle the entire process, from creating custom micronutrient compositions to managing logistics and specialized packaging. Our EDTA EDTA chelates are widely used in agriculture to deliver essential micronutrients to a variety of crops. The specific crops for which each chelate is used depend on the nutrient’s importance to that crop and the crop’s susceptibility to a deficiency. EDTA chelates are generally most effective in acidic or neutral soils (pH 4 to 7) and are commonly applied through foliar sprays or irrigation systems. Our Solutions These liquid fertilizer solutions are used to correct micronutrient deficiencies in a wide range of crops. The specific crops for which each solution is used depends on the nutrient’s role in plant metabolism and the crops’ susceptibility to a deficiency of that nutrient.

Name: MINERAUX INDUSTRIELS DE GAILLON
Description:
Fondée en 1981 et dont l’usine est basée à AUBEVOYE (27), Minéraux Industriels de Gaillon  (MIG) est une société familiale spécialisée dans la transformation de minéraux, la vente et la distribution d’oxyde de fer rouge, d’oxyde de fer noir et de minerais de manganèse. L’usine d’AUBEVOYE se concentre sur le séchage, le broyage, le criblage et le mélange des matières premières. 

L’entreprise fait partie du groupe industriel français ETHIC qui se compose de plusieurs sites de production, tous dans la transformation de matières minérales et dont la direction et l’administration sont au siège social dans le sud de la France. Tout en bénéficiant de la puissance et de la stabilité de ce partenariat, elle a diversifié ses produits tout en préservant son identité, forgée par une longue histoire d'excellence, de qualité et de fiabilité reconnues par l’ensemble de ses clients. 

Minéraux industriels de Gaillon propose plus d’une centaine de produits différents (principalement des poudres minérales conditionnées prêtes à l’emploi) qui sont distribués principalement à quelques 200 clients dans le secteur de l'industrie du soudage, de la fonderie et de la sidérurgie.  Elle est un maillon essentiel des secteurs d’activités tels que l’aérospatial, l’automobile, l’électronique, le médical, l’énergie ou la défense. 

Pour toute information, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter sur : gestionadv@mineraux-gaillon.com

Description:

We began our business development activities are are seeking distributors, partnerships and end-customers.

Our product range is more than 60 types of specialty products, and the total annual production is about 20,000 MT (about 5 million gallons). Our products can be broken into the following categories:

-	Premium starter fertilizers
-	Chelate micronutrients
-	Non-microbial plant biostimulants
-	High-tech adjuvants
-	Suspension fertilizers
-	Water soluble as well as micro-granular fertilizers
-	Others

We use highest quality raw materials to manufacture our products and we have a great partnership with leading suppliers around the world. Some of our suppliers include a seaweed company Acadian Seaplants as well as precision liquid fertilizer placement tool’s producer’s AgXcel, along with many others.

You can get acquainted with our company and overview of products on our website. Please let us know what products you may be interested in, and we will provide more information about composition, application rates as well as pricing. 

Please reach out to us on Linked in or write us a note to our email at office@quantum-fertilizers.com and we would love to set up an introductory email and answer all your questions!

Name: Eco-Farming Training Center (EFTC)
Description:
The Eco-farming Training Center (EFTC) is  a solution to the smallholder farmers  in Rwandan community, Eastern province. This training
center help to train farmers about  sustainable farming practices such as sustainable soil water and fertility
management skills, Integrated pest and diseases management skills, modern crop management skills, Minimal
tillage land preparation methods, microdosing of agriculture inputs, Precision agriculture, post harvest skills.
Additionally, we  provide them with access to markets of their produce.
Since January 2023, 100 farmers who are  enrolled into the EFTC program for consecutive 2 years that are equal to 4 agricultural
seasons of Rwanda, are be empowered about sustainable agricultural practices, and will be able to sustain
better harvests of their crops even after the program. Our farmers produce enough yield with a good
quality that meets the market standards, thus have food for their families, generate more income, and
secure satisfying employment opportunities through their sustainable agricultural practices. Additionally,
farmers are  equipped with skills to sustain their lands and ecological resources such as conservation of
insect pollinators, which  serve for future generations.

AquaBoostNano introduces a carbon nanoparticle-based seed priming technology that addresses drought stress resilience and enhances crop yields sustainably. One time hydropriming seed treatment, designed for seed companies, agricultural enterprises, and farmers, this innovative, eco-friendly solution integrates seamlessly into existing seed preparation processes.

Our proprietary nanoformulations provide key benefits:
1. Vigorous Early Growth: Promotes robust development during early growth, primarily enhancing root system establishment.
2. Balanced gas exchange: Improves photosynthetic performance by optimizing gas exchange, consequently improving intrinsic water-use efficiency. 
3. Antioxidant Activity: Protects plant cells by mitigating drought-induced oxidative stress through modulation of antioxidant enzyme activity and accumulation of protective compounds.

The biostimulant effect is demonstrated by stabilized yield under hot, dry environmental conditions.

By activating endogenous plant stress-response pathways and preserving photosynthetic efficiency under water-scarce conditions, AquaBoostNano priming empowers plants to tolerate moderate to severe intermittent drought and optimize water use, benefiting endurance in challenging environments.

Name: Ventera Bio Ltd
Description:
About Us
Insecticides are essential for protecting crops from insect-related losses. However, most synthetic insecticides are now banned or heavily restricted due to their harmful effects on pollinators, environmental persistence, and tendency to drive resistance. Despite this, many remain in use simply because there are so few viable alternatives.

Our Solution
At Ventera Bio, we harness the power of venoms. These naturally evolved substances exhibit exceptional molecular precision, enabling highly selective targeting of pests. Venom-derived peptides are biodegradable, do not accumulate in soil or water, and do not enter the food chain. Their structural complexity also supports multimodal action, significantly reducing the likelihood of resistance development.

What We Do
We fractionate venoms and rigorously screen them to identify bioactive peptides with the potential to be developed into next-generation bioinsecticides.

Our Mission
Ventera Bio is on a mission to discover and develop peptide-based bioinsecticides from venoms—offering targeted, sustainable, and environmentally responsible solutions for pest control. Our goal is to protect crops while promoting biodiversity and long-term ecological health.

Name: Mestac U.A.
Description:
Mestac U.A. is een producentencoöperatie met ruim 300 aangesloten leden. Deze leden zijn overwegend veehouders met bedrijven in Zuid – Oost Nederland. Mestac richt zich op de afzet van het niet plaatsbare mestoverschot op de bedrijven van haar leden. Via Mestac bundelen veehouders hun krachten zodat ze een belangrijkere partij zijn op de mestmarkt en hier voordeel uit kunnen halen.

Duurzame samenwerking en marktgericht denken. Dat zijn de kernwaarden, de bouwstenen voor Mestac richting de toekomst. Mestac ziet mest niet als afvalproduct, maar als waardevolle grondstof voor de plantaardige productieketen. Binnen die keten spelen alle partijen een belangrijke rol, of het nu gaat om de toeleverancier (de veehouder) of de afnemer/gebruiker (de akkerbouwer) of de logistieke partner (mestdistributeur). De wensen van de afnemer zijn echter bepalend voor de eisen die Mestac stelt aan het mesttraject.

Veehouders en akkerbouwers zijn op zoek naar een betrouwbare partner. Een rol die Mestac wil en kan vervullen. De drijfmest van Mestac-leden wordt collectief aan partijen in de mestmarkt aangeboden. Door de bundeling van meststromen is Mestac een interessante partij van de andere schakels in de mestketen. Daarnaast kan het door de bundeling van krachten ontwikkelingen in gang zetten die de continuïteit van de mestafzet voor haar leden waarborgt.
Vanwege de jarenlange ervaring van Mestac in de mestwereld heeft het betrouwbare zakenpartners aan zich weten te binden. Deze zakenpartners / distributeurs verzorgen met moderne apparatuur de afzet van de mest van de Mestac-leden tegen een concurrerend tarief. Vrijwel alle mest wordt op het moment afgezet in de binnenlandse akkerbouwgebieden, in Zeeland, Noord-West  en in Noord-Oost Nederland.

Naast de mestafzet van haar leden, zet Mestac zich in voor mestinitiatieven die de mestafzet vergemakkelijken of goedkoper maken. Bijvoorbeeld het laten verwerken van mest bij Ecoson en de eigen boerengenoteerde mestfabriek Merensteyn.

Name: CV GUNUNG DONO PUTRA
Description:
Tanah pertanian dan perkebunan yang memiliki hasil yang baik dan tinggi merupakan harapan kita semua kan?
Itu bisa didapat kalau kita menggunakan dolomite sebagai pupuk dasar dan pembenah tanah saat proses pembudidayaan. Nah, Dolomite GDP Bisa jadi solusi untuk kita.

Apasih Kandungan dan kegunaan Dolomite GDP?
Kapur Dolomite GDP ini mengandung Kalsium (CaO) dan Magnesium (MgO).  Selain untuk menambah unsur hara didalam tanah, kegunaan utama dari dolomite ini adalah untuk meningkatkan pH tanah, dan menetralkan keasamannya.

Berkualitas ngga sih?
Oh Tenang temen-temen! dolomite GDP sudah melalui proses sistem kualitas yang memadai, rutin di cek di laboratorium dan sudah berstandar SNI.

Dolomite GDP seperti apa sih?
Dolomite GDP berbentuk tepung/powder halus dan memiliki beberapa mesh tergantung kebutuhan temen-temen. Dengan kuantitas 50Kg persaknya
Dolomite GDP tidak hanya untuk pertanian dan perkebunan loh, tapi bisa untuk industri juga dan sudah tersebar hampir ke seluruh indonesia. Mesh yang kami sediakan ada mesh 60, mesh 80, mesh 100, mesh 200, bahkan mesh 325. Saya menyediakan dolomite langsung dari pabriknya.

Name: Fineton Industrial Minerals Limited
Description: Fineton, established in 1994, is a leading producer and supplier of high-quality industrial minerals used in glass, ceramics, paints, coatings, plastics, construction, foundries, and filtration. With a strong global presence, we operate processing plants and sales offices in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Canada, Indonesia, the Philippines, and Vietnam, delivering reliable mineral solutions to diverse industries worldwide." Initially, we supplied silica sand from Dongshan, China, to local users and buyers in Japan and Korea for foundry and glass applications. We then established our second production facility in Jiangyin to produce silica flour. In 2001, we reached a significant milestone by beginning the mining and processing of nepheline syenite, a unique mineral with commercially exploitable deposits found in only a few locations worldwide. Our flagship product, FinEx, is a filler-grade nepheline syenite, making us one of only two producers of this type globally. In 2008, we expanded our operations to Vietnam, which boasts abundant and high-quality silica resources. Currently, we have several facilities in Ha Tinh and Quang Tri, where our silica sand is primarily exported to China, Taiwan, Japan, South Korea, and the Philippines. In 2017, we also began supplying high-quality calcium carbonate throughout the Asia Pacific region.

Name: Kenkashi Microbes
Description: Kenkashi Microbes is committed to building soil and plant health through microbial amendments for compost, soil and foliar sprays.  Microbes play a vital role in the health of our ecosystems, and supporting their viability in soil is necessary to a healthy planet.  Microbes speed the breakdown of compost to release elemental nutrients, making them available to plant roots, increasing plant health, and immunity function.  In conjunction with regenerative farming and gardening practices, the introduction of additional microbes increases the biological diversity of your soil; in turn, healthy microbial populations in plant leaves sparks induced systemic resistance, a boosted immune system response to pathogens.  Additional microbes in compost processes, whether in large scale facilities or at home, can as much as halve the time and effort required to get usable compost, which in turn allows an increase in compost production- removing more food waste from methane producing land fills and putting needed nutrients back in our soil.  We also champion the bokashi method of composting, which uses microbes to ferment food scraps, creating a nutrient dense compost within just a few months!  We believe in playing a small part in big processes, helping heal soil issues and climate change methane release where we can- Small Life Doing Big Things!

Name: Koren Crop Science LLP
Description:
Koren Crop Science is a modern fusion of Korean technology and ancient Indian agricultural techniques. It combines the latest advancements in farming technology with traditional farming practices to create a sustainable and efficient system that benefits farmers and the environment. This approach focuses on the principles of agro-ecology, which emphasizes the importance of ecological processes in agricultural production. It promotes the use of natural resources, encourages biodiversity, and minimizes the use of chemicals and other inputs.

Korean technology has been at the forefront of agricultural innovation for many years. The country has invested heavily in research and development to improve crop yields, enhance quality, and reduce environmental impact. The Korean government has also supported the adoption of advanced farming technologies such as precision farming, smart irrigation, and greenhouse cultivation. These technologies have helped Korean farmers to increase productivity, reduce costs, and produce high-quality crops that meet the stringent standards of global markets.

On the other hand, ancient Indian agricultural techniques are based on the principles of sustainability and equity. These techniques have been developed over thousands of years and have been proven to be effective in maintaining soil health, conserving water resources, and preserving biodiversity. The traditional Indian farming practices are based on the concept of agro-ecology, which emphasizes the importance of ecological processes in agricultural production. These practices include the use of natural fertilizers such as cow dung and compost, crop rotation, intercropping, and mixed farming.

By combining Korean technology and ancient Indian agricultural techniques, Koren Crop Science can create a sustainable and efficient farming system that benefits both farmers and the environment.

Name: QET Organic Farms and Consult
Description:
What started as a simple after-school project in 2018 has blossomed into a thriving agribusiness revolutionizing the Ghanaian market. QET Organic Farms and Consult isn't just about cultivating low-cholesterol protein like snails, mushrooms, and catfish – it's about empowering communities and changing the face of agriculture.

From Humble Beginnings to Award-Winning Growth:

Our journey began with a passion, not a plan. Long school holidays gave birth to a hobby that soon ignited a fire. By 2020, the spark had become a blazing inferno, transforming into a fully registered firm with a dedicated team of eight.

More Than Just Farming:

We're not just growers, we're innovators. Recognizing the need for a multi-faceted approach, QET has evolved into three distinct brands:

QET Organic Farms: Where the magic happens! This is where our dedication to soil, sustainability, and ethical farming practices yields delicious, nutritious protein sources.
QET Agribusiness: Sharing our knowledge isn't just a passion, it's a mission. We empower farmers and future farmers through consulting services, training programs, and expert guidance.
QET Foods: From farm to table, QET Foods ensures our high-quality produce reaches every plate, tantalizing taste buds and nourishing Ghanaian families.
Striving for Excellence, Reaching for Stars:

Our commitment to quality hasn't gone unnoticed. We've earned the prestigious "Best Youth in Agriculture" award and even competed for the "Agribusiness of the Year" title across eight African nations. While victory slipped our grasp that time, it only fueled our ambition.

The Future is Agribusiness, and QET is Leading the Way:

With a seasoned team, unwavering resilience, and an insatiable appetite for growth, we envision a future where QET isn't just a company, it's a household name synonymous with agribusiness excellence in Ghana. By 2025, we aim to be the go-to solution center for every agricultural need, from farm management to market access.

Name: De la Fuente S.A.
Description:
De la Fuente, S.A, una empresa familiar que lleva más de medio siglo dedicándose a la comercialización y distribución de fertilizantes y cereales.
Unas instalaciones de más de 6000 metros cuadrados cubiertos, donde siempre hemos innovando con nuevas técnicas y procesos que nos permite dar el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes y colaboradores.
Como profesionales en el sector agrícola desde hace más de seis décadas, hemos sabido evolucionar ofreciendo una amplia gama de productos y servicios, y así conseguir satisfacer las necesidades de cada cultivo.

Con la oferta de abonos a la carta, donde en nuestra fábrica de blending, producimos los fertilizantes apropiados para que nuestros clientes optimicen sus explotaciones, a la vez que mantienen los suelos de cultivo de forma sostenible.
Gracias a nuestro laboratorio de análisis de suelos y tierras podemos ofrecer el mejor asesoramiento y garantizar la calidad de nuestros productos.
Desde el departamento de fitosanitarios, con la atención de nuestros técnicos agrícolas, asesoramos a nuestros clientes para conseguir una mejor eficiencia en los tratamientos necesarios para el control de plagas que puedan afectar al desarrollo de los cultivos. Así mismo, los ingenieros técnicos agrícolas certifican y ayudan en la cumplimentación de los registros necesarios exigidos por la legislación vigente.
Desde hace ya mucho tiempo, estamos implantando, como alternativa a los abonos minerales, los fertilizantes líquidos, invirtiendo en tanques de almacenamiento, así como en equipos de aplicación y cisternas de transporte, facilitando a los agricultores la aplicación de este tipo de abonos que favorecen el equilibrio del pH de los suelos, aumentando así, su actividad microbiológica.
Amplia gama de variedades de semillas y el servicio de selección de cereales y leguminosas completan nuestra oferta, además de la implantación y acondicionamiento de nuevos productos como la camelina, que ofrecen nuevas alternativas en la rotación de cultivos.

Behind-the-scenes farm operations | Soil science insights | Regenerative agriculture data | Farmer success stories | The business case for regeneration

Name: CZ Tokosova
Description:
En Tokosova, nos apasiona cambiar vidas y paisajes. Nuestra misión es conectar tecnología, personas y territorios para un mundo mejor, impulsando un desarrollo social responsable. Fundada por Pablo Tokos, un ex ejecutivo corporativo que se convirtió en innovador social, Tokosova se dedica a apoyar a pequeños agricultores en Chile, proporcionándoles sistemas de riego tecnificado.

Nos centramos en las zonas más vulnerables del país, donde la riqueza natural contrasta con la pobreza de la zona. Nuestra solución se basa en la innovación y la eficiencia: utilizando tecnología y energía sostenibles, ayudamos a los agricultores a ser más productivos y resilientes frente al cambio climático.

Hasta la fecha, hemos ayudado a cerca de 1.000 agricultores a modernizar su riego, lo que ha aumentado su productividad hasta en un 300%. 

Para maximizar nuestro impacto, colaboramos estrechamente con la academia y el gobierno. A través de nuestra asociación con la Universidad Católica de Temuco y el trabajo coordinado con la Comisión Nacional de Riego, estamos creando soluciones hídricas que no solo aumentan la productividad agrícola, sino que también ayudan a cerrar las brechas de desarrollo.

En Tokosova, no solo nos enorgullece ser una Empresa B, sino que también somos miembros del Consejo de Capitalismo Inclusivo, una entidad multinacional que promueve una economía más justa e inclusiva. De cara al futuro, tenemos planes de expandir nuestro modelo a otros países y de lanzar nuestra primera planta desaladora.

Nuestra historia y nuestro impacto se describen en nuestro próximo libro "Una empresa con alma", que explora cómo es posible crear una empresa exitosa en una de las regiones más pobres de Chile y contribuir a la retención territorial de las familias rurales.

En Tokosova, creemos en un mundo donde la tecnología, las personas y los territorios se unan para un desarrollo social responsable. Únete a nosotros en esta misión

Name: Agristar Technologies
Description:
Agristar Technologies is transforming how farmers approach modern agriculture by making precision farming technology accessible and practical for real-world farming challenges across India.

We believe that every farmer deserves access to the same agricultural technology and drone spraying solutions that large agribusinesses use. That's why we've focused on creating agricultural inputs and crop protection products that work seamlessly with drone technology—something that simply didn't exist in the right format before.

Agricultural Innovation & Precision Farming Solutions:

Our agricultural research team has developed concentrated, drone-compatible formulations that deliver crop-specific nutrients and plant protection exactly where crops need them. No more guessing. No more waste. Just precision agriculture that saves money and improves crop yields.

We were among the first agtech companies in India to recognize that drone spraying needed completely different packaging solutions. Traditional bulk agricultural containers just don't work when you're operating agricultural drones. So we redesigned everything from the ground up.

Data-Driven Agriculture & Smart Farming:

Real farming decisions need agricultural data analytics. We combine information from agricultural drones flying over fields with satellite imagery and remote sensing to help farmers understand what's actually happening with their crops. This isn't about replacing farmer expertise—it's about giving experienced growers better digital agriculture tools to make informed decisions.

Description:
KYRKA MELISSOKOMIKOS KYKLOS, founded in 1988 by passionate beekeepers Dimitrios and Eleni Kyrka, started as a hive manufacturing laboratory. Over the years, it has expanded to include bee foods, beekeeping clothing, and mechanical equipment, becoming a leading name in beekeeping supplies. Located in Glyka Nera, Attica, we are dedicated to producing and selling high-quality bee foods, supplements, and beekeeping equipment, catering to both novice and professional beekeepers.

Since 2001, Evangelia Kyrka, an Agronomist with a Master’s degree in Food Technology and Quality Assurance from Reading University, has led the company. With extensive experience and a deep connection to beekeeping from a young age, she has driven the company's research and development initiatives, ensuring continuous improvement in all production and distribution lines.

Research and Development (R&D)

Our R&D department collaborates with beekeepers across Greece, exchanging knowledge and conducting continuous testing of beekeeping products. We prioritize bee health, ensuring quality and reliability for beekeepers and partners. We maintain 25 beehives dedicated to R&D, focusing on bee evolution and reproduction programs.

Products and Services

Products: Specialized bee foods and nutritional supplements, organic bee foods certified by DIO, essential oils, and veterinary-approved bee medicines. We also produce wooden bee hives, beekeeping structures, clothing, and trade beekeeping machinery, tools, honey, pollen, royal jelly, propolis, and wax under the brand "the3bees."

Services: Veterinary prescriptions, colony health analysis, product analysis, honey production methods, and design and printing of logos and labels.

Training Seminars: We offer comprehensive training seminars across Greece in collaboration with associations and cooperatives. Our seminars focus on bee nutrition, disease prevention, and honey processing, educating young beekeepers on sustainable beekeeping practices.

Name: Aras AgroTech
Description:
Aras AgroTech has revolutionized sustainable agriculture with its innovative Sprayable Biodegradable Polymer Membrane (SBPM) technology. This environmentally friendly solution addresses critical challenges in modern farming by offering a bio-based alternative to traditional plastic mulch films. The SBPM formulation, meticulously crafted by Aras AgroTech, strikes a delicate balance in mechanical properties, ensuring a strong elastic binding with the soil. This groundbreaking product allows farmers to enhance crop yields while utilizing less water, nutrients, and agrochemicals. The elimination of plastic mulch films contributes to reducing plastic pollution and waste disposal issues. Notably, the SBPM layer can be conveniently applied to growing crops, offering a versatile solution for both small-scale and industrial farming. Its biodegradability through surface and bulk erosion distinguishes SBPM from conventional alternatives, making it a sustainable choice without leaving a lasting imprint on the environment.

Aras AgroTech's commitment to sustainability extends beyond the environmental benefits of SBPM. The company's proprietary technology enables easy integration into existing cropping systems, making it accessible for farmers of various scales. By preventing nutrient loss, reducing water evaporation, and inhibiting weed growth, SBPM becomes a multifaceted tool for enhancing agricultural productivity. The application process, whether through handheld sprayers for small-scale applications or mechanized sprayers for industrial farming, underscores the versatility of SBPM. Moreover, the non-toxic composition of the polymer membrane ensures its safety for both the environment and crops. Aras AgroTech's SBPM emerges as a reliable and practical solution, addressing the pressing challenges of plastic pollution, resource efficiency, and sustainable agriculture in a single, innovative package.

Name: Banana Bros
Description:
At Banana Bros, we are a passionate and innovative startup founded by three ambitious high school students with a shared vision for sustainable agriculture. Our mission is to provide a natural fertiliser and reduce waste by harnessing the power of nature.

Driven by our love for nature and a desire to make a positive impact, we recognized the untapped potential of banana peels as a nutrient-rich organic fertiliser. We carry out an effective process to harness the natural goodness of banana peels and create a powerful fertiliser that promotes healthy plant growth while reducing waste.

What sets us apart is our commitment to sustainability. We believe in harnessing the power of nature to create a greener future. By repurposing banana peels that would otherwise end up in landfills, we are reducing waste and contributing to a more circular economy. Our fertilizer is 100% Natural, free from harmful chemicals, and safe for the environment, ensuring that your plants thrive without any negative impact on the ecosystem.

We take pride in our locally sourced banana peels, collaborating with local businesses to collect discarded peels, supporting both the community and the environment. Our production process prioritizes efficiency and eco-consciousness, minimizing our carbon footprint and waste generation.

At Banana Bros, we strive for excellence and customer satisfaction. We are committed to providing high-quality, nutrient-dense banana peel fertilizer that nourishes your plants and yields impressive results. Whether you are a passionate gardener, a farmer, or a nature enthusiast, our fertilizer is your key to vibrant, flourishing plants and sustainable cultivation practices.

Join us on this exciting journey as we redefine the potential of banana peels and inspire others to embrace eco-friendly alternatives in agriculture. Together, we can make a difference and cultivate a greener world.

Banana Bros: Growing a Sustainable Future One Peel At a Time
