Name: Vukoil d.o.o.
Description:
Gentile,

Siamo lieti di presentarvi l'olio di neem, un miglioratore del suolo di origine vegetale al 100%, ottenuto dalla spremitura a freddo dei semi dell'albero di Neem (Azadirachta indica). Nel 2022 abbiamo avuto il piacere di presentare questo prodotto come una novità sul mercato croato alla fiera CroAGRO.

L'olio di neem è ampiamente utilizzato nell'agricoltura biologica grazie alle sue proprietà antibatteriche, antivirali, antiparassitarie, antifungine e insetticide. La sua composizione chimica complessa include triterpeni, limonoide, nonterpenoide, esanortriterpenoide e pentattriterpenoide, ma il principale principio attivo è l'azadirachtina.

L'olio di neem è efficace contro oltre 200 specie di insetti e parassiti, tra cui nematodi, acari, afidi, cocciniglie, cimici, sciami di mosca bianca, scarafaggi giapponesi, trips e altri parassiti del giardino. Inoltre, previene le malattie causate da microrganismi, come la muffa bianca, la macchia nera, la ruggine e l'antracnosi.

L'olio di neem è la soluzione naturale migliore per il controllo delle macchie nere e la protezione dalle infezioni fungine come la muffa e la ruggine (phragmidium mucronatum). È inoltre sicuro per l'uso nell'agricoltura, nell'orticoltura, negli alberi da frutto (frutta secca, bacche), nei vigneti, negli uliveti, nei fiori, nei prati, nelle piante ornamentali e medicinali.

L'olio di neem può essere anche utilizzato nella protezione dei depositi da parassiti come mosche e altri insetti. La sua concentrazione consigliata per l'applicazione nei depositi va dallo 0,5 al 2%. È importante notare che l'olio di neem non è tossico per gli esseri umani e gli animali, rendendolo sicuro per l'uso nei depositi alimentari.

Siamo disponibili su Facebook: facebook.com/Vukoil, Instagram: instagram.com/vukoil_neem/ e YouTube: youtube.com/vukoild.o.o per maggiori informazioni. Inoltre, siamo sempre disponibili per rispondere alle vostre domande e per fornirvi ulteriori informazioni sull'utilizzo dell'olio d

Name: Xuchang Great Abrasive Co., Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 1989, Great has equipped itself with a robust lineup of manufacturing equipment: two tilting furnaces for brown fused alumina and four for white fused alumina, seven granulation production lines, two heat treatment production lines, and three ceramic coating production lines.

Our state-of-the-art intelligent systems stand at the forefront of our operations, enabling precise control and monitoring of every detail in the processes of smelting, granulation, calcination, and coating. These systems significantly reduce human operational errors, ensuring the stability and consistency of our product quality.

At Great, we house one chemical laboratory, three physical testing laboratories, and a dedicated quality inspection team of over 20 professionals. Our laboratories are not only fully equipped but also integrated with a QR code traceability system. This innovative system allows for test results to be directly fed into our company database and linked with QR codes, streamlining our quality control process.

Complementing our advanced production capabilities is our 3D intelligent warehousing system, epitomizing efficient and smart production management. Our commitment to technological advancement extends to our fully automated packaging system. The system is not only user-friendly for our workforce but also ensure that our packaging is both aesthetically appealing and secure.

Great is dedicated to meticulousness in every aspect of our service, right down to the smallest details of shipping, to guarantee the safe and reliable delivery of our products to your hands.

With Great, experience the future of abrasive material production where innovation meets precision.

The company is the largest importer/exporter of Bio Pesticides in Eastern India. The company also provides various Bio Pesticide formulations in Bulk for resale to various Formulators all over India. Nuestra visión:
Liderar el mercado de insumos agrícolas sostenibles en América Latina y el Caribe, contribuyendo al desarrollo de una agricultura más innovadora, responsable y orientada al futuro.

Name: Lucera Edibles Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to Lucera Edibles Private Limited, where sustainability meets innovation. Our mission is to revolutionize the edible oil and renewable energy sectors by integrating sustainable agricultural practices, renewable energy solutions, and eco-friendly innovations. We aim to create a cleaner, greener, and more self-reliant future for generations to come.

At Lucera, we address critical challenges such as crude oil dependency, environmental degradation, and economic instability. By empowering farmers and fostering renewable energy adoption, we pave the way for economic growth, social upliftment, and a significant reduction in carbon emissions.

Vision

Our vision is to cultivate a world where:

Agricultural practices are led by sustainability.
Farmers are economically empowered and resilient.
Renewable energy solutions drive global progress.

Impact

Lucera Edibles is committed to creating triple-impact benefits:

Environmental: Reducing CO2 emissions by up to 86%, conserving biodiversity, and promoting renewable energy through biodiesel production.

Economic: Providing stable incomes to farmers, reducing India’s dependency on imports, and creating green jobs across rural and urban areas.

Social: Empowering rural communities with training, technology, and financial support, while enhancing energy accessibility and improving public health through pollution reduction.

Our Services

Sustainable Agriculture:
Promoting dry land farming and palm tree cultivation to create high-yield, eco-friendly crops.

Edible Oil Production:
Refining crude edible oils locally to reduce import dependency and provide high-quality oils for the domestic market.

Biodiesel Production:
Producing renewable biodiesel from palm oil by-products and used cooking oil, offering a cleaner energy alternative for transportation, agriculture, and power sectors.

Name: Seto Sebze Tohumları Gübre A.Ş.
Description:
Seto A.Ş., tarım sektörünün farklı alanlarında başarılı olmuş önder üreticiler tarafından 1982 yılında kurulmuştur. 

Kuruluş amacı tohum ıslahı ve ticareti olan Seto A.Ş., 2007 senesine kadar 24  yıl boyunca Hollandalı tohum firması Enza Zaden’in Türkiye temsilciliğini  yapmıştır.

Yine aynı ortaklar tarafından 1977 yılında kurulmuş, uzun yıllar ilaç ve gübre sektöründe hizmet veren Kimta A.Ş., 15 yıl uluslararası konumda bulunan  Finlandiya firması Kemira’nın Türkiye temsilciliğini yapmış ve 2006 yılında

10.000 ton suda erir gübre ithalatı ve satışı gerçekleştirmiştir. Şirketimiz, Finli firmanın gübre sektöründen çekileceğinin öğrenilmesi üzerine kendi  yapılanmasına hız vermiş ve bugünkü Seto A.Ş.’nin sahip olduğu tesislerin  tamamını 2006 yılından itibaren kısa sürede hayata geçirmiştir.

Seto A.Ş. ve Kimta A.Ş.’nin faaliyet konuları 2009 yılında Seto A.Ş. çatısı altında  birleştirilerek bugünkü yapısına kavuşmuştur.

Firmamız kendisine ait Antalya Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 6.000 m2 kapalı  fabrika alanı ol mak üzere 9.000 m2 arazi üzerinde faaliyet göstermektedir.

Firmamız 2016 - 2019 yılları arasında, yapmış olduğu yenilikçi yatırımlar ile  modern gübre üretim teknolojisi ve yeni bina imkanına kavuşmuştur.  Fabrikamız yıllık 15.000 ton katı ve 3.000 ton sıvı imalat kapasitesine  ulaşmıştır. Yüksek imalat kapasitesi ile katma değeri yüksek yeni ürün  çeşitliliğine gidilmiştir.

Özellikle suda çözünür NPK ürünlerinde tescili alınmış Durohoja, Ferticare, Fertigold, Premium, Fertimix, Fertisoil, FertiFerro, Ferrum, Vagrant, Fertichem, Blacksoil, Navigator ve Drogan markaları ile çiftçilerimize ulaşılmaktadır.

Firmamız, T.C. Gıda Tarım ve Hayvancılık Bakanlığı’ndan ruhsat ve tescili alınmış 250’yi aşan sayıda katı ve sıvı formda bitki besleme ürünü çeşitliliğine sahiptir. Bünyesinde bulunan ziraat mühendisi kökenli satış ve teknik kadrosu ile tarım sektörüne hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Bio Bounty
Description:
In the vibrant biosphere of agriculture, Bio Bounty is cultivating a revolution. They're biohackers on a mission to rewrite the code, crafting a future where farms hum with life and the environment thrives. Here's how they orchestrate this symphony of sustainability:
Unlocking the Earth's Code: Bio Bounty isn't just about yield – they're microbial matchmakers. They craft earth-friendly fertilizers like vermicompost teeming with beneficial microbes, unlocking hidden potential within the soil and fostering explosive plant growth. Their expertise extends to the intricate dance of organic farming, promoting a natural equilibrium within the ecosystem.
Thriving from the Inside Out: Bio Bounty understands the intricate language of animal health. They translate this knowledge into specialized nutrition plans and natural health supplements, ensuring animals are thriving bioreactors on the farm.
Data as the New Seed: Information isn't just raw data at Bio Bounty – it's the fertile ground for growth. They're masters of transforming farm data into actionable insights. Using cutting-edge AI algorithms, they analyze farm ecosystems, helping farmers optimize practices and maximize results. This data-driven approach extends to their sales strategy, ensuring a precise match between Bio Bounty's solutions and the specific needs of each farm.
Every Drop Counts: Water is a precious resource, not a limitless well. Bio Bounty champions conservation through innovative techniques like drip irrigation, ensuring every precious molecule reaches its target, maximizing efficiency, and minimizing waste.
Navigating the Green Maze: The regulatory landscape of sustainable agriculture can be a complex algorithm. Bio Bounty offers a helping hand, guiding farmers through the ever-evolving world of organic farming and cutting-edge practices.
Planting the Seeds of Success: Bio Bounty doesn't just launch new products – they orchestrate strategic deployments, ensuring farmers understand t

Name: ZION
Description:
We are ZION. 
R&D, production and sales team of magic product called Zion: ionite substrate that turns anything (including sand) into the most fertile soil and allows growing different crops with unprecedented yield. The technology was initially developed for space colonization and has been commercialized only recently. 
Just a 3% concentration of ZION in soil radically improves harvest, reduces different risks that lead to plant death, and simplifies the entire nutrition process. ZION is not a fertilizer. It’s a highly concentrated, granulated, nutritious plant growth medium, containing the whole list of a highly concentrated composition of nutrients based on ionitoponic principles. Nutrients are released into the soil and assimilated by plants solely as a result of ion exchange between the ZION substrate and metabolites excreted by the roots during plant development. 
Ion exchange process allows Zion to give nutrients to the plat in exactly the time and dosage needed. It allows to grow crops safely, without harming the environment and with mind-blowing results. Plants always absorb "on demand" the most suitable, optimal combination of nutrients for the most sustainable growth. It is not a fertilizer; it is a sustainable game-changer for agriculture and many other industries.
ZION opens up many opportunities for businesses to improve different metrics, while at the same time meeting the current global challenges in agriculture, city beatification and infrastructure development, hobby gardening and fighting climate change.

Name: Stubbio Solutions
Description:
Our startup is focused on providing an innovative and environmentally sustainable solution to the problem of stubble burning and single-use plastic waste. Every year, millions of tons of agricultural stubble are burned across India, causing severe air pollution and environmental degradation. At the same time, the growing demand for disposable tableware contributes significantly to plastic waste, further harming the environment. Our solution lies in repurposing agricultural stubble, a byproduct of farming, and converting it into biodegradable, compostable disposable tableware.

Using advanced, eco-friendly technologies, we will transform crop residues into high-quality tableware that is both durable and completely biodegradable. Our products offer a sustainable alternative to plastic and Styrofoam disposables, which are harmful to the environment and take hundreds of years to decompose. By utilizing stubble for this purpose, we reduce the burning of crop waste, decreasing air pollution and contributing to a circular economy.
Our biodegradable tableware will cater to a wide range of industries, including hospitality, food services, and event management, by offering businesses an environmentally friendly alternative to plastic disposables. This not only helps in reducing the carbon footprint of these industries but also meets the growing consumer demand for sustainable, eco-conscious products.

In essence, our startup aims to solve two critical issues—agricultural waste management and plastic pollution—by turning stubble into a valuable resource that benefits both the environment and society. By making these eco-friendly products widely accessible, we aspire to create a cleaner & greener future while promoting sustainability in everyday life.

Name: Xmet Pty Ltd
Description:
Over the past 12 months, XMET Pty Limited (XMET) and the associated companies, Aqua Firma Solutions Pty Ltd and Macsuz Pty Ltd, have collaboratively pioneered the development of a material to significantly curtail methane emissions in laboratory models.

The XMET formulations are based on a pyrolysis process which requires heating under an oxygen-limited atmosphere. This technique is becoming increasingly common for the production of a related material called biochar, which can be traded on the voluntary carbon markets.

While the current XMET formulations do not meet the specifications for the voluntary carbon trading market as a method to store carbon, there is significant potential for carbon credits when utilized as a feed additive to reduce methane emissions.

A hollandiai központú Eurofins Agro Testing Wageningen BV, mint Európa egyik legjelentősebb mezőgazdasági szaktanácsadó laboratóriuma - az Eurofins Minerág Kft-n keresztül is elérhető - szolgáltatásai közé tatozik például a Fertilizer Manager, ami egy 43 paraméterre kiterjedő talajvizsgálat és a hozzá kapcsolódó talaj- és növényspecifikus szaktanácsadás kombinációja, melyet egy 6 oldalas riport formájában adunk át partnereinknek; a DNS-vizsgálat alapú növényvédelmi diagnosztikai szolgáltatás, amely mintegy 100 gomba- és baktériumbetegség meghatározása lehetséges növényi részről; vagy az új módszerek közül a legperspektivikusabb a száraz NIR technológia talajvizsgálatokban történő alkalmazása, amely jelenleg 20 talajvizsgálati paraméter megbízható mérését teszi lehetővé néhány másodpercen belül.

Name: YC AGRO LIMITED
Description:
Welcome to YC Agro Limited, a pioneering force in the agricultural industry dedicated to enhancing crop productivity and sustainability through innovative solutions. Founded in 2011, we have established ourselves as a leading provider of high-quality plant protection products in the UK and beyond.

At YC Agro, our mission is to support farmers and agricultural professionals with advanced, scientifically proven solutions that address the complex challenges of modern agriculture. Our product portfolio includes a range of herbicides, fungicides, plant growth regulators, and bio-control agents designed to maximize crop yields, combat pests and diseases, and improve overall plant health.

Our flagship products, including THALIA (Fluroxypyr 200g/L EC), EUTERPE (Diflufenican 100 g/l + Flufenacet 400 g/l SC), ANEMOI (Fluazinam 500g/l SC), and PONYTAIL (Trinexapac-ethyl 250g/L EC), are testament to our commitment to quality, efficiency, and environmental stewardship. With an exciting pipeline of products in development, such as Prothioconazole 250g/l SC, Diflufenican 500g/L SC, and Azoxystrobin 250g/L SC, we continue to push the boundaries of agricultural innovation.

As we look to the future, YC Agro is committed to leading the way in sustainable agriculture, developing solutions that not only benefit our clients but also contribute to a healthier planet. We invite you to follow our LinkedIn page for the latest updates, insights, and opportunities as we grow together.

Join us in cultivating the future of agriculture with YC Agro Limited – where innovation meets excellence.

Since then, we have grown steadily setting up a formulation and repacking plant in 2000 (in collaboration with Dr. Schirm) and officially establishing Map Pacific (Vietnam) Co., Ltd. in 2001 with 100% ownership. In 2020, we rebranded as Map Pacific (Singapore) Co., Ltd., marking a new chapter of innovation and sustainability.

For more than 20 years, Map Pacific has developed a portfolio of proprietary products with a strong focus on bio-based and organic solutions for Vietnam’s crop sector. Description: Clean Water International LLC is responsible for the production of AQUATIZE, an EPA-approved and registered sodium chlorite solution proven to dramatically reduce or eliminate salmonella, E-coli and nine other dangerous pathogens in the drinking water of livestock, including poultry. Name: Petnam Intergrated Organic Solutions
Description:
Petnam Integrated Organic Solutions is a climate-smart agribusiness based in Likuyani, Western Kenya, transforming organic waste into affordable, high-impact agricultural inputs for smallholder farmers. Founded in 2020, Petnam addresses the triple challenge of soil degradation, rising farm input costs, and organic waste mismanagement by creating value from waste.

Our innovative approach combines composting, Black Soldier Fly (BSF) technology, and vermiculture to produce organic compost fertilizer, BSF frass (biofertilizer), and BSF larvae (a protein-rich livestock feed). These inputs help farmers reduce dependence on synthetic chemicals, increase crop yields, and build soil resilience in the face of climate change.

Petnam also delivers hands-on training in regenerative agriculture, livestock feed formulation, and composting to over 2,000 farmers—empowering rural communities with sustainable skills and tools. We host farmer field days, community demos, and partner with local governments to promote circular agriculture and carbon-smart farming methods.

To date, we’ve processed over 150 tons of organic waste, sold 100+ tons of compost, and distributed 50+ tons of BSF larvae while building a localized, green economy. Our operations align with Kenya’s Nationally Determined Contributions (NDCs) and the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), including Climate Action (SDG 13), Zero Hunger (SDG 2), and Decent Work (SDG 8).

We’re expanding across counties, scaling liquid biofertilizer production, launching soil testing services, and setting up school gardens to grow the next generation of eco-conscious farmers.

Petnam Integrated is the bridge between regenerative farming, circular economy, and inclusive rural development—driving profit with purpose, restoring soils, reducing emissions, and creating lasting impact.

Reduce emissions and environmental degradation

Enhance sustainable food systems

Name: Inang Mesra Enterprise
Description:
Inang Mesra Enterprise atau dikenali sebagai “IME” merupakan sebuah syarikat milikan tunggal yang ditubuhkan sejak tahun 2004 sebagai syarikat yang mengendalikan dan berkemahiran tinggi didalam sektor pertanian umumnya dan kami juga didaftarkan dibawah Akta Pendaftaran Perniagaan 1956.

 

Syarikat ini juga mengamalkan Prinsip Golden Rule - Melayani orang lain seperti mana yang anda ingin orang lain melayani anda. IME tertumpu kepada bidang pertanian seperti memberi latihan, tunjuk ajar perundingan pertanian, dan kerjasama dalam sektor tanaman ladang Kelapa Sawit, Padi, buah-buahan, sayur-sayuran dll termasuklan cendawan. Kami amat berpengalaman didalam bidang landskap dibahagian utara dan di beri kepercayaan untuk mengendalikan beberapa projek landskap untuk beberapa kilang dibahagian Perindustrian Gurun dan beberapa kediaman persendirian. IME juga menjalankan kerjasama dengan beberapa sektor kerajaan seperti MADA, Jabatan Pertanian, FAMA, FELDA dan Pusat Permulihan Reintergrasi (PPR) untuk melatih dan membekal barangan input pertanian kepada pihak yang tertentu.

 

IME juga tidak kurangnya ketingalan dalam sektor pembuatan pertanian terutama input pertanian, kerana kami juga mengeluarkan beberapa produk pertanian yang berasakan bio-kimia/organik, yang amat sesuai kepada semua jenis tumbuhan, produk kami dikenali sebagai “Agrotech Plus/Agrotech Floral/Agrotech Leaves” yang telah berada dalam pasaran sejak tahun 2018 dan produk ini juga dijual secara dalam talian dan secara terus kepada pengguna

Qui sommes- nous ?
BYNAF INC. est une entreprise spécialisée dans l'importation et la transformation de produits agricoles notamment les noix de cajou, les noix de coco  séchée et les fèves de cacao. Basée au Canada, notre mission est de fournir des produits de hauts qualité aux industries agroalimentaire tous en développement une chaîne d'approvisionnement efficace et durable.
Nos activités.
Importation & Distribution:
Nous approvisionnons le marché Canadien en noix de cajou, noix de coco séchée, fèves de cacao en collaboration avec des producteurs et exportateurs de premiers plan, notamment en Côte d'Ivoire.
Transformation:
Une partie de notre production sera transformée en interne pour offrir des produits finis répondant aux besoins des pâtissiers et des chocolatiers.
Expansion en Afrique:
BYNAF INC. développe une unité de transformation de cajou en Côte d'Ivoire avec une capacité annuel de 20 000 tonnes. Cette unité, branche directe de BYNAF INC.,vise à renforcer la valeur ajoutée locale et à maximiser l'efficacité de la chaîne d'approvisionnement.
Nos ambition :
BYNAF INC. s'engage à devenir un acteur clé du secteur agroalimentaire en Amérique du Nord et en Afrique. Nous mettons l'accent sur la qualité, l'étihque, l'innovation et la durabilité pour répondre aux attentes de nos clients et partenaires.

Description:
Aadhunik Sheti Tantra – Empowering Farmers with Modern Agricultural Knowledge

Aadhunik Sheti Tantra is a non-profit organization committed to transforming Indian agriculture by educating farmers about the latest advancements in farming techniques. Our mission is to equip farmers with practical knowledge, enabling them to adopt modern methods that improve crop yields, soil health, and overall farm productivity.

Recognizing the challenges farmers face in accessing technical information, we ensure that all training and guidance are provided in their local language. This approach bridges the gap between scientific advancements and grassroots farming, making agricultural science more accessible and applicable.

In addition to education, Aadhunik Sheti Tantra offers expert recommendations on essential agricultural inputs, including:

Fertilizers – Helping farmers understand nutrient management for optimal crop growth.

Plant Growth Regulators (PGRs) – Enhancing plant development and stress resistance.

Organic Materials – Encouraging sustainable farming with eco-friendly alternatives.

Crop Protection Chemicals – Advising on responsible and effective pest and disease management.

Through field demonstrations, workshops, and personalized advisory services, we empower farmers to maximize their agricultural potential while promoting sustainability. Our goal is to revolutionize farming by integrating modern science with traditional wisdom, ensuring a prosperous future for India’s agrarian community.

Our approach focuses on working with natural biological mechanisms — activating plant resilience and improving soil health rather than relying on toxic or externally acting substances.

Au fil des années, notre croissance s’est construite autour de valeurs fondamentales : proximité avec les producteurs, qualité de nos produits et services, et engagement en faveur du développement durable de l’agriculture locale.

Name: Urvar Natural (P) Ltd.
Description:
About Us

Urvar Natural Pvt. Ltd. is on a mission to rejuvenate India’s agricultural landscape through science-backed, eco-friendly inputs. Founded on the principles of soil health, sustainability and smallholder prosperity, we combine cutting-edge microbial research with time-tested organic practices to deliver high-performance bio-fertilizer and organic soil amendments.

Our Mission

To empower farmers with safe, cost-effective, and sustainable crop inputs that boost yields, improve soil vitality, and safeguard long-term ecosystem health.

What We Offer

Vermicompost: Nutrient-rich, earthworm-enhanced organic compost that improves soil structure, moisture retention and nutrient availability.

Microbial Bio-Fertilizers: Single-strain and consortium formulations (Azospirillum, Rhizobium, PSB, Trichoderma, etc.) to enhance nutrient uptake, root development and plant immunity.

Organic Nutrient Blends: Customized NPK and secondary-micronutrient mixes derived from natural mineral and plant sources—fully compliant with FCO and NPOP standards.

Bio-Pesticides & Biostimulants: Eco-friendly microbial and botanical extracts that protect against soil-borne pathogens and stimulate plant growth without harming beneficial organisms.

Soil Conditioners & Inoculants: Humic-fulvic acid formulations and carrier-based inoculants designed to rehabilitate degraded soils and jump-start microbial activity.

Name: ROOTS AGRIMALL
Description:
Roots Agrimall: Nurturing Growth, Empowering Agriculture.

Agriculture has always been the backbone of human civilization. In India, it is not just a source of livelihood but also a way of life. Yet, despite its central importance, the agricultural sector has long struggled with fragmented supply chains, inconsistent access to quality inputs, lack of technical guidance, and limited innovation at the grassroots level. 
Farmers, the very backbone of the nation, often found themselves caught between unreliable sources of seeds, fertilizers, and crop protection products and a shortage of authentic agricultural knowledge.

It was within this gap that Roots Agrimall was born—a brand created with the vision of becoming a one-stop solution for agricultural input needs, farmer education, and innovative services. Today, it stands tall as a trusted partner for farmers and Green Lovers across Kerala, embodying the spirit of innovation, quality, and customer-centricity.

Roots Agrimall is not just a marketplace; it is a brand ecosystem that empowers farmers, connects them with reliable inputs, and bridges the gap between traditional practices and modern agricultural innovations.

The Vision and Mission Behind Roots Agrimall

At the heart of Roots Agrimall is a simple yet profound vision: to empower farmers and Green Lovers with access to good-quality agricultural inputs and expert guidance for better yields and healthier produce.

The mission has always been two-fold:

To provide farmers with a comprehensive range of agricultural inputs—from seeds and fertilizers to plant growth regulators and crop protection products.

To create an ecosystem of trust and learning where farmers are not only buyers but also partners in innovation, equipped with the knowledge and support to adopt sustainable practices.

Beyond profitability, Roots Agrimall believes in building a greener tomorrow.

Name: Biosafi Organics
Description:
Bio-safi Organics is an innovative agricultural company focused on producing high-quality, sustainable organic fertilizer. We specialize in converting organic waste, particularly from sugar companies, into fertilizer using maggots. This unique process combines plant-based nutrients from organic waste with insect-based nutrients from the maggots, creating a dual-composition fertilizer that is richer and more effective than traditional fertilizers.

Our fertilizer is pelletized, which consolidates both the maggots and the processed organic material into a compact, easy-to-handle form. This pelletization enhances storage, transportation, and application, while preserving the nutrient-rich benefits of both plant and insect matter.

We source organic waste locally from sugar factories, repurposing it to create a product that reduces landfill waste and environmental pollution. This approach promotes a circular economy, where waste is transformed into a valuable resource, helping to minimize the carbon footprint of traditional fertilizer manufacturing. Our eco-friendly process reduces the need for chemical additives, making our fertilizer a sustainable alternative.

Affordability is key to our mission. We aim to provide high-quality organic fertilizer at competitive prices, making it accessible to farmers of all sizes. By keeping production costs low while ensuring excellent quality, we support farmers in adopting organic farming practices without financial strain.

Our commitment to sustainability extends beyond production. We aim to educate farmers on the benefits of organic farming and drive the widespread adoption of environmentally responsible practices. As we grow, we plan to expand our production capacity and product offerings, further contributing to a more sustainable agricultural sector.

Name: Pure Soil Solutions

We don't just dispose of waste — we create valuable resources for sustainable agriculture, supporting the circular economy model:

15+ years of experience in organic waste transformation, led by a team of scientists and specialists passionately dedicated to soil health and sustainable agricultural futures.

#SustainableAgriculture #CircularEconomy #CompostTechnology #OrganicWaste #SoilHealth #Innovation

Name: Fermical.co
Description:
Toprak, binlerce yıldır insanlığın en büyük besleyicisi, en güvenilir dostu… Ve biz, Fermical olarak bu dostluğu daha verimli, daha sürdürülebilir ve daha güçlü kılmak için yola çıktık. 

Çukurova’nın uçsuz bucaksız verimli arazileri ve Amik Ovası’nın bereketi, ilham kaynağımız oldu. Bu topraklardan doğan Fermical, yalnızca bir marka değil; toprağın dilinden anlayan, çiftçilerle birlikte büyüyen, emeğe ve doğaya değer veren bir tarım ekosistemidir.

Kurucularımız, bölgenin iklimini, toprağını ve üreticinin ihtiyaçlarını yakından tanıyan, uzun yıllara dayanan deneyime sahip ziraat mühendislerinden oluşmaktadır. Sahadaki gözlemleri, bilimsel birikimleri ve çiftçilerle kurdukları güçlü bağ sayesinde, tarımsal üretimin her aşamasında yenilikçi çözümler geliştirmektedirler. Fermical’i yalnızca bir gübre markası değil, sürdürülebilir tarımın güçlü bir temsilcisi haline getiren de işte bu vizyondur.

Bitki besleme çözümlerinde inovasyonu merkezine alan Fermical, çiftçilerin verimini artırırken toprağın dengesini korumaya özen gösterir. Bizim için tarım, yalnızca üretmek değil, aynı zamanda geleceği şekillendirmektir. Bu yüzden her formülümüz, çiftçilerin karşılaştığı zorluklara çözümler sunmak, doğal kaynakları korumak ve gelecek nesillere daha yaşanabilir bir dünya bırakmak için tasarlandı. Yenilikçi gübre teknolojilerimizle tarımsal üretimde sürdürülebilirliği sağlarken, çiftçilerin emeğine değer katıyor, onların daha verimli ve kârlı bir üretim yapmasına destek oluyoruz.

Fermical, topraktan aldığı bereketi, bilimin ışığında geleceğe taşımaya kararlı bir markadır. Türkiye’nin dört bir yanında üreticilerle omuz omuza, daha verimli ve sürdürülebilir bir tarım için var gücümüzle çalışıyoruz. 
Çünkü biliyoruz ki, bereketli topraklar, güçlü bir geleceğin anahtarıdır.

Name: Universal Agriculture
Description:
The team of Universal Agriculture is excited to introduce you to a new product that can save thousands of dollars’ worth of land acres with a small amount of money.
After deep research we have found that the main two issues that destroy land in the United States is soil salinity and high pH levels which are causing the land to become solid and not able for growing crops. So far, because of this issue, nearly 20 percent of the world's farmland has been degraded, an area approximately the size of France. After not treating this issue properly, eventually, farmers will see that their land is not producing as much crop or in the same time it used to before. With time, the land can actually be left unused because of the salt until a solution is found. Some farmers however, do not realize that this is an issue and they do not see it in their land, but, in your area, it is an issue that is occurring.
We want to restore and keep the land in the United States, our mission is to help bring back healthy and efficient amount of crops.
Universal Agriculture, now offers two tested products, MASTER HUMIC POTASSIUM and SALT FIGHTER. The MHP is a soil conditioner used primarily in sandy and clay soils. The product is in a crystalline granulated form that is soluble in water.   It improves the soil structure allowing water and nutrients to flow to the plant roots. Helps to enhance the soils Cation-Exchange Capacity (CEC). It is a product that loosens the soil, reduce pH levels, and restore healthy soil that is good for growing crops. Salt Fighter is the first unique new method to manage soil salinity from ground water and irrigation water it also decreases chlorine buildup from potash. Salt Fighter an affordable solution that works by dislodging sodium and chlorine ions from the soil and attaching to them in a way that they can’t reattach to soil again.

2021 yılında kurulan Veniv Tarım Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi, Adana’nın ve dünyanın en verimli topraklarında faaliyet göstermektedir. Organik ve inorganik gübre, bitki besini ve bitki koruma ürünleri üretiminde uzmanlaşan şirketimiz, tarım sektöründe geleceğe yönelik yenilikçi ve verimli çözümler sunmayı hedeflemektedir.

Mühendislik ve kimya bilgilerimizi en üst düzeyde kullanarak, teknolojiyi yakından takip ediyor ve ürünlerimizde sürekli gelişim ve inovasyonu ön planda tutuyoruz.

Misyonumuz: Veniv Tarım Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi’nin misyonu, tarım sektöründe sürdürülebilirliği ve verimliliği artırarak, çiftçilere yenilikçi ve yüksek kaliteli çözümler sunmaktır. Organik ve inorganik gübre, bitki besini ve bitki koruma ürünlerimizle, çevre dostu ve teknolojik olarak ileri üretim yöntemlerini kullanarak, dünya genelinde tarımın geleceğine katkı sağlamayı hedefliyoruz. Tarımda inovasyon ve gelişimi ön planda tutarak, çiftçilerin ihtiyaçlarını en iyi şekilde karşılamayı ve toprağa hayat vermeyi amaçlıyoruz.

Vizyonumuz: Firmamızın vizyonu, tarımda inovasyon ve sürdürülebilirlik konusunda Türkiye’de öncü bir marka olmaktır. Türkiye ekonomisine katkı sağlayarak, en verimli ve çevre dostu ürünlerle tarım sektöründe değer yaratmayı amaçlıyoruz. Teknolojiyi ve mühendislik bilgisini en iyi şekilde kullanarak, tarımsal üretimde verimliliği artırmak ve çiftçilerin en güvenilir ortağı olmak vizyonumuzun temel taşlarını oluşturmaktadır. Geleceğin tarımını bugünden inşa ederek, daha sağlıklı ve verimli bir dünya ve güçlü bir Türkiye ekonomisi için çalışıyoruz.

Geleceğin tarımını bugünden inşa ediyor, kaliteli ve çevre dostu ürünlerimizle toprağınıza hayat veriyoruz. Geniş ürün yelpazemizle tarım sektörüne değer katmak ve çiftçilerin ihtiyaçlarını en iyi şekilde karşılamak için sürekli çalışıyoruz.

Name: Ecobor Middle East
Description:
Ecobor: ثورة التكنولوجيا الزراعية بقوة البورون العضوي 

نحن شركة Ecobor، شركة تركية رائدة في مجال التكنولوجيا الزراعية، انطلقت مسيرتنا من قلب البحث العلمي في "تكنوبارك جامعة عثمان غازي" بمدينة إسكي شهير. تخصصنا هو تطوير الجيل الجديد من الأسمدة العضوية وحلول تغذية النبات المعتمدة على تقنية البورون المتطورة.

 علم يلتقي بالطبيعة: بدأت رحلتنا في البحث والتطوير (R&D) منذ عام 2009، لنصل اليوم إلى صيغ مبتكرة تدمج بين قوة الطبيعة والدقة العلمية. جميع منتجاتنا مصممة لتقديم حلول متكاملة ترافق رحلة النبات "من الجذور حتى الحصاد"، لضمان أعلى إنتاجية مع الحفاظ على التوازن البيئي.

ما الذي نقدمه؟ نقدم سلسلة متكاملة من المنتجات (أسمدة سائلة، صلبة، ومنظمات نمو) التي تعمل على:  تعزيز الإنتاجية: زيادة كمية وجودة المحصول بشكل ملحوظ.  المقاومة الطبيعية: رفع مناعة النبات ضد الإجهاد المناخي (الجفاف، الصقيع) والأمراض.  الاستدامة: تحسين بنية التربة وتقليل الحاجة لاستخدام المواد الكيميائية الضارة.

رؤيتنا: أن نكون الشريك الاستراتيجي للمزارعين حول العالم، مقدمين حلولاً زراعية مستدامة، آمنة، وفعالة اقتصادياً.

انضم إلينا في مهمتنا لرسم ملامح مستقبل الزراعة.

Our portfolio includes a wide range of high-performance chemicals designed to tackle the most pressing agricultural challenges. Whether it’s combating pests with our advanced insecticides, preventing disease with our potent fungicides, or enhancing crop resilience with our seed treatments and adjuvants, NewAgco provides farmers with the tools they need to succeed.

At NewAgco, we are more than just a chemical registration and marketing company. We are a partner in progress for the agricultural community, dedicated to advancing the science of agriculture and ensuring a sustainable future for farmers.

Agriculture is a cornerstone of Morocco’s economy, employing nearly 40% of the workforce and generating substantial national revenue. Name: StandardFert
Description:
Welcome to StandardFert - Revolutionizing Sustainable Agriculture with Biochar! 

At StandardFert, we are passionate about creating a greener future by harnessing the power of organic biomass. Our startup is dedicated to collecting organic waste materials and transforming them into a valuable resource: biochar.

What is biochar, you may ask? Biochar is a carbon-rich, porous material that is created through a process called pyrolysis. It acts as a natural soil amendment, enhancing fertility, improving water retention, and sequestering carbon dioxide from the atmosphere. By utilizing this ancient technique, we are able to revolutionize the way we think about traditional fertilizers.

Our mission is twofold: to address the growing need for sustainable agriculture and to promote the circular economy. By diverting organic waste from landfills and converting it into a high-quality fertilizer, we contribute to reducing greenhouse gas emissions while simultaneously improving soil health and productivity.

StandardFert takes pride in our commitment to quality and innovation. We have developed cutting-edge technology and refining processes to ensure that our biochar product meets the highest standards of purity, consistency, and efficacy. Our team of experts works tirelessly to optimize the biochar production process, continuously improving our methods to achieve maximum benefits for farmers and the environment alike.

Join us in our journey to transform the agricultural landscape! By partnering with StandardFert, you become part of a forward-thinking community that values sustainability, innovation, and a genuine desire to make a positive impact. Together, we can create a healthier planet for future generations.

Ready to unlock the full potential of biochar? Let's connect and explore opportunities to collaborate, exchange ideas, and drive sustainable change. Together, we can cultivate a brighter future for agriculture!

#StandardFert #Biochar #SustainableAgriculture #C

Name: Saral Crop Protection
Description:
Who We Are
Saral Crop Protection is one of India’s emerging agrochemical manufacturers, dedicated to empowering the farming community through reliable, science-based, and sustainable crop protection solutions. With a mission rooted in the word "Saral" (meaning simple), we strive to make the process of farming easier, more productive, and more profitable for farmers across the country.

We produce and market a comprehensive range of agrochemicals including herbicides, insecticides, fungicides, plant growth regulators (PGRs), and combination products, which are essential for healthy crop growth and pest control.

Through continuous innovation, hands-on farmer engagement, and a strong supply chain, Saral Crop Protection is redefining how agrochemical companies support Indian agriculture.

 Our Origin & Journey
Saral Crop Protection was born from a deep understanding of farmers’ real-world challenges. Our founders—experienced professionals from agriculture, chemistry, and business backgrounds—identified a major gap: the lack of reliable, farmer-friendly, and cost-effective agrochemical solutions tailored to India's regional needs.

Starting from a small formulation setup, we gradually expanded into full-scale manufacturing, with a clear goal:
 Make crop protection products more accessible, affordable, and trustworthy.

Our early success came from building long-term relationships with farmers and channel partners—not just through products but by providing education, support, and service.

Today, Saral Crop Protection stands as a respected name in the agri-input industry, known for its integrity, performance, and innovation.

 Our Vision
To become India’s most trusted name in sustainable crop protection—where science, simplicity, and service come together for the success of every farmer.

 Our Mission
To create innovative agrochemical products backed by science and safety.

To reach every farmer with effective solutions that increase productivity.

Name: UK SaproTech Limited
Description:
About Us

Welcome to UK Saprotech Limited – where innovation meets sustainability in agriculture. Founded with the vision to revolutionize the agricultural sector, UK Saprotech is at the forefront of developing and distributing sapropel-based fertilizers and animal feed products. Our mission is to provide farmers and agricultural businesses across the UK with sustainable, organic alternatives to traditional chemical inputs, enhancing soil health, boosting yields, and supporting the environment.

Our Roots
Originating from a deep understanding of geology and a passion for sustainable farming practices, UK Saprotech has leveraged the unique properties of sapropel to create a line of products that are not just effective but also kind to the planet. Our journey began with the recognition of sapropel’s untapped potential as a natural resource, leading to the establishment of our operations centered around this remarkable material.

What Sets Us Apart
At UK Saprotech, we believe in the power of nature to provide solutions to modern agricultural challenges. Our proprietary extraction and processing technique ensures that the ecological and nutritional benefits of sapropel are maximized, setting our products apart in the marketplace. This, combined with our commitment to research and development, positions us as leaders in sustainable agriculture innovation.

Our Commitment to Sustainability
Sustainability is not just a buzzword for us; it’s a guiding principle in everything we do. From sourcing high-quality sapropel deposits to minimizing our carbon footprint throughout the production process, we are dedicated to promoting practices that benefit the environment and contribute to a sustainable future for agriculture.

Name: Quemems Farm

Imagine a sprawling expanse of 20 hectares where Quemems Farms Nigeria Limited is sowing the seeds of agricultural innovation. Picture this - back in 2018, the company officially kicked off its journey as a limited liability entity (RC 1472756) registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission. Steering this dynamic ship is Agbaragu Bernard, our visionary CEO, flanked by a team of seasoned professionals deeply rooted in both Agriculture and Technology.

Hey there! We're not your run-of-the-mill company. We're an agro-based powerhouse with our eyes set on cultivating, producing, processing, and marketing a smorgasbord of agro products. Why? Because we're not just in business; we're on a mission to tackle food security in Africa head-on. We're not lone wolves either; we've been rubbing shoulders with industry veterans, learning the ropes and shaping our journey. Our group is like the Avengers of Agriculture, working across the entire agricultural value chain to bring value to customers, employees, and shareholders.

Now, close your eyes and imagine a future where it just doesn't make sense to ship unprocessed goodies from Nigeria to other corners of the globe. That's our vision, and we're hustling to make it a reality.

Seedlings, anyone? We're not just growing them; we're nurturing the future. Palm oil, coconut - you name it, we've got the seedlings, and we're ready to supply whether you're after a handful or a truckload.

But wait, there's more! We're your one-stop-shop for all things farm-related. Need some agri-equipment? We've got it. Agro-allied products? Check. Agro-chemicals, aquaculture solutions, crops, seeds, and fertilizers? You betcha! We're not just about growing stuff; we're here to make sure you've got all the tools and goodies to do it right.

Name: Agriloop
Description:
Agriloop is building hyper-local fresh produce supply chains that connect restaurants, households, and smallholder farmers. Through our “collect–sort–deliver” micro-hub model, we shorten food miles, cut waste, and provide a reliable market for local growers. Our goal is to make food supply chains more sustainable, resilient, and community-driven.

The Challenge
Restaurants and households often face inconsistent access to fresh, affordable produce. Farmers, on the other hand, struggle with post-harvest losses and unstable market prices. The result: food waste, high costs, and a fragmented supply chain that leaves both producers and buyers underserved.

Our Solution
- Agriloop bridges this gap with a simple, tech-enabled model:
- Collect produce from smallholder farmers and home gardens.
- Sort and grade at community-based micro-hubs.
- Deliver fresh produce directly to restaurants and households.

This system ensures traceability, reduces logistics costs, and empowers local communities while cutting food waste.

Who We Serve
- Restaurants seeking consistent, affordable, and traceable fresh produce
- Households wanting access to healthy, locally sourced food
- Smallholder farmers needing reliable off-take and fair pricing

Our Vision
We believe food systems should be local, resilient, and sustainable. Agriloop is turning fragmented fresh-produce trade into a coordinated network that creates jobs, reduces waste, and strengthens community food security.

Contact Us
 Elijah@agriloop.co.uk

Name: uniCalc - Producent Nawozów Wapniowych
Description:
Produkcja nawozów UniCalc zlokalizowana jest bezpośrednio przy jednej z najstarszych i najbardziej renomowanych kopalni dolomitu w Polsce – Kopalni Dolomitu w Imielinie, działającej nieprzerwanie od ponad 30 lat. To właśnie ogromne doświadczenie, doskonała znajomość surowca oraz wiedza o jego właściwościach pozwoliły nam stworzyć nowoczesną linię nawozów, która łączy siłę natury z precyzją technologii.

Z czasem, w odpowiedzi na potrzeby rynku i wyzwania współczesnego rolnictwa, rozszerzyliśmy naszą ofertę o innowacyjne nawozy o unikalnym składzie – łączące wapń z siarką, krzemem i mikroelementami. To produkty opracowane z myślą o glebie przyszłości – jej żyzności, odporności i potencjale plonotwórczym.

Wierzymy, że dobre rolnictwo zaczyna się od dobrej gleby. Dlatego łączymy to, co sprawdzone w naturze, z tym, czego naprawdę potrzebuje dzisiejsze gospodarstwo: stabilne pH, właściwa struktura gleby oraz większa odporność na suszę i stresy środowiskowe. 

Prosto, skutecznie i z troską o równowagę – tak działają nawozy uniCalc. Jesteśmy blisko natury, blisko rolnika i blisko potrzeb zmieniającego się rolnictwa.

Research has shown that light loss due to condensation droplets can reach up to 9%. By using Uvatio's natural coating, this issue is resolved, allowing up to 8% more light to enter your greenhouse. 
And that's not all. Uvatio offers:
-	A cleaner and clearer glass surface
-	Prevention of condensation
-	Increased light transmission
-	Reduced humidity
-	Fewer algae and fungi
-	Energy savings
-	Elimination of fine dust

The result? A healthier climate for humans, animals, and plants—fully compliant with European safety standards.
